name: VOTING RIGHTS ANNOUNCEMENT (via DCCC)
subject: Elizabeth Warren: “We can’t just stand by”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | We're fired up like never before.

**FIRST:**

Republicans swore revenge after our Democrats' **HISTORIC** 2020 victories -- _and introduced 400+ voter suppression bills to rig the system in their favor._

**BUT THEN:**

Senator Elizabeth Warren jumped into action and called on all of us to fight for our democracy:

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/yr-jf4R_)

**SO NOW:**

****[We must answer Senator Warren's urgent message with a SURGE of grassroots action to DEFEAT anti-voting rights House Republicans. Will you join Elizabeth Warren in this righteous struggle by chipping in $3 to defend our House Majority and elect House Democrats who support our fundamental voting rights?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/0L9VcXqL~)****
| [VOTING RIGHTS DEFENDER CONTRIBUTION: **PENDING**

NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://links.e.dccc.)

| | [**Rush $3 >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-)
---

We can't let Senator Warren's call go unanswered.

**Republicans are betting** that we'll give in to their relentless attacks on our voting rights.

**They 're betting** that we'll give up the fight to defend our democracy.

**And they 're betting** that we'll forget all of their lies about the 2020 election.

So it's on us -- _each and every grassroots Democrat across the country_ \-- to rise up and prove just how wrong they are.

****[Will you join us and chip in $3 to defend our House Majority, protect pro-voting rights House Democrats, and defeat Trump's loyalist House Republicans?](https://links.e.dccc.)****
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/yr-jf4R_)

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45670311&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4NDUzNDE3MgS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45670311&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4NDUzNDE3MgS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). Donald J. Trump September 23rd, 2021
Dear Governor Abbott,

Despite my big win in Texas, I hear Texans want an election audit! You know your fellow Texans have big questions about the November 2020 Election. Bills to audit elections in your great state's House and Senate were considered during Texas' Second Special Session. Instead, the legislature passed a watered-down amendment that doesn’t even apply to the 2020 Presidential Election. This short amendment doesn't answer the questions Texans have about the last election. Texans demand a real audit to completely address their concerns.

We need HB 16, which was just filed in the Third Special Session. This legislation specifically addresses the 2020 Presidential Election, and enables audits for future elections. The bill creates a process for candidates and party chairs to initiate an audit, and uses the same language as SB 97, which already passed the Texas State Senate, but did not have enough time to make it through the House during the Second Special Session.

Texas needs you to act now. Your Third Special Session is the perfect, and maybe last, opportunity to pass this audit bill. Time is running out. Paper ballots in your state are only kept for 22 months after the election. Your citizens don’t trust the election system, and they want your leadership on this issue, which is the number one thing they care about. It is their most important issue—one that will affect 2022 and 2024.

Governor Abbott, we need a "Forensic Audit of the 2020 Election" added to the call. We're quickly running out of time and it must be done this week. Texans know voting fraud occurred in some of their counties. Let's get to the bottom of the 2020 Presidential Election Scam!

Donald J. Trump

Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump September 23rd, 2021 The “Unselect Committee” of highly partisan politicians, a similar group that perpetrated the now proven lie of Russia, Russia, Russia, Ukraine, Ukraine, Ukraine, Impeachment Hoax #1, Impeachment Hoax #2, and many other Scams, has sent out Harassment Subpoenas on Jan. 6th so that the Government of the United States can continue wasting time while Russia, China, and virtually every other country that deals with our Nation can continue to “eat our lunch,” and laugh at the stupidity of what is going on at our Southern Border, and the worst withdrawal from a war zone by any Nation in history—all of this while the Democrats persecute and prosecute Republicans which is, together with Rigging Elections, essentially all they know how to do. We will fight the Subpoenas on Executive Privilege and other grounds, for the good of our Country, while we wait to find out whether or not Subpoenas will be sent out to Antifa and BLM for the death and destruction they have caused in tearing apart our Democrat-run cities throughout America. Hopefully the Unselect Committee will be calling witnesses on the Rigged Presidential Election of 2020, which is the primary reason that hundreds of thousands of people went to Washington, D.C. in the first place. Let the people of the United States see the real facts, which cannot happen because the Fake News refuses to write about them. The Witch Hunt will never end! In the meantime, the Democrats get away with the Russia Scam, and all of the other corruption they have perpetrated on our Country for so many years. MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump September 23rd, 2021 ICYMI: “Youngkin leads McAuliffe among likely voters: poll” Terry McAuliffe was a badly failed Governor—owned by Crooked Hillary. Read the full article by Julia Manchester with the Hill . | ---|--- Donald J. Trump September 23rd, 2021 ICYMI: “U.S. touts new project to bolster Tajik-Afghan border, as Biden abandons U.S. border wall” Do you believe this? Crazy! Read the full article by Bethany Blankley with Just the News . | ---|--- Donald J. Trump September 23rd, 2021 Dear Governor Abbott, Despite my big win in Texas, I hear Texans want an election audit! You know your fellow Texans have big questions about the November 2020 Election. Bills to audit elections in your great state's House and Senate were considered during Texas' Second Special Session. Instead, the legislature passed a watered-down amendment that doesn’t even apply to the 2020 Presidential Election. This short amendment doesn't answer the questions Texans have about the last election. Texans demand a real audit to completely address their concerns. We need HB 16, which was just filed in the Third Special Session. This legislation specifically addresses the 2020 Presidential Election, and enables audits for future elections. The bill creates a process for candidates and party chairs to initiate an audit, and uses the same language as SB 97, which already passed the Texas State Senate, but did not have enough time to make it through the House during the Second Special Session. Texas needs you to act now. Your Third Special Session is the perfect, and maybe last, opportunity to pass this audit bill. Time is running out. Paper ballots in your state are only kept for 22 months after the election. Your citizens don’t trust the election system, and they want your leadership on this issue, which is the number one thing they care about. It is their most important issue—one that will affect 2022 and 2024. Governor Abbott, we need a "Forensic Audit of the 2020 Election" added to the call. We're quickly running out of time and it must be done this week. Texans know voting fraud occurred in some of their counties. Let's get to the bottom of the 2020 Presidential Election Scam! Donald J. name: Roger Misso
subject: BREAKING: first 2022 House challenger endorsement announced!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

Here at Taking the Hill, we support veterans and military family members running for Congress - good candidates with integrity who are in tough races. We are also working to hold and expand our majority in the House - and that work flows right through the three rivers of Pittsburgh, PA.

That's why we're proud to announce _**[our first endorsement of a US House challenger in 2022](https://act.myngp.com/el/BzN5FcsjTo8dOmkYb5vWb963mxukubFlw2EoIXuGWjI=/4_GH3S3k3zqaO3RfaSiqrxKYlK2XOT5XCeuBGka_aX8=)**_ for PA-17: [_**Chris DeLuzio**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/BzN5FcsjTo8dOmkYb5vWb963mxukubFlw2EoIXuGWjI=/4_GH3S3k3zqaO3RfaSiqrxKYlK2XOT5XCeuBGka_aX8=)!

Chris is an Iraq War veteran, Naval Academy graduate, and cyber law expert who specializes in election security and voting rights. A Pittsburgh native, Chris is exactly the kind of commonsense progressive leader who can hold this seat and excel as the people's representative. And when we send Chris to Congress, we will have elected one of the finest experts and advocates for the John Lewis Voting Rights Act in the country!

Chris has dedicated his life to service of others. Now it's our turn to have his back. We want to make sure Chris has what he needs to win [_**by raising $5,000 in the next 24 hours.**_ _**Will you help us send a voting rights and election security expert to Congress by chipping in right now?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/BzN5FcsjTo8dOmkYb5vWb963mxukubFlw2EoIXuGWjI=/4_GH3S3k3zqaO3RfaSiqrxKYlK2XOT5XCeuBGka_aX8=)

[_****_](https://act.myngp.com/el/BzN5FcsjTo8dOmkYb5vWb963mxukubFlw2EoIXuGWjI=/4_GH3S3k3zqaO3RfaSiqrxKYlK2XOT5XCeuBGka_aX8=)

We are hard at work EARLY to make sure we are victorious next November. We appreciate your support as we win this together!

Yours in service,
Roger

_Roger Misso
Executive Director

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Do you Back the Blue?
body:
Sign my petition to defend the police The brave men and women of our local law enforcement agencies need to know: **We are still with them! **We haven't forgotten the difficult job they do. We haven't forgotten that they put their lives on the line every day.And even though the liberals in Congress are trying to defund their departments and disrespect their life's work,**there are still those of us who are grateful! **Will you add your name to my **Defend The Police petition?** [ADD YOUR NAME - Back The Blue](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctjitkd-yddjllujiu-r/) **Sadly, Wisconsin is on the front lines of this fight.** Last year, the riots in Kenosha put us in the national news. Today, murders in Milwaukee have us once again in a shameful spotlight. This was from the _Los Angeles Times_ this week: [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctjitkd-yddjllujiu-j/) **_"_** Milwaukee is in the grip of the worst violence in its modern history. There were 189 killings here last year, a 93% increase from 2019 and the most ever recorded." [SIGN HERE >> Show You Support Law Enforcement](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctjitkd-yddjllujiu-t/) I can't wait to show my hostile anti-cop colleagues in Congress the overwhelming level of respect most Americans have for those public servants who put their lives on the line to keep us safe. **[Are you with us?](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctjitkd-yddjllujiu-i/)** -Glenn Grothman [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctjitkd-yddjllujiu-d/) [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctjitkd-yddjllujiu-h/) | Glenn Grothman for Congress
P.O. Box 1215
Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman [Unsubscribe](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-u-ctjitkd-yddjllujiu-k/)

name: American Update
subject: Will this “Attack on America” be revealed Oct 13th?
body:
What exactly is going on, and what has these two successful and wealthy men so concerned? [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8710%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=79IX%2bkdK7VWn14F6Dvlgew&sysid=1)
# Watch What the Government Says on October 13th
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04921%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PAtZiz4WuZrhB9k0vWFHuQ&sysid=1 "Alarming prediction about October 13")
Billionaire John Catsimatidis made his money by focusing on two areas of life that affect nearly every American, every single day...
_Groceries and real estate._
And not long ago, Catsimatidis went public with an alarming prediction...
He says a huge shift is looming in the U.S. economy and financial system, which will reveal itself in a dramatic way, this October.
[**(_To see why Catsimatidis is so concerned, click here._)**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04922%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f%2b842wKxg%2few61%2bhqwEfBA&sysid=1)
In fact, on Wednesday, October 13, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern time, the U.S. Federal Government will issue its next report on what Catsimatidis says is essentially an, "attack on America."
A wealthy former Goldman Sachs banker named Dr. David Eifrig agrees with Catsimatidis and says:
> Most Americans are completely unprepared for [**what's about to take place in our country.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04923%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K21y26o%2bQA2mDQpRjPhFbA&sysid=1)
Dr. Eifrig adds:
> This is not surprising, since roughly half the U.S. population was born AFTER 1981, and we simply haven't seen anything like this in roughly 50 years.
[**What exactly is going on, and what has these two successful and wealthy men so concerned?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04924%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AjdHDAcMJ8ho42yKeSuW8g&sysid=1)
Well, Dr. David Eifrig has just issued a detailed and urgent warning... what he calls a "Final Wake-Up Call," for any American who cares about their money, finances, or retirement.
In his latest analysis [**(_to view it on our website click here_)**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04935%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vICe%2feUnUXF1gRnCe5NUaQ&sysid=1), Dr. Eifrig explains exactly what's going on in America... why John Catsimidis is so concerned about this coming October... and four (4) steps that he recommends every American should take right now.
Get the facts for yourself today.
The worst thing you can do is to sit idly by, and do nothing.
We've posted Dr. Eifrig's full, brand-new analysis on our website. [**You can view it free of charge (including his 4 recommended steps), right here.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04936%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pHr49ecC9uRbPWS8VIQZFw&sysid=1)
Sincerely,
Mike Palmer
Founding Partner, Stansberry Research

Sent from: American Update | 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[www.americanupdate.com](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04937%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yk25GzJUmsg9lfl0igsekg&sysid=1)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I need $34 today. Let me tell you why.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I wore jersey number 34 throughout my career. I’ve switched fields, and now I need YOU to step up and donate $34 to help me bu
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zavel12gr4fp57nbdsji18ckgppcdvolk3hmvfa0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpn6s5nmsr6at35clge8clhemrj6d5lc8obecljelieed1l6qpr6cj0s1ge4cpn6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3im9j3appl69jreor664ob4ohme8gq48bi4bh28or6c9gm1ob0sphm49fg)
I wore jersey number 34 throughout my career. I've switched fields, and now I need YOU to step up and donate $34 to help me build out a winning campaign. |
---
Fellow Conservative,

Throughout my football career, I wore jersey number 34. It holds a special place in my heart.

I first wore 34 during my college football days at the University of Georgia, and I continued to wear it professionally until my very last NFL game with the Dallas Cowboys.

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8l6n7h5ftk600pi6u7cik5gihbfekka3m5v2ma8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c5ge2o76cdh2bs)
For me, 34 isn't just a number - it's part of who I am. It's more than a number on the jerseys I used to wear - I like to think of 34 as an old friend.

In my career as a football player, folks became accustomed to seeing 34 leap across the goal line. **[Now in my campaign for the U.S. Senate, I'm going to use 34 to rally support for our shared conservative values as I work to defeat the liberal Democrat I'm running to unseat.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmsac8ieag6h7tjp29euss7jh1c1lmhof77ba95o_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c5ge2o76cdh2bs)**

My opponent has amassed a war chest of over **TEN MILLION DOLLARS.** If I'm going to flip this seat RED, I've got to be able to match his fundraising prowess. That's why I'm asking you to make a special $34 contribution today to my campaign to help me level the political playing field.

[** Join Team Herschel
Chip in $34 -> **](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmrpl34cv0frt98290vffh25lmfn61kqpimtpei8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c5ge2o76cdh2bs)
I hope that as we move forward together in this campaign, you'll come to associate the number 34 with victory, as I have over my career.

We have a lot of work ahead of us if we're going to return a Republican majority to the Senate and _actually_ build a better America for hard-working families.

My opponent and national Democrats are leading the nation down the wrong path, undoing some of the great work Republicans have done in the last few years.

And the thing is, millions of liberals are making donations to their campaigns because Democrats are spinning tales of a eutopia that they can't deliver now - or ever - despite throwing TRILLIONS of dollars to fix issues they don't understand.

I have what it takes to WIN the tough fights, **[but I need your help.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5qq1vp1201ct4be93h102th53crrkur7693gp4o_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c5ge2o76cdh2bs)** The future of Georgia and our country depends on what conservatives, like yourself, do today. **[So, if you can, please consider a gift of $34 if you can.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0i90pfa5sovga0grhlj2kn3v01pj4h8tudguseo_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c5ge2o76cdh2bs)**

[** Join Team Herschel
Chip in $34 -> **](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7bdnok2lacifboklljst58smo4fa1luceu076d8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c5ge2o76cdh2bs)
The Senate majority may come down to who wins in Georgia, so I hope you will consider supporting my campaign. There's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines.

I hope to hear from you soon.

Sincerely,

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztbr684ovd62oqqc2p6sm7fedp9i624edouutag0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c5ge2o76cdh2bs)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

P.S. **[I hope you will stand with me by donating $34 today. But if that's too much for you this month, would you consider $20, $10, or even $3.40?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfpfc86rgvv5hjmucjl7fj3u577vng96alkcnqe8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c5ge2o76cdh2bs)** As important as the money is, I also want to know you're with me. I've switched fields, and now I need YOU to step up and donate $34 to help me build out a winning campaign. | Fellow Conservative, Throughout my football career, I wore jersey number 34. It holds a special place in my heart. I first wore 34 during my college football days at the University of Georgia, and I continued to wear it professionally until my very last NFL game with the Dallas Cowboys. For me, 34 isn't just a number - it's part of who I am. It's more than a number on the jerseys I used to wear - I like to think of 34 as an old friend. In my career as a football player, folks became accustomed to seeing 34 leap across the goal line. My opponent has amassed a war chest of over TEN MILLION DOLLARS. If I'm going to flip this seat RED, I've got to be able to match his fundraising prowess. That's why I'm asking you to make a special $34 contribution today to my campaign to help me level the political playing field. I hope that as we move forward together in this campaign, you'll come to associate the number 34 with victory, as I have over my career. We have a lot of work ahead of us if we're going to return a Republican majority to the Senate and actually build a better America for hard-working families. My opponent and national Democrats are leading the nation down the wrong path, undoing some of the great work Republicans have done in the last few years. And the thing is, millions of liberals are making donations to their campaigns because Democrats are spinning tales of a eutopia that they can't deliver now - or ever - despite throwing TRILLIONS of dollars to fix issues they don't understand. I have what it takes to WIN the tough fights, The future of Georgia and our country depends on what conservatives, like yourself, do today. The Senate majority may come down to who wins in Georgia, so I hope you will consider supporting my campaign. There's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines. I hope to hear from you soon. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. As important as the money is, I also want to know you're with me. name: Michigan Polling Update
subject: BREAKING: shocking new poll for Whitmer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58399493:6T0vQl2NE:m:1:3253819041:8C10C51736CC6DF4953D6DF196C0AD28:r) Peter, **It 's official: Gretchen Whitmer has a challenger for Michigan Governor that has the Democrats shaking in their boots.** _**After only a few days in the race, he 's already TIED with her in the general election!**_ So who is this candidate? He's someone who is not a politician. Someone who has a record of serving the people of Michigan and getting real results. Someone even the Detroit News is talking about as a challenger that will leave the Democrats flat-footed.
**It 's Chief James Craig, the former Detroit police chief and Michigan's next governor!**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58399493:6T0vQl2NE:m:1:3253819041:8C10C51736CC6DF4953D6DF196C0AD28:r) Here's what the latest numbers show about the state of the race:
* The Chief has a commanding **30 point lead in the Republican primary.**
* He's currently **tied with Gretchen Whitmer in the general election** , just days after his official campaign launch.
* And the polling shows that the more voters get to know him, the more they support him.

The data is clear - the Chief's position in this race is strong and getting stronger. We can win in Michigan!
**The Left is terrified of his candidacy - it's why they sent mobs of left-wing protesters to try and crash his launch event last week.** And they should be terrified! Let us tell you a little bit about why his entry into the race this month is turning heads across Michigan... and across the country.
Before he had even declared that he was running, Tucker Carlson invited Chief Craig on his show. They talked about why Michigan needs real leadership - and you should see what Tucker had to say about his time leading the Detroit Police Department through the unrest of 2020: _" When the crisis came, you rose to it. And your city didn't burn... when it came down to it, you kept it safe. And I think that really matters."_ [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58399493:6T0vQl2NE:m:1:3253819041:8C10C51736CC6DF4953D6DF196C0AD28:r) His 40+ years serving as a police officer taught him a lot about leadership - and a lot about the importance of law and order. See, the Chief grew up in Detroit during the '67 riots, seeing tanks rolling down the streets and snipers on the roofs. He was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened. The police retreated, and let their city burn. He saw that happen. **Since he 's been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated.**
When he came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky. The Chief started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. He made it an example. The police mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, they cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. That is leading from the front. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58399493:6T0vQl2NE:m:1:3253819041:8C10C51736CC6DF4953D6DF196C0AD28:r) Then, the Chief went into the city and met with every group he could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do. So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, **_Detroit did not burn_**.
Leadership - real leadership - matters. Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite. No "rules for thee, not for me!" Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?
Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.
You don't see much of that out there. **That 's why he crisscrossed the state this month, announcing his candidacy for Governor of Michigan.** Will you stand with the Chief against Gretchen Whitmer? [**LEAD FROM THE FRONT WITH CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58399493:6T0vQl2NE:m:1:3253819041:8C10C51736CC6DF4953D6DF196C0AD28:r) Sometimes people are surprised to hear that the Chief is a Republican. He grew up a Democrat. But then he watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. He watched as they pushed handouts that increased dependency on the government for political gain. **And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT his values. He voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.** _**And we 're pretty sure you can guess HIS position on "Defund the Police!"**_ Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters. And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front. **Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join us in supporting Chief James Craig for Governor?** _**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**_ [**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58399493:6T0vQl2NE:m:1:3253819041:8C10C51736CC6DF4953D6DF196C0AD28:r) [**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58399494:6T0vQl2NE:m:1:3253819041:8C10C51736CC6DF4953D6DF196C0AD28:r) [**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58399495:6T0vQl2NE:m:1:3253819041:8C10C51736CC6DF4953D6DF196C0AD28:r) [**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58399496:6T0vQl2NE:m:1:3253819041:8C10C51736CC6DF4953D6DF196C0AD28:r) [**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58399497:6T0vQl2NE:m:1:3253819041:8C10C51736CC6DF4953D6DF196C0AD28:r) __**If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**__ | |
---
- Chief James Craig Team
---
Contributions to Chief James Craig for Governor are not deductible for Federal income tax purposes. No corporate contribution checks or cash please. State law requires political committees to use their best efforts to obtain and report the name, mailing address, employer and occupation for each individual whose contributions exceed $100 in an election cycle. Individual contributors may donate up to the maximum of $7,150 during an election cycle.

There’s a lot you already know about Scott Franklin (because you’ve been reading all of our wonderful, educational, helpful emails — which, again, thank you):
* Voted to overturn a free and fair election
* Voted (like, three days ago) to shut down the government for purely partisan reasons
* Anti-choice, loathes the idea of letting people do what they please with their own bodies
* Voted against an infrastructure package that would: provide paid leave to help parents and caretakers recover from illness or care for family members; expand Medicare to help more people access good, affordable healthcare; invest in education to give our kids more equitable opportunities; address climate change to help us all not die; and a million other things

C’mon, Scott, do better!
(He won’t, so we’ll replace him).
But did you _also_ know that Mr. Franklin is _one of the weakest fundraisers_ among House GOP freshmen? And did you know that our campaign, in just our first 24 hours, raised about half as much as Scott had raised all year?
Let us put that another way: **We can win this race.**
To do so, we’re gonna have to keep our foot (feet?) on the gas, and we’re gonna need all the help we can get from grassroots supporters like you and your mom.
**The end-of-quarter deadline coming up at the end of this month is our first big test, and will be the first time our fundraising numbers are made public —[ _can you pitch in whatever you’re able to help us show the strength behind Eddie’s campaign to flip FL-15?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36343147/307840099/-847830491?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210924eoq1_TE_all_ftr_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTNhODIyMy0zMzFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lOsHuFYS0XT2s17fThSzuEmQ0BDZrD0ADGFvcBLzhrA=)**

clean_body: Let's cut right to it today, friend: Do you want to flip this House seat for Democrats in 2022 and hold Scott Franklin accountable for his failed leadership? | | = Let's cut right to it today, friend: Do you want to flip this House seat for Democrats in 2022 and hold Scott Franklin accountable for his failed leadership? = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = There’s a lot you already know about Scott Franklin (because you’ve been reading all of our wonderful, educational, helpful emails — which, again, thank you): Voted to overturn a free and fair election Voted (like, three days ago) to shut down the government for purely partisan reasons Anti-choice, loathes the idea of letting people do what they please with their own bodies Voted against an infrastructure package that would: provide paid leave to help parents and caretakers recover from illness or care for family members; expand Medicare to help more people access good, affordable healthcare; invest in education to give our kids more equitable opportunities; address climate change to help us all not die; and a million other things C’mon, Scott, do better! (He won’t, so we’ll replace him). But did you also know that Mr. Franklin is one of the weakest fundraisers among House GOP freshmen? And did you know that our campaign, in just our first 24 hours, raised about half as much as Scott had raised all year? Let us put that another way: We can win this race. To do so, we’re gonna have to keep our foot (feet?) on the gas, and we’re gonna need all the help we can get from grassroots supporters like you and your mom. The end-of-quarter deadline coming up at the end of this month is our first big test, and will be the first time our fundraising numbers are made public —= **** = Thanks, Team Eddie | Eddie Geller is an activist, millennial, and former comedian running to bring real representation to the people of Florida's 15th District, and flip a longtime Republican seat in the process. As your Congressman, he’ll fight for the issues that matter most to Floridians: good-paying jobs, affordable health care, fighting the climate crisis, and defending our democracy. Chip in now to help Eddie's campaign flip FL-15 blue! | = | PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS Eddie Geller for Congress P.O. Terry’s opponent says he’s proud to have Donald Trump’s endorsement. He even added “Donald Trump represents so much of why I’m running.”

And he’s putting his money where his mouth is. He has supported Donald Trump’s anti-democratic conspiracy theories and pushed an agenda of restricting voter access.

On the other hand, Terry is a champion for our freedom to vote. As Governor, he restored voting rights to more people than any other Governor in history. He fought hard to make sure Virginia was one of the most welcoming, inclusive and forward-looking places in the country. But if Terry’s opponent wins, he’ll take the Commonwealth backwards.

**In state after state across the country, we have seen that governors play a large role in determining whether access is restricted or expanded. We must hold the line in Virginia to protect and expand progress.**

So here is the deal: if we do our part to elect Terry in Virginia, we can send a message to the entire country that our Democracy is stronger than ever. We can demonstrate that candidates who support voter suppression and Donald Trump’s big lie will be met with a groundswell of grassroots resistance.

**[Please, donate to Terry’s campaign right now and become a part of his historic movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36343545/307840970/-2023814932?refcode=20210924.2_SA_9EY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmYxNmE0OS0zNDFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Epn-fSRJwg0RCYBpfirevSG2DAVdonDuGCGyqvAfhsc=)**

I’m counting on you, Derek.

Stacey Abrams

name: Abby Nassif-Murphy, ConorLamb.com
subject: Don't fall for the distractions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36344088/307843235/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjg4ZWI1My0zNzFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7foeEpXrgbomT3oeeIISLYjESXqiLU-IAiElR1RBGuw=)

Friend,

If you've watched the news at all this month, you know exactly why Conor is in this race. We _have_ to flip this seat and expand our majority, otherwise, we'll keep seeing more Republican attacks on our most basic rights and principles.

**They've come for the right to choose. They've come for our voting rights. Now, they're even coming for our _personal information_ in a sham election audit, just to please Donald Trump and his enablers. When will it end?**

These are nothing more than distractions -- our opponents are moving the conversation away from providing jobs and affordable health care because they're all out of ideas, and they've decided that if they can't win, they're going to try and drag us down with them.

But we won't let them.

This election isn't just about Pennsylvania, it's about laying another brick in the wall and fortifying our democracy -- and _Conor is the leader we can count on to win._ If you agree, we need your help. This month is our first-ever quarterly fundraising deadline, and you already know the stakes -- all eyes will be on us to see if this campaign has the muscle to take on the GOP.

**[Here's the thing: Conor's already beaten Trump's minions three times, and he'll do it again --_but only if we show up to help him._ Can you help out? Chip in $5 to help Conor Lamb lay the groundwork to win this race and protect our democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36344089/307843236/773704285?refcode=em21_210924_eoq2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjg4ZWI1My0zNzFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7foeEpXrgbomT3oeeIISLYjESXqiLU-IAiElR1RBGuw=)**

Thanks for your support,

clean_body: | = Friend, If you've watched the news at all this month, you know exactly why Conor is in this race. We have to flip this seat and expand our majority, otherwise, we'll keep seeing more Republican attacks on our most basic rights and principles. They've come for the right to choose. They've come for our voting rights. Now, they're even coming for our personal information in a sham election audit, just to please Donald Trump and his enablers. When will it end? These are nothing more than distractions -- our opponents are moving the conversation away from providing jobs and affordable health care because they're all out of ideas, and they've decided that if they can't win, they're going to try and drag us down with them. But we won't let them. This election isn't just about Pennsylvania, it's about laying another brick in the wall and fortifying our democracy -- and Conor is the leader we can count on to win. If you agree, we need your help. This month is our first-ever quarterly fundraising deadline, and you already know the stakes -- all eyes will be on us to see if this campaign has the muscle to take on the GOP. = Thanks for your support, Abby Nassif-Murphy Campaign Manager Conor Lamb for Senate = *

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Dangerous, Dangerous Territory
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58400682:JpDFsl2nN:m:1:3103520637:0B0C9A950CF2D206FD73D71FA4288F13:r "RESIGN") Peter, The top members of the Biden Administration are completely incompetent. **For the good of the nation, I am demanding that Secretary of State Antony Blinken, National Security Adviser Jake Sullivan, and Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin resign their positions - effective immediately.** This is dangerous territory we are in, and that's why I'm stepping up to protect this great nation. **Until they resign, I will not consent to any nominee for the Department of Defense or the Department of State that requires Senate approval.** [
**_See for yourself._**](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58400682:JpDFsl2nN:m:1:3103520637:0B0C9A950CF2D206FD73D71FA4288F13:r "Video") **[If you agree that we need to take a stand against the dangerous actions of the Biden Administration before something worse occurs, then please join me in this fight TODAY!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58400682:JpDFsl2nN:m:1:3103520637:0B0C9A950CF2D206FD73D71FA4288F13:r "If
you agree that we need to take a stand against the dangerous actions of the Biden Administration before something worse occurs, then please join me in
this fight TODAY!")** We live in serious times, and we need serious adults in our government. Unfortunately, Joe Biden doesn't understand that - he has been in Washington for too long and only sees these positions as rewards for his liberal buddies in the Democrat Party. **That is unacceptable.** _Sadly, my call for competence in our government officials continues to draw the wrath of the media and the DC Swamp._ When I dared to question the 2020 election and the power of Big Tech over speech in America, the swamp sent reporters to the small town in Missouri I grew up in. They tracked down people I went to middle school with, to dig up dirt on me. **They even tracked down my prom date.** Sadly, I am not kidding. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58400682:JpDFsl2nN:m:1:3103520637:0B0C9A950CF2D206FD73D71FA4288F13:r "Headline") Like I've said all along, we need serious adults in Washington who can appreciate the severity of the national security threats we face and will take the appropriate actions to safeguard our nation. More importantly, we need leaders who will follow the Constitution, not some partisan handbook or talking points. Thanks to the support of patriots like you, I will continue this mission until we have our nation on the right course. No matter how the left attacks me, I am guided by my faith in God, my family and the principles our Founding Fathers espoused in our Constitution. **[I need you to ACT TODAY and help me take a stand against the Biden Administration before it's too late. The left will use this as another opportunity to continue their baseless smears against me and that's why I humbly ask for your financial support of $50, $100 or even $1,000.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58400683:JpDFsl2nN:m:1:3103520637:0B0C9A950CF2D206FD73D71FA4288F13:r "I need you to ACT TODAY and help me take a stand against the
Biden Administration before it’s too late. The left will use this as another opportunity to continue their baseless smears against me and
that’s why I humbly ask for your financial support of $50, $100 or even $1,000.")** **[Any amount from $5 to the Federal Maximum Amount of $2,900 is greatly appreciated.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58400682:JpDFsl2nN:m:1:3103520637:0B0C9A950CF2D206FD73D71FA4288F13:r "Any amount from $5 to the Federal Maximum Amount of $2,900 is
greatly appreciated.")** The recent events in Afghanistan, Joe Biden's unconstitutional mandates, as well as other items coming to light, dictate the need for a major course correction first. We cannot allow the cancel culture or any kind of bullying to stop us from safeguarding our nation. I love this nation too much to give up. **[Will you help me?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58400682:JpDFsl2nN:m:1:3103520637:0B0C9A950CF2D206FD73D71FA4288F13:r "Will you help me?")** God Bless America, [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58400682:JpDFsl2nN:m:1:3103520637:0B0C9A950CF2D206FD73D71FA4288F13:r "Josh Hawley") Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri | | [STAND WITH JOSH](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58400682:JpDFsl2nN:m:1:3103520637:0B0C9A950CF2D206FD73D71FA4288F13:r "STAND WITH JOSH")

subject: Stand with President Biden [re: COVID-19 vaccines]
body:
Biden knows how to end the pandemic
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | **Sign: ["I stand with President Biden on vaccinations!"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d9e5d62-c1df-496a-82d6-e81dcdf9ba7b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** President Biden recently announced his plan to curb the Delta variant and end this pandemic once and for all, and it includes reasonable requirements for vaccination and/or testing. But the haters are coming out of the woodworks -- they can’t stand that Biden is doing his job, apparently. [The key to ending this pandemic is getting as many people vaccinated as possible, as quickly as possible. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teeedbc11-8bc1-4371-9b16-2ea9c8d10224/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Biden understands that. We understand that. But his right-wing haters clearly failed 4th grade science and refuse to get a lifesaving vaccine. [So please stand up to the haters and stand with President Biden on vaccinations → ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1408cdee-1138-48f0-b912-453a286d1aef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Roger Marshall
subject: America’s heroes deserve better
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL
body:
| |
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/4a6e28d979784207/a17a4f99359b3f9cc3d6b838967d376c)
|
---
# ** — America’s heroes should not be treated as felons simply because they refuse the COVID vaccine. My new bill will make sure that can't happen.**

---
But that’s exactly what Joe Biden and his tyrannical administration are calling for.

__**You read that right:**__ he wants to strip our servicemen and women of their dignity and all the rights they’re entitled to simply for making their own medical decisions.
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/4a6e28d979784207/d945e48ab6ebf31cc3d6b838967d376c)
This is un-American — and it must be stopped.

**That’s exactly why I’ve introduced a new bill that reverses Joe Biden’s disastrous decision.**

[**Senators Ted Cruz, James Lankford, and Tommy Tuberville have already signed on to my new bill — but we need at least 5,000 new Citizen Co-Sponsors to add their names to this bill and show radial DC Liberals that ordinary Americans will always defend those who defend freedom.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/4a6e28d979784207/4321b160b9ef01bec3d6b838967d376c)

I’m a physician and a veteran — and I’m confident the vaccine has saved countless lives. But I also believe that receiving the vaccine should be a personal choice between an individual and their doctor.

[**Please add your name to our list of Citizen Co-Sponsors of my new bill RIGHT NOW to send a clear message to Joe Biden: America’s heroes do not deserve to be dishonorably discharged.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/4a6e28d979784207/11e95977bfd6d6a0c3d6b838967d376c)
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/4a6e28d979784207/7ba0ed429ffdae98c3d6b838967d376c)
Senator Roger Marshall
[**CO-SPONSOR THE BILL »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/4a6e28d979784207/a40ac93f12fe0b13c3d6b838967d376c)
|
---
|
---

Doc is defending life. He's standing for our jobs, our families, and our faith.

**He's taking our Kansas values to the U.S. Senate, but he can't get it done without your help.**

We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference.

However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694&c=37973&jid=4a6e28d979784207&d=112239b3ec06262ec3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694&c=37973&jid=4a6e28d979784207).
This message was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by:
Kansans for Marshall
PO Box 1588
Great Bend, KS 67530

PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL

name: Tonette Walker on behalf of Team Rubicon
subject: Helping our Afghan allies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward USA Federal Political Action Committee
body:
We are sending you this special message on behalf of our friends
at Team Rubicon, who are working day and night to help resettle
Afghan refugees and could use your help and support.

Tonette Walker

Peter,

Scott and I have been deeply troubled as we learned of the
disaster in Afghanistan. It is painful to watch and read the
news.

When he was Governor, Scott visited Kabul and the Bagram Airfield
to see the troops before Christmas. The images of the Taliban
rushing in to take over the country while American citizens,
allies, and those who worked with our military were trying to get
out hit home.

It is horrible how the Biden Administration messed up. Thousands
have fled the abuse of the Taliban. Many of them are right here
in Wisconsin at Fort McCoy. Most of them came here with little
more than their clothes when they got on a plane.

Without a doubt, Scott has raised concerns about the vetting
process. But, of course, we all want to be sure that we know who
is here and that they are legitimate refugees.

We also know that so many of the people who fled Afghanistan were
fearful of persecution. Many of them because they assisted our
military personnel and others because they are Christians. They
need our help. We want to tell you about one organization that
is leading efforts to provide relief to them.

Team Rubicon is a veteran-led nonprofit organization that
utilizes the skills and experiences of military veterans with
first responders to deploy emergency response teams rapidly.
Founded in 2010, Team Rubicon has deployed across the United
States and worldwide to provide immediate relief to those
impacted by disasters and humanitarian crises.

Team Rubicon has the highest scores on Charity Navigator (5 out
of 5 stars) and Charity Navigator (A rating). In addition to
helping at Fort McCoy, they prioritize needs in locations
dictated by the U.S. Department of State and Department of
Defense. Their humanitarian and disaster response work is 100%
fueled by donations and carried out by veteran-led teams of
volunteers.

If you'd like to join us in helping our Afghan allies, you can
make a financial donation to Team Rubicon here.
http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58854336:WiEovjHtN:m:3:1155937413:139D89A3F08FC9A8B8BDB0715B08D60D:r

If you'd like to donate items, see the list here.
http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58854337:WiEovjHtN:m:3:1155937413:139D89A3F08FC9A8B8BDB0715B08D60D:r

Thank you for taking the time to consider this vital work. We
wish the Biden Administration had done better planning before
they pulled our troops out of Afghanistan.

So many of these people were there for our troops when they
needed help and support. They need our help.

I appreciate your consideration. May God bless our men and women
in uniform, and may God continue to bless America.

Tonette Walker
Former First Lady of Wisconsin

Paid for by Forward USA Federal Political Action Committee.
8383 Greenway Blvd, Suite 600, Middleton, WI 53562.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Scott Walker's online community.

Can you help me with something, Derek?

Our fundraising deadline is coming up, and we’re at a real risk of missing our goal. It's critical that we build a strong foundation to show the strength of this campaign, but right now, we're still $10,000 behind.

With top Republicans laser-focused on my race, we can't afford to fall short of any goal. News outlets across the country are predicting that this race will be one of the most expensive Senate races in Granite State history – **Republicans have already spent over $2 million on false ads against me, and that's just the tip of the iceberg.**

Between now and November 2022, GOP interest groups and dark money super PACs will pump hundreds of millions of dollars into New Hampshire in an effort to unseat me and take back the Senate. In 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes, making it one of the closest races in history, and now some experts are calling my Senate seat the most vulnerable in the country.

**[That's why I’m humbly asking you for help. If we're going to defend our Senate majority, it will take a grassroots effort from people like you, Derek. Will you please split $15 today between my team and Common Good VA to help us hit our goal?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGFL7wQvJlY0GjVnSFZeNWktd5GYitWKqKPZhQj0lN5KPYTIhKExjmjdbl5sPaNNEuQw4CNOmfTIyHzAIZD58EQXn1NWY4xgOD4nV4s0KiRpgfQpfsw9mXXnNnkN6wMShb9sLrTzTbzND5ZYE1peO3rQh1UqcCmD3AYhPk231mnXq20I0q9VUr-Ixpa5l9mU59XjNsx5NjekIGgeGZSTnpJX5gqeZdc752XnvBCMwr7SWaB8FZAw2LM6sSfpA1jUo-77BPk19x3fy_9dJYOuIBhUaXy8amWDUZTcccBk56QmY8UwfZUAPOQQAWa6mRO0Xsez9oo7j5ZTpM_oiQ3PbOjI03R5r8tdkJWGP5tq4qhQ/3fl/xC_NwE7UTGi7tNIVpNBkqQ/h1/r9Wx1J98DVOL5FybsszkbtMmI2VUBZ9pkNrVGmXmDC8)** **[ Donate $15 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGFL7wQvJlY0GjVnSFZeNWktd5GYitWKqKPZhQj0lN5KPYTIhKExjmjdbl5sPaNNEzAb71wlRgj_efJh3f9EtIk9WZ3CD6L1cL06XMjqwPgU5Y5SQQHOAzjKCNuzFixAqmfwUT9nU-2EUgLMFwzsdK-qxGlzBKFKmr0LQbSs8KuTdqrGuBuLDIUW9oLpNAqJGWLk-dJMykuunvS7sLIc6nxm9ZLyvgO_paPvYOWpNHwRBAeX4NyKlAuaE6ATgL6OELq35RlU9s7ODlpxOXy3jLL2AlkYK9_bRJSCTtBkmlpxJYqoieK4GlKGdmzgSMncRYpBuiuOfbVBqGyWHutQqprUZdXuD0-TragaPX05xYH0/3fl/xC_NwE7UTGi7tNIVpNBkqQ/h2/sWAMq38abpa_7yZKvH2TKqAtGSBpr2tbL4RaZfJCXTk)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hi friends, I wanted to touch base and update you on what I've been doing across New Hampshire over the past weeks. I’ve been meeting with Granite Staters on everything from mental health care to paid family and medical leave, and I also had the chance to discuss how Senate Democrats are delivering for New Hampshire. With our majority, we've been able to pass critical legislation like the American Rescue Plan, helping to support small businesses, lower health care costs, and deliver tax cuts for families. We're also working hard to get the bipartisan infrastructure package over the finish line. This legislation will provide historic investments in roads and bridges, high-speed internet, and clean water and energy. Hearing about the issues that matter most to the people of New Hampshire is a vital part of my job. And I want to hear from you too. **[Will you take a moment to fill out our short priorities survey? Your answers will help us focus on what matters most in this crucial race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36353141/307877946/-594564005?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YThiZGZiMS00MzFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IiwbIx0LKoEdeOGmSNCwpQekp8ExXSR0YgEuv5U_kHs=&emci=a82004ce-3c1d-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=9a8bdfb1-431d-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=5452893)** | | [Take our survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36353142/307877947/-594564005?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YThiZGZiMS00MzFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IiwbIx0LKoEdeOGmSNCwpQekp8ExXSR0YgEuv5U_kHs=&emci=a82004ce-3c1d-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=9a8bdfb1-431d-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=5452893)
---
While Republican super PACs are funneling dark money into our state in an attempt to buy this seat, my team and I are remaining focused on you, friend. **[Your feedback is vital to this people-powered campaign. So please, take a minute (or two, tops!) and tell me what matters to you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36353143/307877948/-594564005?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YThiZGZiMS00MzFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IiwbIx0LKoEdeOGmSNCwpQekp8ExXSR0YgEuv5U_kHs=&emci=a82004ce-3c1d-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=9a8bdfb1-431d-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=5452893)**
Thank you for your time.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
P.S. I can't express how much this election matters. If Mitch McConnell regains majority control of the Senate, he will undo all of the progress Democrats have made and block any of Biden’s nominees to the Supreme Court. **[With our big FEC deadline just days away, can I count on you to chip in today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36353145/307877950/-1669436104?refcode=e20210924_eoq3-survey&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YThiZGZiMS00MzFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IiwbIx0LKoEdeOGmSNCwpQekp8ExXSR0YgEuv5U_kHs=)**

name: Critical House Race Alert
subject: This seat could make or break our Democratic House majority
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Stephanie Murphy for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36353343/307878981/-1065962055?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmFlMmIyZC00NDFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5AmPSEwph4dDWtcgRxDJRF0EzFXduvIEbQeEUJCTfOc=&emci=a0d1c896-f11a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=cbae2b2d-441d-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=20387125)

| | Friend, ever since Stephanie Murphy flipped our central Florida district blue by defeating a powerful, two-decade incumbent, Republicans have been _desperate_ to get their revenge.

So far, they’ve failed every time. **But this year, Republicans are hoping to use newly drawn maps and voter suppression to stack the deck against Stephanie, take control of our district, and flip the House red.**

**[_Simply put, this is going to be Stephanie’s toughest reelection fight yet, so we’ll need to pull out all the stops to fight back. name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: hate this part
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
I said from day one that we’re not taking a dime from corporate PACs
#

Friend,
Honestly, fundraising is the worst part of running for office. I hate it. You hate it.
But will you please let me explain why it's so important?
[(And then I hope you’ll pitch in a few bucks to put us in a strong position for our upcoming FEC fundraising deadline.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36354890/307885123/-353695395?refcode2=dadeeb15-481d-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&refcode=em210924-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWRlZWIxNS00ODFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qVM8UKsxZkOBddWWgCsaTVsab6Y43bZbMxJJP3qIY_w=)
In less than a week, we'll close the books on this fundraising quarter. And after we do that, we're legally required to publicly report how much money we've raised.
That's a good thing! Transparency is so important for our democracy.
But it also means everyone watching our race will know exactly how much money we've got and where it came from.
Then they'll use what's in our public report to determine the strength of our movement to deliver a government and democracy that works for working people.
So we set a goal to reach 15,000 grassroots contributions for the quarter.
That's a number that will show everyone how serious we are about our fight to build a government that actually works for working people.
**It's a big goal, but it's one that I know we can hit if everyone pitches in. So, here's the part where I have to make that fundraising ask:**
[Can you make your first contribution to fuel our movement today? We need to bring in a lot of donations by our federally mandated deadline next week, and every contribution, no matter the size, goes a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36354892/307885124/-353695395?refcode2=dadeeb15-481d-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&refcode=em210924-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWRlZWIxNS00ODFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qVM8UKsxZkOBddWWgCsaTVsab6Y43bZbMxJJP3qIY_w=)

**[Donate **[Donate other amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36354897/307885130/-353695395?refcode2=dadeeb15-481d-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&refcode=em210924-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWRlZWIxNS00ODFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qVM8UKsxZkOBddWWgCsaTVsab6Y43bZbMxJJP3qIY_w=)**
I said from day one of this race that we’re not taking a dime from corporate PACs, their lobbyists, or the fossil fuel industry.
And I’m incredibly proud of that. You should be, too.
I know it can be hard to imagine that what we do today will make such a big impact in an election that’s months away, but it’s true. That’s why your contribution is so important.
Thanks so much for your support.
Malcolm

subject: BREAKING: Our race just got DOWNGRADED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
This is a toss-up!
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36356388/307891960/-2023814932?refcode=20210824.3_MHQ_9RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmQ0NzIyZS00YTFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wdN0e5zjs2tSWanZ_Boc_uwg51Z67SIYWng3DPj9bg4=)

| | **BREAKING:_The Cook Political Report_ DOWNGRADES Virginia governor’s race to TOSS-UP**

“As National Environment Sours For Democrats, Virginia Governor Moves to Toss Up”
_– The Cook Political Report, 9/24/21_ | [Chip in to turn this around immediately →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36356390/307891974/-2023814932?refcode=20210824.3_MHQ_9RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmQ0NzIyZS00YTFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wdN0e5zjs2tSWanZ_Boc_uwg51Z67SIYWng3DPj9bg4=)
---
Derek, for months, virtually every poll of the Virginia Governor’s race showed Terry either ahead or tied with Glenn Youngkin — and the race was comfortably ranked as “Lean Democrat.”

**But, after recent polls show Glenn with a small lead,_The Cook Political Report_ just downgraded our race to a TOSS-UP.** With experts saying Virginia Democrats are losing enthusiasm, Youngkin is picking up momentum at the _worst_ possible moment!

We’re running out of time to turn this thing around — Glenn Youngkin is writing his campaign multi-million dollar checks. We have to match his resources or Democrats could lose 2021’s most important race.

name: Team Smiley
subject: Patty Murray and Joe Biden are BANKRUPTING America
body:
---
| | | | | | You're receiving this message because you signed up to receive emails from Smiley for Washington. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can unsubscribe at the bottom of this email.
---
| |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QfRmM9aXlTbiU5ImAdd0_IpkXpq-kqPBrru32zs_2wycI8vfY1viV-bdPqxrY44ttcI9EcFNEn5wUDVvK3qFvXTrYv23YevMlc6JnJvW2ovqpigUWYPtBbd3YUYZa3nUAsoG4ktrcGMz6MGI2aCbVSbzNxjSDSlwnTvd9egdJ88vKbCLaFzTVnEgOHV5uhiMq6Fib2euU7o=&c=PIqmSMrNrwXE_GtII3SgtC_NfvVahj2AYVUOcbg8qh7ae0m53IEV9w==&ch=laJaDKaBDS5eMA-z2ydTCjwWtmeasc3mEtY3X7fupZ4rEb3F2a3Fjg==)
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Friend,
---
| It's the truth. We have seen a rise in prices all across the board during the first eight months of the Biden Administration. These increases have caused hard working Americans, like you and me, to lose money that has been hard-earned.
[Americans will go bankrupt under the Biden Administration!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QfRmM9aXlTbiU5ImAdd0_IpkXpq-kqPBrru32zs_2wycI8vfY1viV-bdPqxrY44ttcI9EcFNEn5wUDVvK3qFvXTrYv23YevMlc6JnJvW2ovqpigUWYPtBbd3YUYZa3nUAsoG4ktrcGMz6MGI2aCbVSbzNxjSDSlwnTvd9egdJ88vKbCLaFzTVnEgOHV5uhiMq6Fib2euU7o=&c=PIqmSMrNrwXE_GtII3SgtC_NfvVahj2AYVUOcbg8qh7ae0m53IEV9w==&ch=laJaDKaBDS5eMA-z2ydTCjwWtmeasc3mEtY3X7fupZ4rEb3F2a3Fjg==)
But it's not just on Biden.
Our current Senator, Patty Murray, has been pushing another $3.5 million spending bill. This bill will go through the Senate on a party line vote. But why does she continue to push something that is going to drain more of YOUR money? Because she is more concerned with helping D.C. politicians than the people of Washington State. Patty Murray has been in office for 30 years and she's forgotten who got her there in the first place. After 30 years, her priorities are misplaced and her loyalty is no longer to the hard-working people of our state.

In order to defeat Patty Murray, though, I will need your help as I continue to campaign across the state of Washington. Any amount that you are able to donate to our campaign will go a long way in the fight to take back our Senate seat!

name: National Democratic Training Committee
subject: Your Weekly TL;DR Download
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats
body:
| turn over a new leaf... 🍃
---

| [ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..3XrqFQEk6horpsHVeCR-SGD_eNtbgET3tcdHt2jcy5U)
---

## **🍂 DON’T LEAF US HANGING! 🍁**
_Today marks the end of an HISTORIC Build Blue Week — but we’re just getting started!_
_We’ve got the live trainings, courses, articles, and on-demand tools that you need to blow right through GOTV season._
_So grab a flannel shirt, your favorite warm drink, and cozy up with one of this week’s live trainings._

* * *

[**SPECIAL ANNOUNCEMENT: Building the Future with Rep. Nikema Williams**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ER-owxx5juepM66z55gzKWcPgfeLTiPsMat83PIJsLM)
**🚨TODAY, 2:00pm ET**
Join us for the LAST session of Build Blue Week at 2:00pm ET today. Rep. Nikema Williams (GA-05) joins us to share her insight and experiences around organizing and empowering collective action, and help you tap into your own power to drive change and build the future through grassroots organizing, power building, and community mobilization.
_**Then stay on after the event for a very special programming announcement that you have to see to believe.**_
[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..DRW7YmOT38yl3dnp5vRVJmQp-Tdtnddb2mHLyLYuBT8)
---

* * *

[**Budget Building: Maximize Your Fundraising Budget**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..efaAZmv68bcFUxmAAA_SRgVVTEZrP7Cv0TrqvezshxQ)
**Monday, September 27, 1pm ET**
If you’re running a campaign or local party, you’re probably running it on a shoestring budget.

Monday’s training will teach you all you need to know about setting and maximizing a fundraising budget, following compliance guidelines, and meeting your campaign’s fundraising needs.

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..rHOoYGkJr30rKVhb1NUj7Ynv-3aAl4GZdZvVCboPWos)
---

* * *

[**Budget Building: Create a Strategic Digital Budget**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..1gIdekf5d2ODq_TrNJHEvwFoPNm2_c8NAL3Cco_1Eks)
**Wednesday, September 29, 1pm ET**
Your digital plan is crucial to gaining support and reaching key voters 𑁋 that’s why you want to be sure to budget for it accordingly.

Stop by Wednesday’s training to learn how to craft a budget for your digital strategy that meets your campaign’s needs and maximizes your reach.

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..FfAZU9n8_tKt9FI8C05kosnhrE69Lhhdfg93pm0ApAw)
---

* * *

**Social Media Spotlight:** [**DNC Chair Jaime Harrison and Build Blue Week!**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ExYzMGk8gb6Ram2xbKX2DWzumSS7LLK5kBcgMfNGm1Y)
We were proud to welcome over 70 trainers, experts, elected officials, and other Democratic leaders and 1,500 participants to our first-ever Build Blue Week! From panels on running in predominantly red districts to Q&As on relational organizing, this week was historic, and we hope you found the programming as insightful and powerful as we did.

If you missed it, check out our [**Twitter**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..JlmhiDsT3J0IKWuxGb8KKwGwZbcqa8yhGigCSryIGno) and [**Instagram**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..9LjE32tfZznvZPVOPH41i86EQiGJGFfBncRwNw9f_CQ) for event highlights, including this awesome moment from DNC Chair Jaime Harrison during our _So You Want to Run for Office_ panel!

[](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..6atunorJARIwJLSfpZy5Nc8BErdOoYpX3aVtqSLrhVk)

| This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJhdWQiOiJkZXRvdXIiLCJpc3MiOiJtb25vbGl0aCIsInN1YiI6ImRldG91cl9saW5rIiwiaWF0IjoxNjMyNDg0NTg1LCJuYmYiOjE2MzI0ODQ1ODUsImFjY291bnRfaWQiOiI4ODk0MjI3IiwiZGVsaXZlcnlfaWQiOiJxa2R4NXhucnRjdzRpbWc5N2ZxaiIsInVybCI6Ij9fX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kjIn0.DhZogiAWma_8p_K9Fv_IN2Mu1U9RTb003ovf5n6NUP4) | [Unsubscribe](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..3IFqI0fzkaKFfCMnu8c0WWqmDtThlm5IBsEkGdS4iOI)
**Connect with us on social media!**

name: Mark McCloskey
subject: The one unforgivable crime in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri
body:
First they took my guns. Now the government wants to take away my law license for standing up to the BLM mob When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

| [](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=4514411cb72246d4adbe6f0f1836774a&_e=gIfWyh3PLAd8KjPCgQWzH9LaNWcZz4Dnmn_Q4wlFcJq20kDl15fLkeOEUr11oN73yGsP5h49lk6z1sspaeyBaIFK8wS8LgPuJR58Ypl0BROzcEEvpvlw35BZGNQV9hGigh6Y1spYbPbMfPnQtT5cfblFFF0bBi8DHtIVknJMTg_aj2A1uC07A4gb1-P2sUSQsOP3appw258VaT-EFSfSDDAKKnfHteoJZhRpwsOT_YigiTKx7HpcLKqmd38jWRyAw5GkXhOWudvu8zUgpFIi3s4-eWdjKhgMTllzG-pKzCNVszqg2ymQt4xh8SXs4fxvHQ-eKjRRTd_qP8OvtQX0uzlarvLM1HIqF8ZYGDhcnW99dfQPFUhdLTC8quJfOpsfE0LFxFwUJb9zueg6ivzTmYtIAbMbhwEJCS-kOOG8MqmyiHziLD83TP0h4ZRA-Ae1Rjlb5aGymIuT60-7mr28i3wsbZMNLcdTS2iW4aF9l-k%3D)
---

Fellow American,

On June 28, 2020, the leftist mob broke down our gate, stormed in by the hundreds, threatened my wife with murder and rape, threatened to kill me, my family, my dog, and threatened to burn down my home and my business.

**My wife and I held them off through force of will and through the exercise of our Second Amendment Rights**.

Then they tried to put us in prison for four years to punish us for standing up for our rights, our freedom and our country.

My wife and I held them off again through force of will and good lawyers.

**But now they want to punish us by taking away our licenses to practice law - our livelihood and our life's work and devotion.** All for just standing up to the mob - **the one unforgivable crime in America these days** – riot, burn and kill - that's ok. Leftist politicians will bail you out so you can do it again.

**Stand up to the mob and the left, the cancel culture, will hound you forever**.

**This is why we must replace our government with true patriots – ordinary people who remember that the government works for us!**

**[But I can't do it alone; I need your help! Will you step up right now and make a serious donation to my campaign for U.S. Senate of $25, $50, $75, $100 or even more?](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=4514411cb72246d4adbe6f0f1836774a&_e=gIfWyh3PLAd8KjPCgQWzH9LaNWcZz4Dnmn_Q4wlFcJq20kDl15fLkeOEUr11oN73yGsP5h49lk6z1sspaeyBaIFK8wS8LgPuJR58Ypl0BROzcEEvpvlw35BZGNQV9hGigh6Y1spYbPbMfPnQtT5cfblFFF0bBi8DHtIVknJMTg_aj2A1uC07A4gb1-P2sUSQsOP3appw258VaT-EFSfSDDAKKnfHteoJZhRpwsOT_YigiTKx7HpcLKqmd38jWRyAJhbLfbnUlzzYOjwub9H01QUsAAoPt-qCuptBAL1sVhPu-PSbyr0PMsoTv6QBQwuCOba5rfQJNvgTxGvhu-A6s3KjN5ISDScbm9On6P_I1nSobE7suJwOg-hh8d8uNQgcO4EXz9_X47XE4mBE0Ia78rYbfqtiuNQ1hXORkvZcCWy_YgtSCpPxfpFJAR5NjlWujyEwa13g4UkIEXwfu-_nq0Wq7Sw8nJifMXgt-a6kyl4%3D)**

[ PUT PATRIOTS IN POWER
MAKE A DONATION TODAY »](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=4514411cb72246d4adbe6f0f1836774a&_e=gIfWyh3PLAd8KjPCgQWzH9LaNWcZz4Dnmn_Q4wlFcJq20kDl15fLkeOEUr11oN73yGsP5h49lk6z1sspaeyBaIFK8wS8LgPuJR58Ypl0BROzcEEvpvlw35BZGNQV9hGigh6Y1spYbPbMfPnQtT5cfblFFF0bBi8DHtIVknJMTg_aj2A1uC07A4gb1-P2sUSQsOP3appw258VaT-EFSfSDDAKKnfHteoJZhRpwsOT_YigiTKx7HpcLKqmd38jWRyAqN8L54lTlKaFArBrNmT68xCVOuRyTN2Nx5UndebPW-6XJ5-jR5LrYqudDwsjkLlxLaraJ3F53IOtAGbZxvgCvc4nF_e4M3ceM2LXSKm4QOZgQFP06-GjuLiAUAxqxrNM2GE7UDE4UT_QNq3G8but4AE6DPW9G4mTqan5_-BOAu-AP6U7kWzcT0TrtMkdwIex_WjH-_bkZhgoElvxmYM_TWxCKVtXYNheAwOrocFsudI%3D)
We must retake the Senate, end this tyranny and restore our freedoms.

Each and every one of us must fight back right now or our great nation will be lost forever.

[**If you value your freedom, our culture and our great nation, support this movement and together we will defeat the left and make America Great Again!!**](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=4514411cb72246d4adbe6f0f1836774a&_e=gIfWyh3PLAd8KjPCgQWzH9LaNWcZz4Dnmn_Q4wlFcJq20kDl15fLkeOEUr11oN73yGsP5h49lk6z1sspaeyBaIFK8wS8LgPuJR58Ypl0BROzcEEvpvlw35BZGNQV9hGigh6Y1spYbPbMfPnQtT5cfblFFF0bBi8DHtIVknJMTg_aj2A1uC07A4gb1-P2sUSQsOP3appw258VaT-EFSfSDDAKKnfHteoJZhRpwsOT_YigiTKx7HpcLKqmd38jWRyA8d68D9vOJ12czJaYqy-Ab2XmYQhEAtcvLOkpXPKF_B-bBp2PsUF81cR3e5CaaIi46sHfDXPbqLhAeJ7a9E6PBBb8en3sCItXvphM8IBK5AfTohooY_rwWYSBuXywu43-75m7r3ghwOmSezhizClT3hrlaLZY7pWUnObHAlerdbajMWtXkfSR1UfXkwVrNujIPiiWUnj5cRwhgbdmchwTcoBqDv5O3IDrbkXeZ2DzG_8%3D)

Mark McCloskey
Republican for United States Senate

| | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. Since then, they addressed the Republican National Convention, and have been frequent guests on Fox, Newsmax, OAN, CNN and a variety of national and local news and talk TV and radio programs. They campaigned extensively in support of President Trump and continue to speak around the nation on their support of the Constitution, the traditional values that have made the USA the greatest nation on earth, and the current threats to its continued existence. clean_body: First they took my guns. Now the government wants to take away my law license for standing up to the BLM mob When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. | Fellow American, On June 28, 2020, the leftist mob broke down our gate, stormed in by the hundreds, threatened my wife with murder and rape, threatened to kill me, my family, my dog, and threatened to burn down my home and my business. My wife and I held them off through force of will and through the exercise of our Second Amendment Rights. Then they tried to put us in prison for four years to punish us for standing up for our rights, our freedom and our country. My wife and I held them off again through force of will and good lawyers. But now they want to punish us by taking away our licenses to practice law - our livelihood and our life's work and devotion. All for just standing up to the mob - the one unforgivable crime in America these days – riot, burn and kill - that's ok. Leftist politicians will bail you out so you can do it again. Stand up to the mob and the left, the cancel culture, will hound you forever. This is why we must replace our government with true patriots – ordinary people who remember that the government works for us! We must retake the Senate, end this tyranny and restore our freedoms. Each and every one of us must fight back right now or our great nation will be lost forever. Mark McCloskey Republican for United States Senate | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. Since then, they addressed the Republican National Convention, and have been frequent guests on Fox, Newsmax, OAN, CNN and a variety of national and local news and talk TV and radio programs. They campaigned extensively in support of President Trump and continue to speak around the nation on their support of the Constitution, the traditional values that have made the USA the greatest nation on earth, and the current threats to its continued existence. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335 Saint Louis, MO 63108 Don't want to receive our emails?

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: A critical part of our plan for fighting back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Earlier this month I wrote to you about the extreme anti-choice law in Texas, and I promised you that the fight for abortion access wasn't over.

Today, I want to talk about the Women's Health Protection Act, a critical part of our plan for fighting for reproductive justice.

The Women's Health Protection Act will enshrine the right to access abortion under the law. It will prohibit bans, mandatory waiting periods, and other restrictions on a person's right to reproductive freedom.

**I just proudly cast my vote in favor of this legislation because I fervently believe that personal health care decisions should be made by patients and their doctors.** These decisions should not be made by extremist lawmakers in Texas, Arkansas, or any other place.

The truth is nearly 600 abortion restrictions have been introduced in 2021 alone, and 90 have been enacted by state legislatures across the country. That's why we must protect and uphold _Roe v. Wade_ and fight back against laws that get between a person and their doctor.

**[The Women's Health Protection Act will provide those protections. Will you join me in supporting this critical health care protection legislation by adding your name as a citizen co-sponsor? Join me in the fight to protect reproductive rights.](https://act.myngp.com/el/dMvT058BnajixdMbZzDoDNkxvN5hIGR_lOd6RN5TfRA=/Jp8bAtUBVGd_FCJmq0U8UZ3xpRVnGCPzCcquOHkLh0s=?ms=em21_210924_WHPA_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em21_210924_WHPA_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210924_WHPA_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek
