name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **\- September 24****, 2021-** **\- Redistricting 2021: INGOP Continues to Manipulate a Broken System -** Indiana's redistricting process officially began last week, and as expected, it was very clear Indiana Republicans want to continue the status quo and manipulate the system against Indiana's future for another decade. House Democrats proposed an alternative map this week that was a fair and nonpartisan option that would have created a stronger, more balanced government and better opportunities for all Hoosiers - but it was rejected by the Indiana GOP. Indiana Republicans have manipulated the redistricting process once again so that they can continue the broken system that keeps the INGOP in power and helps self-serving politicians. But here's the thing: their extreme partisanship mostly harms the people and the future of Indiana. Indiana Republicans promised a "fair" and "transparent" redistricting process, but behind closed doors, they hired a Washington D.C. GOP operative to protect their maps that continue a pattern of keeping the state 95% more biased toward their party. **_Here's the truth: Indiana House Democrats "fair" map would've given Indiana Republicans 60 seats out of 100 in the House - the map created by Indiana House Republicans attempts to cement their extremism and power in the Statehouse_**. That's why the Indiana Democratic Party is on the road again to draw attention to how Indiana Republicans are once again stacking the deck against Hoosier families. So far Indiana Democrats have held press conferences in Tippecanoe and Vigo counties, and we plan to travel to Allen, Floyd, and Vanderburgh counties next week to share with Hoosiers about how Indiana Republicans put their partisanship ahead of the future of the state. **\- Indiana Republicans to Vote "NO" on $6 Billion Infrastructure Investment for State -** It appears Indiana Republicans are sticking to their extreme partisanship and plan to vote "NO" on the bipartisan infrastructure package that will bring more than $6.6 billion directly to Indiana. The infrastructure package will deliver more good-paying jobs, broadband expansion, and long overdue fixes to Indiana's crumbling roads and bridges - all issues Republicans like Todd Young and Victoria Spartz claim to care about. President Joe Biden's Build Back Better Agenda will start to implement some of the building blocks laid out in the American Jobs Plan. This year was proof that Democrats are the ones who have delivered for Hoosier families during some of the hardest times our country has faced. _Not a single Indiana Republican_ was willing to create a better future for Hoosiers and their families. Instead, Republicans like Larry Bucshon, Victoria Spartz, Todd Young, and Mike Braun have tried to take credit for the investments the American Rescue Plan and the upcoming American Jobs Plan brings to Hoosiers - despite voting "NO" consistently. The time is now to deliver for Hoosier families, and while Democrats are focused on solving today's biggest problems facing Indiana, Congressional Republicans will continue to let their extreme partisanship divide the Hoosier State. Indiana Democrats will consistently inform Hoosiers once this infrastructure bill is passed and into the fall, and we look forward to seeing you on the road again very soon. **\- Opportunities -** **\- Hispanic Heritage Month -** **Power of the Black and Brown Vote** ****

clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | \- September 24, 2021- \- Redistricting 2021: INGOP Continues to Manipulate a Broken System - Indiana's redistricting process officially began last week, and as expected, it was very clear Indiana Republicans want to continue the status quo and manipulate the system against Indiana's future for another decade. House Democrats proposed an alternative map this week that was a fair and nonpartisan option that would have created a stronger, more balanced government and better opportunities for all Hoosiers - but it was rejected by the Indiana GOP. Indiana Republicans have manipulated the redistricting process once again so that they can continue the broken system that keeps the INGOP in power and helps self-serving politicians. But here's the thing: their extreme partisanship mostly harms the people and the future of Indiana. Indiana Republicans promised a "fair" and "transparent" redistricting process, but behind closed doors, they hired a Washington D.C. GOP operative to protect their maps that continue a pattern of keeping the state 95% more biased toward their party. Here's the truth: Indiana House Democrats "fair" map would've given Indiana Republicans 60 seats out of 100 in the House - the map created by Indiana House Republicans attempts to cement their extremism and power in the Statehouse. That's why the Indiana Democratic Party is on the road again to draw attention to how Indiana Republicans are once again stacking the deck against Hoosier families. So far Indiana Democrats have held press conferences in Tippecanoe and Vigo counties, and we plan to travel to Allen, Floyd, and Vanderburgh counties next week to share with Hoosiers about how Indiana Republicans put their partisanship ahead of the future of the state. \- Indiana Republicans to Vote "NO" on $6 Billion Infrastructure Investment for State - It appears Indiana Republicans are sticking to their extreme partisanship and plan to vote "NO" on the bipartisan infrastructure package that will bring more than $6.6 billion directly to Indiana. The infrastructure package will deliver more good-paying jobs, broadband expansion, and long overdue fixes to Indiana's crumbling roads and bridges - all issues Republicans like Todd Young and Victoria Spartz claim to care about. President Joe Biden's Build Back Better Agenda will start to implement some of the building blocks laid out in the American Jobs Plan. This year was proof that Democrats are the ones who have delivered for Hoosier families during some of the hardest times our country has faced. Not a single Indiana Republican was willing to create a better future for Hoosiers and their families. Instead, Republicans like Larry Bucshon, Victoria Spartz, Todd Young, and Mike Braun have tried to take credit for the investments the American Rescue Plan and the upcoming American Jobs Plan brings to Hoosiers - despite voting "NO" consistently. The time is now to deliver for Hoosier families, and while Democrats are focused on solving today's biggest problems facing Indiana, Congressional Republicans will continue to let their extreme partisanship divide the Hoosier State. Indiana Democrats will consistently inform Hoosiers once this infrastructure bill is passed and into the fall, and we look forward to seeing you on the road again very soon. \- Opportunities - \- Hispanic Heritage Month - Power of the Black and Brown Vote ** State of the Latino Community \- Election Law Update - Join Indiana Democratic Party for a legislative update on election law 2021 session. Please let us know if you need special accommodations by Thursday 10/07/21. name: Mark McCloskey
subject: The one unforgivable crime in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri
body:
First they took my guns. Now the government wants to take away my law license for standing up to the BLM mob When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

| [](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=ba2909b912f2435fa19aad7cc7108b3d&_e=D2VTQaCYWMHrlLwRhzI4gxcqCz_pW-6opbaAt7LZ_7-W_lBfhmcuFjHO-FoyWxt0YhnpcowGeRlpkIjpx12ZD9vN5bh0kKyRX3lccsnDfSv5S7AdliYZS6_-Dw34uVShglkXD9bIR8TElEMWqWOyjG89HKhBC7eAa74sivmwrmeu2GkPcQcdVHsdWIBNNF4GlOIMQY-nDzSINbHvMkGwM5vz9QDapqg9duM9kHz_kj9-ROem-DGBQiLfR2M12dWEquLHv70Aa1Dl5Ks6oyS16D3tDO1jyNbsp-P6Y1Ug18S2LNBHu8cEb91Koj1bNxzKpPphvd7g9xKaa3D54iOZhnjBFjyza_auHifPdPbEkKvIMNPwQc5OM7KZyffpMpJBCADXVA5D62LuzJ8MLXg6_p1hRGmfsOStuNNXGzzRztbaI6wR1645syqKATXkqnoRzNN6z0XpgWX81N6hxt5LUMTLed9OKpYqwGw7F17XCr4%3D)

Fellow American,

On June 28, 2020, the leftist mob broke down our gate, stormed in by the hundreds, threatened my wife with murder and rape, threatened to kill me, my family, my dog, and threatened to burn down my home and my business.

**My wife and I held them off through force of will and through the exercise of our Second Amendment Rights**.

Then they tried to put us in prison for four years to punish us for standing up for our rights, our freedom and our country.

My wife and I held them off again through force of will and good lawyers.

**But now they want to punish us by taking away our licenses to practice law - our livelihood and our life's work and devotion.** All for just standing up to the mob - **the one unforgivable crime in America these days** – riot, burn and kill - that's ok. Leftist politicians will bail you out so you can do it again.

**Stand up to the mob and the left, the cancel culture, will hound you forever**.

**This is why we must replace our government with true patriots – ordinary people who remember that the government works for us!**

**[But I can't do it alone; I need your help! I'll cut to the chase, friend.

I'm reaching out because we're facing the biggest test of our campaign's momentum yet -- our first full end-of-quarter deadline. After next Thursday, our numbers will go public for everyone to see.

If you're reading this email, you already know who Kevin McCarthy is -- his lies and cowardice in the face of Donald Trump.

Over the past few months, he's gone to extreme lengths to block the investigation into the January 6th insurrection -- stooping so low that he actually THREATENED companies that release GOP phone records. He joked about hitting Nancy Pelosi with the Speaker's gavel, and he's completely turned his back on our Central Valley community.

McCarthy's future depends on defending the furthest right-wing members of his party -- starting with Donald Trump.

**Our success on the other hand, depends on the following: 1) A TON of people chipping in from across the country so we can deliver on this deadline, 2) Building the biggest grassroots movement possible, and 3) Reaching more voters so they know I'm the viable Democrat running against McCarthy.**

clean_body: He's either desperate to protect Trump, or he has something bigger to hide. | = I'll cut to the chase, friend. I'm reaching out because we're facing the biggest test of our campaign's momentum yet -- our first full end-of-quarter deadline. After next Thursday, our numbers will go public for everyone to see. If you're reading this email, you already know who Kevin McCarthy is -- his lies and cowardice in the face of Donald Trump. Over the past few months, he's gone to extreme lengths to block the investigation into the January 6th insurrection -- stooping so low that he actually THREATENED companies that release GOP phone records. He joked about hitting Nancy Pelosi with the Speaker's gavel, and he's completely turned his back on our Central Valley community. McCarthy's future depends on defending the furthest right-wing members of his party -- starting with Donald Trump. Our success on the other hand, depends on the following: 1) A TON of people chipping in from across the country so we can deliver on this deadline, 2) Building the biggest grassroots movement possible, and 3) Reaching more voters so they know I'm the viable Democrat running against McCarthy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Let's end Kevin McCarthy's career once and for all. |
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36364442/307909789/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWQxZTNhNS01NDFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1cGVrcBC8Zdm1tzOR4PH5hKYuslJ7jd6MQCWj-yhYk=)

| | Peter, it’s Jasmine Beach-Ferrara. I’m a gay woman, Christian minister, mom of three, and county commissioner running against insurrectionist Republican Madison Cawthorn. In a moment,[**I’m going to ask you to chip in to this people-first campaign**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36364444/307909790/1030732756?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210925_FR_JasBio_B1_subj_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWQxZTNhNS01NDFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1cGVrcBC8Zdm1tzOR4PH5hKYuslJ7jd6MQCWj-yhYk=) \-- but first, let me explain why I need your support today. During his time in office, Cawthorn has been focused on building his brand, causing division, and helping to incite violence. _**Recently, he was caught on camera warning of potential bloodshed between Americans over Trump’s Big Lie.**_ Cawthorn represents the very worst of the Republican Party, but he’s already raised nearly $2 million to fund his campaign. [**I’m running for Congress to bring empathy into politics and bring our community together -- can you chip in $25 or more before my FEC deadline to help me get it done?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36364446/307909791/1030732756?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210925_FR_JasBio_B1_subj_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWQxZTNhNS01NDFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1cGVrcBC8Zdm1tzOR4PH5hKYuslJ7jd6MQCWj-yhYk=) | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36364447/307909800/1030732756?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210925_FR_JasBio_B1_subj_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWQxZTNhNS01NDFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1cGVrcBC8Zdm1tzOR4PH5hKYuslJ7jd6MQCWj-yhYk=)
---
Let me share a bit of my story with you -- not just as a candidate -- but as a person.
When I was a kid, I grew up in North Carolina, raised by my mom, Martha, who was a nurse and a single parent. I played football, soccer, and basketball, I was a part of student government, and I was a nerd who genuinely liked school.
My mom raised me in a church that played a big role in forming not just my faith but also my understanding of love, empathy, and justice. When I came out at age 18, it ushered in a new chapter of my life -- one that was both more honest and riskier. Telling the truth about who I am was an enormous relief on one hand; on the other, it tested some of the most important relationships in my life. And it meant letting go of a lot. I stopped feeling at home in the church, even though my faith never wavered. It wasn’t easy to imagine a future for myself in North Carolina, as much as this was home to me.
During my twenties, I worked at a coffee shop, took a job as a janitor, and taught writing in colleges and prisons. I also moved back to North Carolina. I knew that ultimately this was where I belonged, even though I still harbored questions, and sometimes fear, about what it would mean to be out here. I started organizing on political campaigns and LGBTQ rights campaigns. And I met my wife Meghann. Suddenly so many of the questions I’d been wrestling with felt a lot clearer: whatever I did, I’d be doing it alongside her and that made anything feel possible. With her support, I followed a call to ministry and then in 2011, we launched the Campaign for Southern Equality together.
As we organized to win marriage equality in the South, skeptics told me that I was absolutely wrong, that what we were doing was dangerous, and that we would set back the marriage equality movement by years.
But we saw a way to win. So we barnstormed the South, organizing in living rooms, church basements, and library meeting rooms. One conversation at a time, one town at a time, one action at a time. Every step of the way, our work was guided by love and empathy.
And we did win. By building a community of people across the South who were ready to step up, and by running a nimble, strategic campaign.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36364448/307909802/1030732756?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210925_FR_JasBio_B1_subj_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWQxZTNhNS01NDFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1cGVrcBC8Zdm1tzOR4PH5hKYuslJ7jd6MQCWj-yhYk=)
In 2016, I ran for county commissioner. And throughout my time in office I have worked to tackle issues such as the opioid crisis, funding for early childhood education, climate change, and advancing criminal justice reform.
**Whether it’s grassroots organizing or serving in elected office, I strive to do what’s just and what’s right.** That’s why I’m giving this campaign my all.
Madison Cawthorn is a danger to our democracy and he is unfit to serve a second term. His dangerous, violent comments don’t represent who we are in Western North Carolina.
[**We have what it takes to defeat Cawthorn and we’re going to bring real leadership and compassion to NC-11 together. Can I count on you to chip in $25 today towards my FEC goal and my grassroots movement so we can win this together?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36364449/307909806/1030732756?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210925_FR_JasBio_B1_subj_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWQxZTNhNS01NDFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1cGVrcBC8Zdm1tzOR4PH5hKYuslJ7jd6MQCWj-yhYk=)

clean_body: | = | | Peter, it’s Jasmine Beach-Ferrara. I’m a gay woman, Christian minister, mom of three, and county commissioner running against insurrectionist Republican Madison Cawthorn. In a moment,= \-- but first, let me explain why I need your support today. During his time in office, Cawthorn has been focused on building his brand, causing division, and helping to incite violence. Recently, he was caught on camera warning of potential bloodshed between Americans over Trump’s Big Lie. Cawthorn represents the very worst of the Republican Party, but he’s already raised nearly $2 million to fund his campaign. = | | | = Let me share a bit of my story with you -- not just as a candidate -- but as a person. When I was a kid, I grew up in North Carolina, raised by my mom, Martha, who was a nurse and a single parent. I played football, soccer, and basketball, I was a part of student government, and I was a nerd who genuinely liked school. My mom raised me in a church that played a big role in forming not just my faith but also my understanding of love, empathy, and justice. When I came out at age 18, it ushered in a new chapter of my life -- one that was both more honest and riskier. Telling the truth about who I am was an enormous relief on one hand; on the other, it tested some of the most important relationships in my life. And it meant letting go of a lot. I stopped feeling at home in the church, even though my faith never wavered. It wasn’t easy to imagine a future for myself in North Carolina, as much as this was home to me. During my twenties, I worked at a coffee shop, took a job as a janitor, and taught writing in colleges and prisons. I also moved back to North Carolina. I knew that ultimately this was where I belonged, even though I still harbored questions, and sometimes fear, about what it would mean to be out here. I started organizing on political campaigns and LGBTQ rights campaigns. And I met my wife Meghann. Suddenly so many of the questions I’d been wrestling with felt a lot clearer: whatever I did, I’d be doing it alongside her and that made anything feel possible. With her support, I followed a call to ministry and then in 2011, we launched the Campaign for Southern Equality together. As we organized to win marriage equality in the South, skeptics told me that I was absolutely wrong, that what we were doing was dangerous, and that we would set back the marriage equality movement by years. But we saw a way to win. So we barnstormed the South, organizing in living rooms, church basements, and library meeting rooms. One conversation at a time, one town at a time, one action at a time. Every step of the way, our work was guided by love and empathy. And we did win. By building a community of people across the South who were ready to step up, and by running a nimble, strategic campaign. = In 2016, I ran for county commissioner. And throughout my time in office I have worked to tackle issues such as the opioid crisis, funding for early childhood education, climate change, and advancing criminal justice reform. Whether it’s grassroots organizing or serving in elected office, I strive to do what’s just and what’s right. That’s why I’m giving this campaign my all. Madison Cawthorn is a danger to our democracy and he is unfit to serve a second term. His dangerous, violent comments don’t represent who we are in Western North Carolina. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | = | Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress PO Box 7553 Asheville, NC 28802 United States mailto:info@jasmineforcongress.com

name: Laura Loomer
subject: 10 points behind in the polls . . .
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
body:
I doubt you read the garbage published by the leftist Orlando Sentinel, and I’ll admit I rarely do either
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/xuYbjTd4nrghMR9jcPjnRg/NI7VCVGUmIxz4W57OFXc763w)
Patriot,

I doubt you read the garbage published by the leftist _Orlando Sentinel_ , and I’ll admit I rarely do either, but they covered my race against Do-Nothing Daniel Webster and I was REALLY surprised to see what they had to say:
_“Loomer is potentially a serious political threat in a GOP leaning district and needs to be treated as such,” Jewett said of the dark red 11th Congressional district that includes The Villages and runs from Lake to Hernando County. “My advice to Webster would be to run like you are 10 points down in the polls ...”_
Aubrey Jewett is a political scientist with the University of Central Florida – and that quote was about the only portion of the op-ed that didn’t contain gross insults about me or my campaign.

But Jewett is right! **I’m a serious political threat, not just to my opponent, but the ENTIRE Democrat establishment in Congress.**

[**Help me get there today.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/xuYbjTd4nrghMR9jcPjnRg/NI7VCVGUmIxz4W57OFXc763w)

**I have just six full days left until the end of the fundraising quarter.**

I’m falling behind on my goal and could really use your help. [**Will you chip in right now?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/xuYbjTd4nrghMR9jcPjnRg/NI7VCVGUmIxz4W57OFXc763w)

---

The Left is waiting with bated breath for me to return poor fundraising numbers for the quarter. They’re deeply hoping my opponent beats me in the Republican primary that’s 11 months away.

**You know Ilhan Omar is on her knees . . . five times per day, praying to Allah that I simply go away.**

Omar and her “squad” don’t want me in Congress defending America, they don’t want me blowing the whistle on their ties to Islamic terrorists, and they don’t want me standing up to their brazen attempts to open our borders to criminals and millions of disenfranchised, third-world invaders – **otherwise known as future Democrat Party voters!**

They want me to go down in a blaze of glory. [**But that won’t happen as long as you’re with me.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/xuYbjTd4nrghMR9jcPjnRg/NI7VCVGUmIxz4W57OFXc763w)

[**Help me hit my goal before the 1st.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/xuYbjTd4nrghMR9jcPjnRg/NI7VCVGUmIxz4W57OFXc763w)

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: They don't care
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pZ9XNTBTEqD5SaIhX6-7k-J5k6xCQm3urotOK6gLWILbXj5Oj9lKi5BZf-eRpT_7Yq_Vl2mJOl5BiLGQVWp2oLtcey6Lqflmse4TwdzFsL2ZcbyW_S0rH9XrQJIY1lOuJikpZY7XB-6IRRBA4N-goayhgFwOSRBTx_33QwdROzS-qZk91nvkLgFSXqcnvs2jYllZQWlD0lLc9CUAs_x4A5uQ2Bwd6ij2eXjiGmiXRKmCnId_zM1cYZxcNLSoBRmIpLDN6EP8cYlnQ6HUq_ZcHbdso7kkx_ElDMJ12adTkgR6srCbDKkC--djxKIgHGZW3lcIKdZs5u6TZJAG65tMGheK9i2JewtIIl6aon_uo70PW_g61YHvIHyxiGGNVMN_qRWmrJoOmDOk1Gf4ibhFiQ==&c=frd8udaR_YTwGUwuHpoXWnTfTYkusKg4mFNrcOoSdRyKv0PdiPDedg==&ch=knuwxBLENTDMJEOzjX3FNZbpi9PhsEzLy1BwIUWbwmcIDhRV0TjUOQ==)
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Peter -
Hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants are flooding across our southern border every month.
Women and children are being left stranded in the desert by human smugglers and drug cartels.
Thousands of people are camping out in blistering heat underneath a bridge.
All of this is a result of Biden's open border policies. And the worst part? Joe isn't doing anything to solve it.
---
| | | [SIGN THE PETITION. TELL BIDEN TO SECURE THE BORDER.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pZ9XNTBTEqD5SaIhX6-7k-J5k6xCQm3urotOK6gLWILbXj5Oj9lKi5BZf-eRpT_7Hm47-cXLueX6_Yb1wIZVRLuOw6V_oP7JlnWY_BjpXtKaMeU6TQeyORySWaQCrd4CRUKyJUb3t8_823rkVBxiKMIlLRuf28yyWM45sVQIJgo4Tm7mFmK6ZgkMCFQWMSCEv8xSDgB5XBfALCpXdH1S9wx787H0GOiUV7blu0a193wLnhlmHmwd1VS8mv6KTqFVcb3letBIkmDxrgQyOcaExoR1D40m74hv1oL3A5GLv0IjWlXJ1_t8ynLmHeUR5TChu1BEFafq1xpcSAZcpqBg0iNz471dlG8kG1aOYsliV6uBEVqHTvf5XA==&c=frd8udaR_YTwGUwuHpoXWnTfTYkusKg4mFNrcOoSdRyKv0PdiPDedg==&ch=knuwxBLENTDMJEOzjX3FNZbpi9PhsEzLy1BwIUWbwmcIDhRV0TjUOQ==)
---
| Why isn't Biden doing anything? Because he doesn't care. Democrats in Congress don't care.
In fact, every single policy they propose leads to MORE illegal immigration. They've rescinded Trump Administration policies that discouraged illegal immigration and they've stopped all enforcement of our immigration laws.
There's only one possible explanation for this - Joe and Nancy and Kamala believe that illegal immigration is GOOD FOR THEM. They think they are bringing hundreds of thousands of new Democrat voters into the country that will allow liberals to maintain their grip on power.
But it won't work.
Joe Biden has just 38% approval among hispanics. It turns out, hispanic communities along the border don't like illegal immigration. They don't like drugs flooding into communities. They don't like people cutting in front of the line, clogging up our immigration system, when they had to wait years to become an American the RIGHT WAY.
---
| | | [JOIN THE FIGHT AGAINST BIDEN'S OPEN BORDERS POLICIES.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pZ9XNTBTEqD5SaIhX6-7k-J5k6xCQm3urotOK6gLWILbXj5Oj9lKi5BZf-eRpT_7Hm47-cXLueX6_Yb1wIZVRLuOw6V_oP7JlnWY_BjpXtKaMeU6TQeyORySWaQCrd4CRUKyJUb3t8_823rkVBxiKMIlLRuf28yyWM45sVQIJgo4Tm7mFmK6ZgkMCFQWMSCEv8xSDgB5XBfALCpXdH1S9wx787H0GOiUV7blu0a193wLnhlmHmwd1VS8mv6KTqFVcb3letBIkmDxrgQyOcaExoR1D40m74hv1oL3A5GLv0IjWlXJ1_t8ynLmHeUR5TChu1BEFafq1xogMTukhzu9of1zZfHL0wztM5lG4UUgYZ6AxdS-sjugBrZZH1FyWeoyQKptuOAJz2xRt46ZJDaN7DBi-vM9ktWR&c=frd8udaR_YTwGUwuHpoXWnTfTYkusKg4mFNrcOoSdRyKv0PdiPDedg==&ch=knuwxBLENTDMJEOzjX3FNZbpi9PhsEzLy1BwIUWbwmcIDhRV0TjUOQ==)
---
| |
---
| I'm going on offense against Biden's open border policies. The only way we are going to get control of this situation is by winning power back from the socialists in the swamp.
Democrats are going to put up a fight, putting hundreds of millions behind their attempt to hold onto power. And they're going to have the help of the mainstream media.
I know we can win if we work together. But I can't have patriots like you sitting on the sidelines. I need you to get in the game so we can win this fight.
Are you with me?
---
| In Service,
Dan Crenshaw
---
| |
---
| | | [DONATE. STOP THE SOCIALIST ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION PUSH.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pZ9XNTBTEqD5SaIhX6-7k-J5k6xCQm3urotOK6gLWILbXj5Oj9lKi5BZf-eRpT_7Yq_Vl2mJOl5BiLGQVWp2oLtcey6Lqflmse4TwdzFsL2ZcbyW_S0rH9XrQJIY1lOuJikpZY7XB-6IRRBA4N-goayhgFwOSRBTx_33QwdROzS-qZk91nvkLgFSXqcnvs2jYllZQWlD0lLc9CUAs_x4A5uQ2Bwd6ij2eXjiGmiXRKmCnId_zM1cYZxcNLSoBRmIpLDN6EP8cYlnQ6HUq_ZcHbdso7kkx_ElDMJ12adTkgR6srCbDKkC--djxKIgHGZW3lcIKdZs5u6TZJAG65tMGheK9i2JewtIIl6aon_uo70PW_g61YHvIHyxiGGNVMN_qRWmrJoOmDOk1Gf4ibhFiQ==&c=frd8udaR_YTwGUwuHpoXWnTfTYkusKg4mFNrcOoSdRyKv0PdiPDedg==&ch=knuwxBLENTDMJEOzjX3FNZbpi9PhsEzLy1BwIUWbwmcIDhRV0TjUOQ==)

body:
Friends, I don't have to tell you that we are in a real fight to stop Republicans from taking over Congress next year. And you've seen first-hand just how willing they are to ignore election results and try to take power at any cost. It's a scary time for this country. Brandon Mosely can be the antidote - he's a history teacher who recognizes the peril we're in right now, and can draw from his knowledge to help Congress and all Americans navigate through these times safely. We can best build a safe, prosperous, democratic future by drawing on the lessons of history. I hope you'll join us in supporting this incredible history teacher's campaign today - [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eee-mosely](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36366679/307918284/-1933797596?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIzY2M1ZGFiLTU5MWQtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oRpRPfKWRxvYo2ahF3DkVXaccm_tO_UxJ43Ahj8hsiM=) It's critical that we all fight back against these extreme Republicans. Campaigns these days are expensive, and we're working hard to make sure Brandon has the funding he needs to tell his story. Party leaders, organizations, and major donors are going to be watching what Brandon raises in September to see if he can win. That's where we come in. There are still too many people who doubt teachers, and it all comes down to money for them. They don't believe that a teacher really can compete with wealthy and well-connected candidates, But we know better, and the educators, parents, and allies of public education in this country are coming together to level the playing field for candidates like Brandon. This race is important, this candidate is important, and you are important. That's why I'm asking you to make a contribution today and help elect history teacher Brandon Mosely to Congress:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eee-mosely](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36366680/307918287/-1933797596?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIzY2M1ZGFiLTU5MWQtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oRpRPfKWRxvYo2ahF3DkVXaccm_tO_UxJ43Ahj8hsiM=) Pete | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36366681/307918289/-898086359?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210923mosely_EEE_180DO_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIzY2M1ZGFiLTU5MWQtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oRpRPfKWRxvYo2ahF3DkVXaccm_tO_UxJ43Ahj8hsiM=)

Brandon’s own experience as a student taught him that representation matters — in our classrooms, our communities, and our government.
The son of a pastor and school-bus driver, Brandon was inspired by his parents and also by his fifth grade teacher, Mrs. Faulkner. Brandon saw the incredible impact that people of color can have on students and on a community. She gave him a sense of purpose, and encouraged Brandon to pursue higher education. About 10 years later, he became the first in his family to graduate college.
**Stories like Brandon’s are _exactly_ why the work our organization does is so important**. Mrs. Faulkner gave Brandon just what he needed at just the right time, starting him on a path to change other people’s lives for the better. These days, Brandon is doing the same for today’s students, teaching history in his classroom and as the director of a local nonprofit.
**Now, Elect Educators Everywhere is joining Brandon’s fight to win California’s 42nd District, so that he can represent students and teachers in Congress, and be a voice for them.[_Will you split a donation now between Brandon’s campaign and EEE?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36366684/307918300/-898086359?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210923mosely_EEE_180DO_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIzY2M1ZGFiLTU5MWQtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oRpRPfKWRxvYo2ahF3DkVXaccm_tO_UxJ43Ahj8hsiM=)**
Brandon believes — and we do too! — that no matter what your zip code is, a quality public education should be accessible for all. In Congress, he'll fight to eliminate student loan debt, expand access to early childhood education, and give all students the tools they need to succeed in the 21st century economy.
**We’re so excited to start this journey with Brandon, but we need you on board.[_Will you give whatever you’re able to help bring Brandon’s voice to Congress?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36366685/307918301/-898086359?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210923mosely_EEE_180DO_xx_l3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIzY2M1ZGFiLTU5MWQtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oRpRPfKWRxvYo2ahF3DkVXaccm_tO_UxJ43Ahj8hsiM=)**

body:
| | |
| [](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=UvL%2BUTX4HmCMy%2BAkbY8i27tXRXvL3WZRD49FwLqwgW3H1NA2hWyg%2BaN1jrL9Ucl5PVp0PiHWJnTCGktWpGHYZH9uc1bBmqzBN5Go%2Fx28PSwAm2XDPc5NNcBBrbn1gTEB&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FYMHHG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3D8RPbWUMOrQGVt4G0FEkGbkptBMwdlX2o4WDK6ONVf5KNGaZ2B_B58-JQiW1wet2d0&I=20210924131717.00000009dce9%40mail6-65-ussnn1&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjIyMTM1OTI1MzE7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE3NzM4NDYwMTs%3D&V=3&S=bve753HU5lflAXVkneeCijus89uf_rlTKZUq-Qc8tNc)
---
| Friend,
---
| It may seem like a long way off, but next November is a once in a lifetime opportunity to fire Nancy Pelosi for good. We’re not going to let this opportunity slip through our fingers. **That’s why we’ve developed a detailed roadmap to defeat Pelosi and her liberal cronies,** but in order to stay on track, we MUST hit our goals every step of the way.

Team --

Governor Kim Reynolds recently endorsed a school board candidate in Ankeny who worked to undermine COVID-19 pandemic precautions in schools.

---

Like me -- parents, community leaders, and school board members are confused about where we are as a state.

They don't recognize an Iowa where our governor endorsed a school board candidate who is part of a group sending death threats over simple COVID-19 precautions like masks in schools.

I'm calling on Governor Reynolds to demonstrate some courage: Have the courage to stand up for what's right, have the courage to follow Iowa values, have the courage not to stoop to far-right political pandering.

[**Iowa is so much better than this, and I know we can show real leadership through the rest of this COVID-19 pandemic. That's why I'm running, and it's why I need your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36367738/307921583/-2052161304?refcode=em-92421-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjU5NTM2NC01YzFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zL9SQZ61un3sejZNVMhLRtWuIe9jD-q3ppxQ9PAoVAI=)

We can get through this, together.

Ras Smith
Democrat for Governor

body:
Can Erica count on you?
#
The Federal Election Commission (FEC) is already counting down the days until the end of Q3.
**In less than one week, Erica Smith will be required by federal law to report how much money our campaign raised over the past three months.**
Once our numbers go public, everyone and anyone will make judgements about the strength and viability of our scrappy North Carolina campaign.
But unlike our opponents for Senate in 2022, right now **Erica doesn’t have the backing of the establishment.** We don’t have a rolodex of well-connected Democratic donors to turn to. And we don’t take a single penny from corporate PACs or the fossil fuel industry.
**Instead, we’re relying on you.** Erica is not the establishment candidate, but the people’s candidate.
[**You’ve never donated to our campaign before. Can we count on you to make your very first donation of $5 or more to Erica Smith for U.S. Senate before the Q3 deadline on September 30?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/15701?refcode=em20210924-477&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=477%2E3698%2E5hQZkE) Your donation has a direct and immediate impact on electing North Carolina’s first Black woman U.S. Senator and posting a strong fundraising number by the end of Q3.
**[Donate](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/15701?refcode=em20210924-477&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=477%2E3698%2E5hQZkE)**
Thanks for everything,
Erica Smith HQ

name: Marco
subject: we can't let our extremist GOP opponents surge ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
| |
---
Hi friend, it's Marco. **I hate to do this, but even after my team's email, we're still coming up short of our weekly goal, and now is _not_ the time to fall behind.**
Doug Ducey (R) is exactly the kind of leader Arizona needs LESS of, not more. But if we fall short of this goal, we risk letting our extremist GOP opponents surge ahead of our fundraising – and every dollar they raise from shady dark money groups and far-right mega-millionaires will go straight into defeating our movement for Arizona's future.
Look: A future rooted in justice, progress and democracy depends on all of our voices. Ducey and the extremist GOP have gone out of their way to silence us – so let's show them just how short-sighted underestimating this team would be.

body:
Earlier this week, Representative Steve Davisson passed away after a heroic battle with cancer. Davisson, of Salem, represented District 73 since 2010 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470854?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Remembering Rep. Steve Davisson**_
Earlier this week, Representative Steve Davisson passed away after a heroic battle with cancer. Davisson, of Salem, represented District 73 since 2010. Tributes and reflections have poured in since Rep. Davisson passed. Below are a selection. We ask that you join the Indiana Republican Party in keeping the Davisson Family in your prayers as they mourn Steve.
_**“My good friend Steve Davisson was a good friend to anyone that met him, and for that, we’re all fortunate and mourn his loss. As a man of faith, family and community, he was a model citizen legislator, daily carrying out the duties that made him an obvious Sagamore of the Wabash. His ability to take on tough and complex issues with common sense and that famous smile was a gift from above. First Lady Janet Holcomb and I will keep his wife, children and many grandchildren in our prayers as they find peace for such an unimaginable loss for their family, loved ones and his constituents that were so honored to have him represent them over all these years in our Statehouse." -Governor Holcomb**_ _**"We already shared a connection to Salem by the time we were colleagues in the Indiana House of Representatives, because my uncle, Donald Crouch was a family dentist in Salem, and his patients would go to Rep. Davisson to fill their prescriptions. I will remember him for his positive attitude. No one would have ever known he was sick because of his upbeat spirit, which was his outlook throughout his life." -Lt. Gov. Crouch**_
_**"I am deeply saddened to learn of the passing of Rep. Steve Davisson. A dedicated husband, father, and grandfather, Steve exeplified the meaning of servant leader. He will be deeply missed. Please join me in keeping the Davisson family in your prayers." -Chairman Hupfer**_
_**"Steve Davisson lived an extraordinary life of love, courage and service. While short in stature, Steve was a giant of a man in service to his family, community and state. He lived his life full of love and optimism, which made him such a blessing to know. Steve will be greatly missed by me and everyone who had the privilege to know him."
-Speaker Huston**_
---
|
---
| _**Chairman's Note**_ With the onset of Fall comes the resumption of one of the more unique legislative sessions in Indiana history. This week, the General Assembly has reconvened to pass the new state house, senate, and Congressional district maps. Indiana’s legislative leaders should be applauded for the job they did in constructing new maps. They focused on population, not politics. The proposed new maps are compact, rejected gerrymandering, and kept intact communities of interest. Legislative leadership conducted a textbook process and the results are reflective of our state.

Of course, this hasn’t stopped the Democrat Party from accusing legislators of gerrymandering. Their baseless accusations were expected, but simply don’t reflect reality. In fact, it is rather interesting that the Democrats’ own proposed maps explicitly focus on a political outcome. By their own admission, they put politics above people when proposing their own districts. The simple fact is, because of your hard work and the policies of Republican leaders over the last two decades, voters continue to trust our party with leadership. Voters have elected Republican to every statewide office, both U.S. Senate seats, seven of nine U.S. House seats, supermajorities in both houses of the state legislature, 71 mayoral offices, and a whopping 88% of all county elected positions. State, county, city, and town offices are not legislatively draw and Republicans continue to dominate those offices. Our Republican electoral success is because Hoosiers see the results of common-sense conservative leadership.

Our legislative leaders led a robust redistricting process that solicited and acted upon input from Hoosiers and produced a set of maps that reflect the state’s population and communities. The proposed districts are fair and put population over politics.

Thanks
Kyle
---

| **_Attracting Investment and Creating New Hoosier Jobs_**
**Governor Holcomb's **work to bring investment and new jobs to Indiana is continuing to create new opportunities for Hoosiers!

**Governor Holcomb** visited Honda's Indiana plant to celebrate a $50.2 million investment that will help prepare the plant to become the first auto plant in the nation to mass-produce the new 2022 Honda Civic Hatchback.

**Governor Holcomb** joined executives from Poland-based CANPACK to break ground on the company's new state-of-the-art manufacturing facility in Delaware County. CANPACK's more than $380 million dollar investment will also create new Hoosier jobs.

**Governor Holcomb** joined Aptiv to celebrate the grand opneing of its new Indiana Techincal Center and to celebrate the company's success in Westfield. These facilities will accelerate Aptiv's development of technology that makes vehicles safer, greener and more connected.

**_Photos:_**_ Gov. Holcomb at Honda's Indiana plant in Greenfield. Gov. Holcomb breaking ground at CANPACK's new facility in Delaware County. Gov. Holcomb cutting the ribbon at Aptiv's Indiana Technical Center._

clean_body: Earlier this week, Representative Steve Davisson passed away after a heroic battle with cancer. Davisson, of Salem, represented District 73 since 2010 | | | | | | | | Remembering Rep. Steve Davisson Earlier this week, Representative Steve Davisson passed away after a heroic battle with cancer. Davisson, of Salem, represented District 73 since 2010. Tributes and reflections have poured in since Rep. Davisson passed. Below are a selection. We ask that you join the Indiana Republican Party in keeping the Davisson Family in your prayers as they mourn Steve. “My good friend Steve Davisson was a good friend to anyone that met him, and for that, we’re all fortunate and mourn his loss. As a man of faith, family and community, he was a model citizen legislator, daily carrying out the duties that made him an obvious Sagamore of the Wabash. His ability to take on tough and complex issues with common sense and that famous smile was a gift from above. First Lady Janet Holcomb and I will keep his wife, children and many grandchildren in our prayers as they find peace for such an unimaginable loss for their family, loved ones and his constituents that were so honored to have him represent them over all these years in our Statehouse." -Governor Holcomb "We already shared a connection to Salem by the time we were colleagues in the Indiana House of Representatives, because my uncle, Donald Crouch was a family dentist in Salem, and his patients would go to Rep. Davisson to fill their prescriptions. I will remember him for his positive attitude. No one would have ever known he was sick because of his upbeat spirit, which was his outlook throughout his life." -Lt. Gov. Crouch "I am deeply saddened to learn of the passing of Rep. Steve Davisson. A dedicated husband, father, and grandfather, Steve exeplified the meaning of servant leader. He will be deeply missed. Please join me in keeping the Davisson family in your prayers." -Chairman Hupfer "Steve Davisson lived an extraordinary life of love, courage and service. While short in stature, Steve was a giant of a man in service to his family, community and state. He lived his life full of love and optimism, which made him such a blessing to know. Steve will be greatly missed by me and everyone who had the privilege to know him." -Speaker Huston | | Chairman's Note With the onset of Fall comes the resumption of one of the more unique legislative sessions in Indiana history. This week, the General Assembly has reconvened to pass the new state house, senate, and Congressional district maps. Indiana’s legislative leaders should be applauded for the job they did in constructing new maps. They focused on population, not politics. The proposed new maps are compact, rejected gerrymandering, and kept intact communities of interest. Legislative leadership conducted a textbook process and the results are reflective of our state. Of course, this hasn’t stopped the Democrat Party from accusing legislators of gerrymandering. Their baseless accusations were expected, but simply don’t reflect reality. In fact, it is rather interesting that the Democrats’ own proposed maps explicitly focus on a political outcome. By their own admission, they put politics above people when proposing their own districts. The simple fact is, because of your hard work and the policies of Republican leaders over the last two decades, voters continue to trust our party with leadership. Voters have elected Republican to every statewide office, both U.S. Senate seats, seven of nine U.S. House seats, supermajorities in both houses of the state legislature, 71 mayoral offices, and a whopping 88% of all county elected positions. State, county, city, and town offices are not legislatively draw and Republicans continue to dominate those offices. Our Republican electoral success is because Hoosiers see the results of common-sense conservative leadership. Our legislative leaders led a robust redistricting process that solicited and acted upon input from Hoosiers and produced a set of maps that reflect the state’s population and communities. The proposed districts are fair and put population over politics. Thanks Kyle | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | | | Attracting Investment and Creating New Hoosier Jobs Governor Holcomb's work to bring investment and new jobs to Indiana is continuing to create new opportunities for Hoosiers! Governor Holcomb visited Honda's Indiana plant to celebrate a $50.2 million investment that will help prepare the plant to become the first auto plant in the nation to mass-produce the new 2022 Honda Civic Hatchback. Governor Holcomb joined executives from Poland-based CANPACK to break ground on the company's new state-of-the-art manufacturing facility in Delaware County. CANPACK's more than $380 million dollar investment will also create new Hoosier jobs. Governor Holcomb joined Aptiv to celebrate the grand opneing of its new Indiana Techincal Center and to celebrate the company's success in Westfield. These facilities will accelerate Aptiv's development of technology that makes vehicles safer, greener and more connected. Photos: Gov. Holcomb at Honda's Indiana plant in Greenfield. Gov. Holcomb breaking ground at CANPACK's new facility in Delaware County. Gov. Holcomb cutting the ribbon at Aptiv's Indiana Technical Center. | | | Chairman Hupfer on All Indiana Politics Last Sunday Chairman Hupfer appeared on All Indiana Politics. You can watch his appearance here: | | | Diversity Series Applications Applications are now open for the second class of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series. . | | Upcoming Republican Events : Henry County Lincoln Day Dinner : Adams County Benjamin Harrison Breakfast : Johnson County Chairman's Rally & Cookout : Morgan County Lincoln Day Dinner | | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Treasurer Kelly Mitchell Auditor Tera Klutz Secretary of State Holli Sullivan Attorney General Todd Rokita Senator Todd Young Senator Mike Braun Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Jim Baird Congresswoman Victoria Spartz Congressman Greg Pence Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved._

Peter,

Mike Garcia has had quite the voting record this year. Let's go through a few of his votes:
* He voted against the John Lewis Voting Rights Act which would protect our freedom to vote.
* He voted no on bipartisan Infrastructure and Jobs Investments that would create jobs and invest in our community.
* He voted to overturn the Electoral College results (after a violent mob of Trump supporters stormed the Capitol).

Peter,

On September 2nd, I emailed you about the abortion ban in Texas.

We knew that if these were the types of laws that Texas was passing, that it wouldn't be long until Florida followed suit. **Unfortunately, this is _exactly_ what's happening.**

Legislative leadership had hinted that Florida lawmakers were considering filing a similar bill, and now _it's here._ Republican Rep. Webster Barnaby filed a Texas-style abortion ban that prohibits abortions after a fetus develops a heartbeat, at around 6 weeks.

**That's before most women know they are pregnant.**

This is a deliberate attack and imminent threat to women everywhere -- _especially Black women._ Black women are disproportionately denied resources, services, and information needed to make personal decisions regarding our health -- and this law is just going to take that discrimination even further.

But guess what? This is going to be a fight we don't back down from. We need to make it abundantly clear: **They will not be able to do this quietly. They will not be able to do this without a fight, and we are putting them on notice now.**

**[This fight is much bigger than all of us -- and it's going to take political will to challenge it. clean_body: | = Peter, On September 2nd, I emailed you about the abortion ban in Texas. We knew that if these were the types of laws that Texas was passing, that it wouldn't be long until Florida followed suit. Unfortunately, this is exactly what's happening. Legislative leadership had hinted that Florida lawmakers were considering filing a similar bill, and now it's here. Republican Rep. Webster Barnaby filed a Texas-style abortion ban that prohibits abortions after a fetus develops a heartbeat, at around 6 weeks. That's before most women know they are pregnant. This is a deliberate attack and imminent threat to women everywhere -- especially Black women. Black women are disproportionately denied resources, services, and information needed to make personal decisions regarding our health -- and this law is just going to take that discrimination even further. But guess what? This is going to be a fight we don't back down from. We need to make it abundantly clear: They will not be able to do this quietly. They will not be able to do this without a fight, and we are putting them on notice now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Access to abortion is health care, access to safe abortion is equity, access to safe abortion is racial justice. Thank you, Michele = *

name: Heidi St. John for Congress
subject: Lt. Gen. (Ret) William G Boykin Endorses Heidi St John
body:
US Lt. General knows a leader when he meets one.
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---|---
|
Among the many endorsements my congressional campaign has received, none brings me more pleasure than this week's endorsement from Lt. Gen. (Ret) William G Boykin, U.S. Army.

General Boykin served as the United States Deputy Undersecretary of Defense for Intelligence from 2002-2007. He spent 13 years in the Delta Force serving in numerous leadership positions in the elite unit, including operations officer, troop commander, squadron commander, deputy commander, and finally unit commander. General Boykin also served at the CIA as Deputy Director of Special Activities and was promoted to brigadier general before serving as Deputy Director for Operations, Readiness, and Mobilization when assigned to the Army Staff.

In his endorsement on 9/16/21, General Boykin said in part, "It's going to take dedicated individuals like you to pull our nation back from the brink and set it on the right course." General Boykin added, "I wholeheartedly endorse you in your bid for election to the U.S. House of Representatives from Washington's Third Congressional District and will encourage others who care about the preservation of our republic to do so as well."

Thank you General Boykin for your endorsement and your words of encouragement. As you said, I look forward to helping bring America back from the brink and preserving this great republic when I am elected to the U.S. House of Representatives.

With gratitude,
|
---
|
---

---

subject: Two years ago today:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC

Periodically the researchers at Never Again PAC will be sending reminders of how close our democracy came to failing. name: =?utf-8?Q?Morgan?=
subject: Upcoming Events: Weekend of 9/25
body:
Block parties, breakfasts, and big door knocks coming up... | | | |
---
| | |
## Invitation for : Meet Rep. Allison Russo
---
| [RSVP TO JOIN ALLISON THIS WEEKEND](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=e075e2e625&e=400a181d5a "RSVP TO JOIN ALLISON THIS WEEKEND")
---
| Allison will be traveling across the district this weekend talking with voters about the issues directly impacting local communities, and she would love to see you there, . **Can you bring a friend to meet Allison this week or help us knock on some doors?**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=f4db4b1a80&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Talk to voters in your neighborhood](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=fa038735c8&e=400a181d5a)
Join Allison Russo and local Democratic candidates across the 15th Distrist this (and every) weekend to talk to voters about the special election. We have just over 5 weeks to go until Election Day, so there is no "later!"
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=c330b4b35a&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Pickerington Block Party, ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=c96a01a14a&e=400a181d5a)[Saturday at 11:30am](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=f923835796&e=400a181d5a)
Join Allison Russo and local Pickerington candidates for City Council and School Board at our fall block party! We'll be registering our new neighbors to vote and hanging out with free food, music, and fun for the whole family! RSVP and bring some friends!
|
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=0cc7a4a38b&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [SEO Labor Breakfast with Allison](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=88e8b2fcde&e=400a181d5a)
Calling all union members! The SEO Central Labor Council is hosting a breakfast with Allison this Sunday at 10:30am. Talk with Allison about building an economy that works for all of us over coffee and breakfast!
|
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=e12adf13d9&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Bobcats Meet & Greet on Campus, Sunday at 1pm](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=27800ed1b0&e=400a181d5a)
Join OU Dems and Allison for lunch and conversation with OU students on campus. There will be pizza on the college green at 1PM!
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=f95d73d8bf&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Veterans Roundtable in Grove City](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=94346e691f&e=400a181d5a)[, Monday at 6pm](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=6111d5e364&e=400a181d5a)
Join State Rep. Allison Russo, the ODP Veterans Caucus, and fellow veterans for a conversation on issues impacting veterans and military families in central Ohio. Panel discussion with Q&A to follow.
| [SEE ALL UPCOMING EVENTS](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=428b162e09&e=400a181d5a "SEE ALL UPCOMING EVENTS")

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: I need you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
---
Hello friend,
I want to take a moment to explain why making your next donation to support our grassroots campaign today would make a huge difference:
**Our upcoming end of quarter deadline will be the most important test our campaign has faced yet.** Once the quarter ends in a few short days, we'll be legally required to file a report with the FEC that will be available to the public. In that report we MUST demonstrate broad support and strong fundraising numbers to win.
I'm running to fight for Southern Arizona vlaues in Congress, and I will do so with enthusiasm and passion. But before I can get in the fight, I need your support.
[**Can you help out with a contribution of $100? I know that's a big ask, but it's critical we meet this goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36370721/307931951/558373307?refcode= X_092421_EOQ_A&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2FjMWRhMi02MjFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kYTxd6eGeS4Ci8vfd9nsBjT3aYA6D90WmJdm6BTpE0g=)
Thank you for all your support,
Kirsten
---

**P.S. If you can't do $100 today, please rush a contribution of any amount. I need you with me in this fight.**

name: Trump News HQ
subject: A dangerous ideology
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young
_Sponsored message_
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi9sht2o53up5kcmb0469iu6uu7akb89uohvkab8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2clg66ob4cph2bs)
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zil6p7e9nagsqaougcp2a3a0ohfog19030tbjnco_rp22sh2s8i66pj2clg66ob4cph2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc313hcnss9fteljm97gpv5hopnk2s58eg0teje0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2clg66ob4cph2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Trump Train News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Peter, the Lt. Governor is a crucial piece of our Democratic majority.

_Our current Lt. Governor, Justin Fairfax, has cast 52 tie‐breaking votes in the Virginia Senate!_

With extreme Republicans in our Commonwealth coming out of the woodwork to attack voting rights, the right to choose, accessible health care, and so much more ‐‐ **this position is the final barrier between Republican victory and protecting our fundamental rights.**

All that to say, Peter ‐‐ with Virginians’ best interests at heart, I am dedicated to protecting our Democratic progress.

clean_body: | = Let me be clear, Peter, the Lt. Governor is an important position ‐‐ now more than ever before. = | = Peter, the Lt. Governor is a crucial piece of our Democratic majority. Our current Lt. Governor, Justin Fairfax, has cast 52 tie‐breaking votes in the Virginia Senate! With extreme Republicans in our Commonwealth coming out of the woodwork to attack voting rights, the right to choose, accessible health care, and so much more ‐‐ this position is the final barrier between Republican victory and protecting our fundamental rights. All that to say, Peter ‐‐ with Virginians’ best interests at heart, I am dedicated to protecting our Democratic progress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Grateful for you, = Hala Ayala Democratic Nominee for Virginia Lt. name: Tim Scott Alerts
subject: Reserve your tickets today for Senator Tim Scott in Manchester
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
Two weeks from today, Sen. Tim Scott will be joining us for an exclusive event
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.nh.gop%2Famostuckdinner/1/0100017c18304bc2-6ba64354-0f8b-4a7a-9c05-c7178367eaad-000000/o4Z1I-jRJogdzQrUMT01z4JZ8MA=237)
Derek,
Join us two weeks from today, as we welcome one of the nation's most prominent conservative voices, Senator Tim Scott, to the Granite State.

You may know Sen. Scott from his response speech earlier this year, or simply as one of the nation's strongest and most influential conservative leaders.
Sen. Scott has become a household name in the Republican Party for his staunch conservative ideals, tireless leadership, and moving personal testimony. If you have heard Senator Scott speak, you will know why this is an event that you will not want to miss!

In addition to Senator Scott, we will be joined some of New Hampshire's foremost Republican leaders, including Governor Chris Sununu and Senator Kelly Ayotte, amongst others.
_Attendance for the event is limited, and tickets are sold on a first-come first-serve basis_.

We are extremely excited to be welcoming the Senator to New Hampshire, and hope that you are able to attend!
\- DJ Burke, NHGOP Finance Director

[Reserve your tickets today for the 2021 Amos Tuck Dinner with Special Guest Senator Tim Scott](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.nh.gop%2Famostuckdinner/2/0100017c18304bc2-6ba64354-0f8b-4a7a-9c05-c7178367eaad-000000/R4D8Wd0PhBZrxcgNK5OoohwaURY=237)

Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee. Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate's Committee

**Never in a million years did I think that I'd see the far-right lay siege to the US Capitol Building -- attempting to overturn a free and fair election.** It was absolute madness, and their seditious actions have to stop here.

It's going to take a ton of people chipping in for voters to know I'm the viable Democrat in this race. The very best way you can help is by getting a contribution in before my end-of-quarter deadline hits Thursday.

**[Now that you've been able to hear from me directly, will you chip in $3 toward my deadline? body:
Will you join me? | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mihG2-M7AB3dkcwwbh_95NDNjdwqBp3xLrqfMiLPFJ9SKKvqeJs4C-ONPLrRCAsL_Lm0b24EN6K_hWEwRJdaaDeHE07uqN3DKn3pdMoQXn8dwsR8iV40VhNGkVXYOnJzye4ou2YfHH42GUjMcCoJOpbhxbSxZyG13jGM5u0KKVLoQrBgorTCHyJWPBzT4XDVSwuIhE4iwBP9j4APffZw2Cz-D3InDA6ozOBSsSZxu_GRIlUywrwik5iAmNkZSDYQ4xiPuEohu1kZ5u0tL8w_aJRULOzgFVreK5uIA-HKVNgEl5c6YcK8qggfn7Qz7fEPAqTq2HBDhoZaj4_fbW5WfItly4zQ-PeeE6smSm9bbP995yows-ze0Ut7ZJZZsTH3-VEzq8UZPVUdwm1vsprs9M-ed-rDFBIiTHp_X06PLEVDA/3fl/hJBEK1IxScKHjEifPu2m_g/h0/Ga5QiGl3NiD1Ip7inPzKO0yXgdyO6QUK2ReCuwEeeU0)
My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse.

As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it.

**Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.**

**[I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Common Good VA so we can stop the alt-right and Marjorie Taylor Greene:](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mihG2-M7AB3dkcwwbh_95NDNjdwqBp3xLrqfMiLPFJ9SI8uz80XscR-ogj81dJLEGTgzLNqeEdXRFgHDWhWo2JqKrOMlL44xxJbni-2TtwWtbmQ-9SsgHeOyVeG3AiQwLgzTZDxak4vrW-LPsusLUasNCj2PsoYnAu2KZJYtHcebqJ8hVjoLtvao-UW-0Boi5LDffkm6203gzOuv7Za_qEsRtF8xCUmaMzoYFRFi1P2-yCgFA21bK9PN6julHGOQP_hbDChgrh3eYfkw2WCBp5nKmZD28PGqgqOgEwk5anZOGbT_H_kCE-6DudjbLCKc7HfH0m5WjFMJB_xpBEDp-6_BojcZWktxZTJ_asLwHtVnGd9hYeXVmepQfXDfYU5ROieKvFKZZoT2DJD8cqBT_UdkVsb2cu3Z8Tgw72G_3tu98/3fl/hJBEK1IxScKHjEifPu2m_g/h1/2Q9w3HzSYBtNIrdlXp7wanmuRN8SoQqbwupn3klUIYM)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mihG2-M7AB3dkcwwbh_95NDH60Wf8e1lXqDiagDst_qCc56TJMgFVYRevj1pE2PO7SfHvQkhamesQbe6MXDwyRXfqdgCYz-sWZX6slaDMmiVWTwnJ4OycYo0NVyA6RL222FbHemL8N4_xtd19qioAOwg6gIM3V7dzFDcgwZDWHg2TG9gSsYEORBWq8nNkdbMoBOXsaqxUMXjHo2MJEldKWiB8N0FYbEOfEUwpioJDAJvj-yV5kskQ9EnGm8ThR6x0GkFXon5wVj_Rbq-7D-gvuSGmpqonPA-bTmGQccRpswvn2BKvLHwu2xoQ8mJlheuxbV8V2d_ZWLKICsi0NCh9NrzqSRqffBLqRMhv4HwDvCC1x226d5neNKkAjUnPYLZoL0fZWLDKTT8PvYmGfymPojKfGL5Imji97pV72ZlVPgXjTpqRGf0IGw1OGNZcgHqzo/3fl/hJBEK1IxScKHjEifPu2m_g/h2/PDJe7SxC26vdGo9xBqZqHIJplpOEE0hZffzokPKFgMk)

clean_body: Will your name be on it? | Not interested? . President Trump is back, Peter. He’s returned to the campaign trail -- hosting Save America rallies in Battleground States all across the country. His message is simple: if you want to save America, you need to elect Republicans in Battleground Races. We know our movement is stronger than ever, Peter. But we don’t know whether you are still with us! That’s why we need to hear from you right away. | | | | | | In just about one week, we’re coming up on our next FEC-mandated End-Of-Quarter Fundraising Deadline. That means we’ll have to disclose all of our donations in a public report that’ll be compared with Joe Biden and the Democrats. If we fall short, our America First Movement will appear weak, Peter. The Democrats will be emboldened. And President Trump will be furious! Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via The Missouri Republican Party

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I’m respectfully asking you to help my husband, Mark Kelly, knock his official FEC fundraising goal out of the park. Will you pitch in $3 or anything you can?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
National Republicans see people like Mark, who are independent and put their constituents first, as a threat.
#

Friends -
I’m reaching out today to ask you to support my husband, Mark, so he can hold this Arizona Senate seat. Please, give me a chance to explain why this is so important.
I know just how hard these campaigns can be. It is not easy at all. National Republicans see people like Mark, who are independent and put their constituents first, as a threat. That’s why we have always known that outside groups would come out of the woodwork to spend untold amounts of money to try and take back this Senate seat in 2022.
In addition to that outside spending, which is already underway, a Republican with the backing of a $10 million Super PAC jumped into the race. What’s more, Donald Trump flew to Arizona to hold a rally and said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”
So it's clear Trump and national Republicans are already ramping up their efforts to beat Mark.
**Mark needs our help to fight off these attacks, and the best way to do that is by reaching his 50,000 contribution goal by the time our official FEC fundraising comes to an end and we’re legally required to report our numbers. We can’t afford to fall short, so what do you say?**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to Mark’s people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 50,000 contribution goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?refcode=em210924-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1384_6688874__qxYTT&akid=1384%2E6688874%2E_qxYTT)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210924-1-15&t=20&refcode2=1384_6688874__qxYTT&akid=1384%2E6688874%2E_qxYTT)**

---
****
Mark is working so hard for Arizona in the Senate. To hold his seat, he is going up against national Republicans and outside groups that want to stop him. That’s why your support, no matter the amount, is greatly appreciated by me, Mark, and all of us.
All my best,
Gabby Giffords

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=26&akid=1384%2E6688874%2E_qxYTT).

body:
We’re under a week from the dreaded FEC deadline

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36374100/307942440/86782466?refcode=EM_FR_210924eoq1_eoq_lbr_activesnd_7_ng_nalogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmNkN2Q2Zi02YTFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I1dX5WzYoo_VDvGZuxjJsnv1jrimNssdTM-GWSQJQD4=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36374101/307942441/86782466?refcode=EM_FR_210924eoq1_eoq_lbr_activesnd_7_ng_nalogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmNkN2Q2Zi02YTFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I1dX5WzYoo_VDvGZuxjJsnv1jrimNssdTM-GWSQJQD4=) Friend,

I’m going to ask you to make a donation toward my crucial Federal Elections Commission deadline -- [**but if you don’t need any convincing, click here to rush your gift now!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36374102/307942442/86782466?refcode=EM_FR_210924eoq1_eoq_lbr_activesnd_7_ng_nal1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmNkN2Q2Zi02YTFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I1dX5WzYoo_VDvGZuxjJsnv1jrimNssdTM-GWSQJQD4=)

If you’re plugged-in to the campaign world, you may already know this, but I want to make sure everyone knows why this deadline is so important.

At the end of the month, my campaign has to report our fundraising numbers to the FEC. Those numbers are reported online and made public for anyone to see.

This means that Republicans in Washington who want nothing more than to win back the House and turn Joe Biden’s home state against him are going to see exactly how well-prepared we are for the coming campaign.

**If we come up short of our $10,000 goal and report a low number, they’ll jump at the opportunity to pick up a seat.**

We can stop this from happening if we show our grassroots army is as strong as ever, and the best way to do that is through as many grassroots donors as possible stepping up and making a donation.

Friend, right now is the best time to join this campaign.

[**Can you chip in just $7 right now to show your support and help me keep Delaware blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36374103/307942443/86782466?refcode=EM_FR_210924eoq1_eoq_lbr_activesnd_7_ng_nal1&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmNkN2Q2Zi02YTFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I1dX5WzYoo_VDvGZuxjJsnv1jrimNssdTM-GWSQJQD4=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$15 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36374104/307942444/86782466?refcode=EM_FR_210924eoq1_eoq_lbr_activesnd_7_ng_naEL15&express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode2=EL15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmNkN2Q2Zi02YTFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I1dX5WzYoo_VDvGZuxjJsnv1jrimNssdTM-GWSQJQD4=)**

body:
Republican super PACs have launched MASSIVE ad buys to attack Sen. Raphael Warnock and turn Georgia red.
#
Peter,
**BAD news** : Republican super PACs have already launched MASSIVE ad buys to attack Sen. Raphael Warnock and turn Georgia red.
We _**CANNOT**_ afford to lose one Senate seat. The GOP is already gunning for Senator Warnock’s seat, but we are not giving up.
