| Dear Patriot, Anthony Fauci needs to be removed from power. Just this week, it was revealed that the Wuhan lab released coronaviruses into bat caves 18 months before COVID began -- with funding from Anthony Fauci. That's right: your tax money was used to release killer viruses into the wild in Wuhan, China, as a "science experiment." And now, for the second year in a row, the world is in the grips of a pandemic that originated in Wuhan. If this man's deadly experiments are allowed to continue, all of us will be at risk for another terrible pandemic. That's why I have pushed to ban all funding for gain-of-function research. And it's why I am pushing to send Anthony Fauci into retirement. But a critical deadline is approaching that will determine whether or not I can accomplish that goal. You see, the Democrats are running a Bernie-supporting socialist against me for United States Senate. And at the end of this month, both of us must report our fundraising numbers. If his numbers are better than mine, Democrats will make it their #1 national priority to defeat me, so that I can never stop Fauci's agenda again. Already, Left-wing megadonors are pouring huge sums of money into his campaign. I must rely on conservative patriots like you to help me keep pace. If I lose this election, I will be powerless to stop Fauci from wreaking havoc on America. Will you stand with me so that I can keep fighting? [Can you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 right away so that I can win this battle and keep my seat in the Senate?](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3DK5LA_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7mT-2Bb7-2BrPXSiV8TNK02Uvac0k0RiCrVLMSL-2B6RX42JZtElfm-2BHYkd5xhFG1l5wp-2F0aTbD3TS3WNW91sJHsGhN-2BB6w1D-2FB3D76lpb7IBMW-2Frw39gkUhJ3LgUFYSIxD32Hm7FpcVBtHblI3EKPcWb1wQ0jHDg4y8-2FYLVbsBcjtRGnN2BQuTNfCQMlQwCLb6cmIi92VWwwgLzQuyqH9phIsGHUUHdUsm56gIc7hpoK9m1RnmvuSkCeT7FhCEUApnvCdX1AdFfHmkZAPfAaRUeQv78IsApwMwuW9OErMkMD7u0eVCn9RUBLj2yJHTuIeEW3m-2FAPP6815nBL-2BMxWnx612SmQ-3D-3D) Fauci still hasn't admitted that he did anything wrong by funding the Wuhan lab. And that can only mean one thing -- he plans on doing it again. That's why my voice in the United States Senate is so essential. At every turn of this pandemic, I have called out Anthony Fauci for his arrogance and hypocrisy. But if I lose my seat in the Senate, I can no longer stand in his way. That's what makes this deadline so critically important. If my Democrat opponent has better fundraising numbers than me, Left-wing donors and activists will flood into my state from across America, eager to defeat me. I will have the biggest target on my back out of any United States Senator. [Will you please make a generous contribution of $100, $50, $25, or $10 so that doesn't happen?](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3DZBnN_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7mT-2Bb7-2BrPXSiV8TNK02Uvac0k0RiCrVLMSL-2B6RX42JZtElfm-2BHYkd5xhFG1l5wp-2F0aTbD3TS3WNW91sJHsGhN-2BB6w1D-2FB3D76lpb7IBMW-2Frw39gkUhJ3LgUFYSIxD32Hm7FpcVBtHblI3EKPcWb1wQ4UVZuoi9Xd8A0uL9A-2FqvyXuaW4rmvzRUA86GfQL3jQAzXfX6ISoOZOuRo2lrFtCeoP9J5JuJQ5vdSXNxDdeN3BStRUDEjzkB9uluRh6awzL0BPE-2F9cHu0unMpR9-2FRlWHTMk-2FhLRgnvgJ-2BRQsq-2FWZIO3CugGukTK3R7-2BkxfsUsv15PB8iyfidiuga3x-2Fdw-2B18A-3D-3D) In Liberty, Rand Paul

clean_body: and it's coming soon | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, Anthony Fauci needs to be removed from power. Just this week, it was revealed that the Wuhan lab released coronaviruses into bat caves 18 months before COVID began -- with funding from Anthony Fauci. That's right: your tax money was used to release killer viruses into the wild in Wuhan, China, as a "science experiment." And now, for the second year in a row, the world is in the grips of a pandemic that originated in Wuhan. If this man's deadly experiments are allowed to continue, all of us will be at risk for another terrible pandemic. That's why I have pushed to ban all funding for gain-of-function research. And it's why I am pushing to send Anthony Fauci into retirement. But a critical deadline is approaching that will determine whether or not I can accomplish that goal. You see, the Democrats are running a Bernie-supporting socialist against me for United States Senate. And at the end of this month, both of us must report our fundraising numbers. If his numbers are better than mine, Democrats will make it their #1 national priority to defeat me, so that I can never stop Fauci's agenda again. Already, Left-wing megadonors are pouring huge sums of money into his campaign. I must rely on conservative patriots like you to help me keep pace. If I lose this election, I will be powerless to stop Fauci from wreaking havoc on America. Will you stand with me so that I can keep fighting? Fauci still hasn't admitted that he did anything wrong by funding the Wuhan lab. And that can only mean one thing -- he plans on doing it again. That's why my voice in the United States Senate is so essential. At every turn of this pandemic, I have called out Anthony Fauci for his arrogance and hypocrisy. But if I lose my seat in the Senate, I can no longer stand in his way. That's what makes this deadline so critically important. If my Democrat opponent has better fundraising numbers than me, Left-wing donors and activists will flood into my state from across America, eager to defeat me. I will have the biggest target on my back out of any United States Senator. In Liberty, Rand Paul | | | P.S. - It is my mission to stop Fauci from funding any more "Wuhan science experiments" that lead to deadly pandemics. But in order to do that, you and I must meet a critical deadline. At the end of this month, my Democrat opponent and I must both report our fundraising numbers. If his numbers are better than mine, the Democratic Party will smell blood. They will make this Senate race their #1 national priority. name: Rachel Earls
subject: Sharing God’s blessings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Earls for Georgia
body:
Afghan refugees have nowhere to go and nothing more than the clothes on their
backs. They could really use our help...

<>

Hi, Peter! It’s Rachel.

I want to take a break from all the political talk for a moment to chat with
you about something really special that we’ve been working on the last couple
of weeks.

Ever since word got out about Biden’s plans to pull our troops out of
Afghanistan, Afghans have been fleeing their home country in mass, risking
their lives to get out before the Taliban took over.

As a mama, this hits home for me.

There’s nothing I wouldn’t do to protect my babies and try to provide a better
life for them, even if it meant running halfway around the world with little
more than the clothes on our backs to escape a terrorist regime.

Most of these refugees have nowhere to go and nothing more than the clothes on
their backs. They could really use our help, Peter.

Harold and I set up a donation drive to collect clothing, hygiene items, and
baby supplies for Afghan refugees, and I’m reaching out to you today to see if
you would be able to chip in a few items.

Here are the details:

AFGHAN REFUGEE DONATION DRIVE

Where: 4638 Mountain Creek Dr Roswell

When: Today - October 27

Items needed: Ready to Feed Baby Formula with Nipples, Small Bottles of
Pedialyte, Pouches of Baby Food, Diaper Rash Cream, Diapers in Sizes 1, 2, and
3, Infant and Toddler Over the Counter Medicine

If you have any questions, please reach out to Tracy Cullo at 703.217.1705

People have already been so generous with donations, and it fills my heart
with much joy!

But we still have a long way to go before we reach our goal.

Peter - would you consider donating some diapers, baby formula, toothbrushes,
or soap to help us provide these refugees with the basic necessities?

If you’d like to contribute, you can drop your donations off at 4638 Mountain
Creek Drive Roswell, GA.

Thank you,

Rachel

Do not neglect to do good and to share what you have, for such sacrifices are
pleasing to God.– Hebrews 13:16

Paid for by Earls for Georgia

824 S Milledge Ave Ste 101, Athens, GA 30605

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

Unsubscribe
<http://links.haroldearls.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_s=83a6513c964743718a7fe0ec62650a10&_t=WClc4CK3fvcUfntX2CTop45BZxAOq1uR4jxSwcGSWUqaJ8gofeMpu6AA0vh0qwqT6p6uWogBHE12FGJQDDj3GOsEfjxp-c9sroOaEIV_86yj9RhlAghcqcMBtFpr2vzS9cmYUwHDcIvJE8ca1JBggMGFBWWIBKbgldTxAmvvqeE%3D>

name: Diego Rodriguez
subject: Campaign update (campaigning across AZ)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Diego for AG
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36375142/307946128/-1716317403?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQwYWFjOS02ZDFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIFNeP5_qjaTtdYsSiZYuiedA3Zlavnx5xVCE6CKz64=&emci=0f95626e-b71c-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=ab40aac9-6d1d-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=10950315)
---
Hi friend,

I wanted to give you a quick update on my campaign!

For so long, COVID-19 has kept us inside and away from each other. This last month, I've had the privilege of meeting with Arizona voters in-person as well as remotely — always taking the appropriate safety measures — and it's been great!

First, I participated on a panel for **Urgent Way Forward: A Summit on Intersectional Environmentalism** , where we had an inspiring conversation about environmental issues like water in Arizona, and how often they disproportionately impact low-income communities and communities of color. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36375143/307946131/2127152568?refcode=X_092421_CampaignUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQwYWFjOS02ZDFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIFNeP5_qjaTtdYsSiZYuiedA3Zlavnx5xVCE6CKz64=)
---
Then, I traveled to Camp Verde to meet with the Yavapai Democrats. At a community meeting, we discussed referendums and redistricting, emphasizing how crucial robust freedom of voting is to our country.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36375145/307946135/2127152568?refcode=X_092421_CampaignUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQwYWFjOS02ZDFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIFNeP5_qjaTtdYsSiZYuiedA3Zlavnx5xVCE6CKz64=)
---
After that, I joined the Coconino Democrats at their booth for the County Fair. The company was UDDERLY delightful, as was connecting with the voters of Flagstaff.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36375149/307946137/2127152568?refcode=X_092421_CampaignUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQwYWFjOS02ZDFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIFNeP5_qjaTtdYsSiZYuiedA3Zlavnx5xVCE6CKz64=)
---
Of course, we still made time for remote events. To end the month, I had a chance to join North Scottsdale Democrats at their Meet the Candidates Zoom series. I got to talk to voters about _their_ main concerns and tell them a little bit about what I plan to do as the People's Attorney.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36375150/307946148/2127152568?refcode=X_092421_CampaignUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQwYWFjOS02ZDFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIFNeP5_qjaTtdYsSiZYuiedA3Zlavnx5xVCE6CKz64=)
---
It's been an invigorating last month connecting with the people of Arizona. The election might feel far off, but the importance of being an Attorney General who fights for real change has never felt more urgent.

**We still have a lot more voters to meet with before I can become the People's Attorney._ _

[Anything you can give now goes a long way in helping me get my message out. That's why I have to ask: can you chip in $20 now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36375156/307946151/-112900465?refcode=X_092421_CampaignUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQwYWFjOS02ZDFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIFNeP5_qjaTtdYsSiZYuiedA3Zlavnx5xVCE6CKz64=)[ >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36375162/307946161/-112900465?refcode=X_092421_CampaignUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQwYWFjOS02ZDFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIFNeP5_qjaTtdYsSiZYuiedA3Zlavnx5xVCE6CKz64=)**

Thank you!

_\-- Diego_
**Rep. Diego Rodriguez is running for Attorney General to be the People's Attorney, focused on our needs instead of partisan stunts. As a lifelong Democrat, a prosecutor, a defense attorney, and now as a State Representative, Diego is the most experienced and most qualified candidate that we can trust to fight for our rights.**

[**Will you join Team Diego by chipping in a few dollars now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36375166/307946180/2127152568?refcode=X_092421_CampaignUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQwYWFjOS02ZDFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIFNeP5_qjaTtdYsSiZYuiedA3Zlavnx5xVCE6CKz64=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36375171/307946184/2127152568?refcode=X_092421_CampaignUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQwYWFjOS02ZDFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIFNeP5_qjaTtdYsSiZYuiedA3Zlavnx5xVCE6CKz64=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36375175/307946189/2127152568?refcode=X_092421_CampaignUpdate&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQwYWFjOS02ZDFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIFNeP5_qjaTtdYsSiZYuiedA3Zlavnx5xVCE6CKz64=)

clean_body: | Hi friend, I wanted to give you a quick update on my campaign! For so long, COVID-19 has kept us inside and away from each other. This last month, I've had the privilege of meeting with Arizona voters in-person as well as remotely — always taking the appropriate safety measures — and it's been great! First, I participated on a panel for Urgent Way Forward: A Summit on Intersectional Environmentalism , where we had an inspiring conversation about environmental issues like water in Arizona, and how often they disproportionately impact low-income communities and communities of color. | = Then, I traveled to Camp Verde to meet with the Yavapai Democrats. At a community meeting, we discussed referendums and redistricting, emphasizing how crucial robust freedom of voting is to our country. = After that, I joined the Coconino Democrats at their booth for the County Fair. The company was UDDERLY delightful, as was connecting with the voters of Flagstaff. = Of course, we still made time for remote events. To end the month, I had a chance to join North Scottsdale Democrats at their Meet the Candidates Zoom series. I got to talk to voters about their main concerns and tell them a little bit about what I plan to do as the People's Attorney. = It's been an invigorating last month connecting with the people of Arizona. The election might feel far off, but the importance of being an Attorney General who fights for real change has never felt more urgent. We still have a lot more voters to meet with before I can become the People's Attorney. = Thank you! \-- Diego Rep. Diego Rodriguez is running for Attorney General to be the People's Attorney, focused on our needs instead of partisan stunts. As a lifelong Democrat, a prosecutor, a defense attorney, and now as a State Representative, Diego is the most experienced and most qualified candidate that we can trust to fight for our rights. = = = Diego for AG PO Box 545 Phoenix, AZ 85001 United States | PAID FOR BY Diego for AG. Authorized by Diego Rodriguez.

name: Team Greitens
subject: Navy SEAL & Former Governor Eric Greitens Closes Out Incredibly Strong Week, Cements Status As Lead MAGA Warrior of 2022 Cycle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Navy SEAL & Former Governor Eric Greitens Closes Out Incredibly Strong Week, Cements Status As Lead MAGA Warrior of 2022 Cycle
---
| MAGA Navy SEAL and former Missouri Governor Eric Greitens closed out an incredibly strong week, cementing his status as the Lead MAGA Warrior of the 2022 cycle.
As [reported by Fox News,](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RS1vUe08cTmWmOxGjQ5P_tjRbhMbKpwP8FRvaG1rW0_yCOQq5qBENHlIvjlNgdqPcvEzURPepl5Q1lNG0uZJ_TpRoFsWeBhXP-uiBwyc2QlzlG6rfPFrHCHNyXSy_W6QrT79khjrqc6YkFGKJ8Pg6ZxgsiJUkKSNCvFZVfPBwPKC3XQZvcgz45uh5rZwdkmrZjeaBavVknqWMb9Db1Q03spDiZyWpcqCmrHIWN-KH1U=&c=CaBIW1AR1DUcGW1Oo1oMXdptKpr-z40ehXn9sLhn68cGhIqtL-vopw==&ch=cYQb6anUdDC7hK7QZltS1bMzTsfWoHLVuqb7bAlsCphQXImmYgOqlQ==) former National Security Advisor to President Donald J. Trump and retired U.S. Army Lt. General Michael Flynn announced his endorsement of former Missouri Governor Eric Greitens for the United States Senate in 2022.
"The people of Missouri recognize that those who betrayed President Trump the most were not the leftists but the cowardly Republicans in Name Only.
"That's why I'm endorsing Governor Eric Greitens for the United States Senate. We don't need any more insiders or career politicians in Washington, especially not those with ties to the Chinese Communist Party," said General Flynn.
General Flynn released the following video endorsing Greitens:
---

name: Team Salud
subject: The countdown is on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ldAaY8_OyquYxXbCDwlasrIMI2bcXsaoCjFs5mWWFdc=/Ue4C8hnzVzaPc31Ggz01grKGcE3GmUgDiKaeMUrpS8Y=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
If you've been a supporter of Salud Carbajal for Congress for a while, chances are you know all about the importance of our fundraising quarters and the Federal Election Committee (FEC) reports we have to file four times a year. But if you're new to our team, let us take a moment to explain.
At the end of each quarter, the books close on our fundraising totals, and they become public record. Political strategists, party operatives, candidates and the media all view these reports in order to evaluate a campaign's strength and viability based on the amount they raised.
Our current quarter closes next week on Thursday, September 30, leaving us less than a week to reach our ambitious fundraising goal. [**_Will you chip in $5 or more to help us reach that goal?_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ldAaY8_OyquYxXbCDwlasrIMI2bcXsaoCjFs5mWWFdc=/Ue4C8hnzVzaPc31Ggz01grKGcE3GmUgDiKaeMUrpS8Y=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
We need to keep Salud Carbajal in Congress fighting for us and investing in continuing the progress we all want to see, like prioritizing updating of our nation's infrastructure, supporting our working and middle classes by passing the Child Tax Credit, and ensuring women are able to make their own choices about their healthcare and bodies.
Please help us end our quarter strong by [**_chipping in today._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ldAaY8_OyquYxXbCDwlasrIMI2bcXsaoCjFs5mWWFdc=/Ue4C8hnzVzaPc31Ggz01grKGcE3GmUgDiKaeMUrpS8Y=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) We appreciate your support.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ldAaY8_OyquYxXbCDwlasrIMI2bcXsaoCjFs5mWWFdc=/Ue4C8hnzVzaPc31Ggz01grKGcE3GmUgDiKaeMUrpS8Y=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress

name: Secretary Mike Pompeo
subject: Mission critical:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
House Republicans have a HUGE End of Quarter deadline right around the corner.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zjggg24e51duk5b3ijuvdtfibpm6peerg485qrog_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cli64pr4c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqcdtjmpqj4srk65qb6t9j6toj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onje1hn1ptke3inct5lchrrcd3k65p3ct9leqq7cplgssq38d3lmjj6ed74muq31puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75cj666qb6ob0e9omcd70m9h3csh5u)
|
| | | Fellow Patriot, it's Mike Pompeo. **House Republicans have a HUGE End of Quarter deadline right around the corner.** I'll be honest with you - I'm nervous.
**[My MAIN priority right now is taking back the House for Republicans and FIRING Nancy Pelosi once and for all. But right now? We're TRAILING behind the Democrats.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2za731lmsisnqcov9b50m9g9dia2k802fjq01e92g_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cli64pr4c9h2bs "My MAIN priority right now is taking back the House for Republicans and FIRING Nancy Pelosi once and for all. But right now? We’re TRAILING behind the Democrats.")**
When the Democrats control Congress? We leave the door wide open for the Radical Left to dominate Biden's agenda.

A Conservative majority? We will bring back sanity and commonsense solutions that our nation desperately needs, but we cannot do it without your help.
_**Will you commit to joining me in our fight to take back the House TODAY?**_ **500% Matching Activated**
---
| | | [TAKE BACK THE HOUSE](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zjcl5tm26rf6pd4s80mnhh9tqif5esueb4cupbp8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cli64pr4c9h2bs "TAKE BACK THE HOUSE")
---
Lame Duck Speaker Nancy Pelosi holds a _very_ slim majority in Congress-just FIVE seats. They're nervous, and pouring in extra resources to expand their majority and ram socialism through the halls of Congress. It's absolutely necessary that EVERY patriot chip in to take back the House and FIRE Pelosi.

Taking back a conservative majority in the House means:
* An America FIRST foreign policy agenda that prioritizes our nation's security above all else
* A strong and well-trained American military capable of protecting our beloved country
* Fair trade policies that benefit OUR economy (not China's!), protect small businesses, and lower taxes for American families

That's what's on the line right now -- and it's why we've activated _a**500% match** on all contributions made before MIDNIGHT tonight._
---
**500% Matching Activated**
---

---

---

---

The future of our nation is in your hands. Don't miss your opportunity to take a stand against the Radical Left, and help us take back the House for America First conservatives.

Thank you,

Mike Pompeo
70th United States Secretary of State

---

**ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP 'S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She's determined to ERASE Trump's legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump will run for PRESIDENT!_

We're facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. **[Can we count on you to step up?](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zsaolbe1o993boal7bvib9ns6eae7retel97ej6g_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cli64pr4c9h2bs "%%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%, can we count on you to step up?")**

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Humbly asking you to make a $5 contribution to Alex Padilla’s campaign for Senate in California. Give me a chance to explain why this request is so important.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Now that we beat our recall attempt, the anti-mask, anti-vax, anti-immigrant, far-right forces that tried to replace me are going to turn their attention to Alex.
#

Friends,
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to Senator Alex Padilla’s campaign. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today and for Alex — is so important.
Here is the truth:
In less than one week, Alex Padilla will close the books on an important official FEC fundraising deadline.
And now that we beat our recall attempt, the anti-mask, anti-vax, anti-immigrant, far-right forces that tried to replace me are going to turn their attention to Alex.
They would LOVE to take out California's first Latino Senator.
So when this deadline ends and Alex Padilla is legally required to report his fundraising numbers, they’ll be watching along with the press and everyone else.
That’s why I want to help Alex post a big number — one that will help keep him safe in the Senate. So I am asking:
[**Can you please make a $5 contribution to Alex Padilla’s campaign for U.S. Senate? Do it before his official FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-sep21?refcode=em210924-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=343_159979_1N6iqZ&akid=343%2E159979%2E1N6iqZ)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-sep21?refcode=em210924-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=343_159979_1N6iqZ&akid=343%2E159979%2E1N6iqZ)**
The Senate is better with Alex Padilla in office. It’s up to us to make sure he gets to serve a full term.
\- Gavin Newsom

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=343%2E159979%2E1N6iqZ)

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: It’s the filibuster or abortion rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Democrats in the Senate have the power to end the filibuster and ensure people across the country have the right to a safe, accessible abortion. And they must.
#
Peter, big news: **Pramila**** _just_****voted to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act through the House, advancing an urgent proposal that guarantees abortion as the right that it is.**
After Texas passed the most restrictive abortion law in the country and the Supreme Court let the cruel ban go into effect, Democrats needed to act. And thanks to our organizing, the House just did exactly that. But the Senate filibuster remains a dangerous roadblock to abortion rights in America.
Democrats in the Senate have the power to end the filibuster right now, pass this critical legislation, and ensure people across the country have the right to a safe, accessible abortion. _And they must._
[**If you agree with Pramila that we need to END the filibuster, protect abortion rights, and fight restrictive GOP policies, can you chip in $3 or more to fuel our fight to get this done before it’s too late?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/6644?refcode=em20210924-661&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=661%2E420207%2EBbqX4u)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/6644?refcode=em20210924-661&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=661%2E420207%2EBbqX4u)**
As one of the one in four women across America who have had an abortion, Pramila reminds us that terminating her pregnancy was not an easy choice — but it was her choice. That is what we need to preserve for every pregnant person across the country, and the Women’s Health Protection Act would make it happen.
This bill codifies the right to abortion care and the right of health care professionals to provide abortion care, free from unnecessary, punitive restrictions. It would also create a safeguard against abortion bans and medically unnecessary restrictions.
Senate Democrats MUST pass this bill not only to respond to the Texas law but to put an end to decades of efforts to repeal _Roe v. Wade_. It’s especially urgent as other states like Florida are moving quickly to pass similar bans. We can’t waste any more time: End the filibuster and pass laws to protect abortion rights, voting rights, the environment, and more.
[**Contribute $3 or anything you can to support Pramila’s work to end the filibuster and pass federal protections for abortion rights. The Texas ban is already in effect — we must take action right now.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/6644?refcode=em20210924-661&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=661%2E420207%2EBbqX4u)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/6644?refcode=em20210924-661&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=661%2E420207%2EBbqX4u)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210924-661-footer&t=24&refcode2=661_420207_BbqX4u&akid=661%2E420207%2EBbqX4u)**

body:
|
#
---
This is unbelievable, folks. **The Texas Secretary of State office is opening a “forensic audit” of the 2020 presidential election results in a shameless bid to stroke Trump’s ego and spread baseless doubt over the integrity of our democracy.** After multiple attacks on our right to vote, Texas lawmakers are now trying to conduct a sham audit in four of Texas’ largest counties: Harris, Collin, Dallas, and Tarrant. Make no mistake: this has nothing to do with election integrity and everything to do with fueling doubt in our democratic institutions. Faith in our democracy, in free-and-fair elections is the bedrock of our nation. The fact is that Dan Patrick and Greg Abbott are afraid to stand up for Texans who turned out in record numbers to have their voices heard at the ballot box. We cannot allow Texas leadership to attack our democracy to preserve their power. **This audit is a waste of taxpayer money based on lies, conspiracy theories, and corruption. name: Eden & Megan
subject: What a load of bullshit.
body:
We’re at risk of losing our reproductive freedom.

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36377589/307956755/1300596418?refcode=210924_FR_abortionrights-b_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyODI5NGE5LTczMWQtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iOWEYeJax4KhcVKVSkBsmjnu1uT8kK2CPRvX9TtTz00=)
---
Peter, since January, there have been over 561 abortion restrictions, including 165 abortion bans, introduced across 47 states.

As an organization run by three young women, we aren’t going to mince our words here: **_This is complete and utter bullshit._**

We watched in horror earlier this month as the Supreme Court refused to block the most restrictive abortion law in the country banning Texas abortions after 6 weeks of pregnancy.

And recently, it was announced that in December, the Supreme Court will hear a Mississippi abortion case determining if the state can legally ban abortions after 15 weeks.

**This is not the will of the people. And this shouldn’t be up for debate.**

Politicians shouldn’t be the ones deciding what people do with their bodies. And it’s not surprising that those harmed the most by these restrictive abortion laws are people who have low incomes, live in rural areas, and people of color.

**After decades of far-right extremists working relentlessly to overturn Roe v. Wade, marginalized folks are at the greatest risk if these conservatives succeed. **

_**At Barrier To Entry PAC, our working-class candidates know this and are committed to fighting for the fundamental right to reproductive justice.**_

[**Our candidates understand that women of color and people with low incomes face unique barriers to abortion access, and are committed to doing whatever it takes to see that ALL people have access to high-quality and affordable healthcare in their communities. clean_body: We’re at risk of losing our reproductive freedom. | | | = Peter, since January, there have been over 561 abortion restrictions, including 165 abortion bans, introduced across 47 states. As an organization run by three young women, we aren’t going to mince our words here: This is complete and utter bullshit. We watched in horror earlier this month as the Supreme Court refused to block the most restrictive abortion law in the country banning Texas abortions after 6 weeks of pregnancy. And recently, it was announced that in December, the Supreme Court will hear a Mississippi abortion case determining if the state can legally ban abortions after 15 weeks. This is not the will of the people. And this shouldn’t be up for debate. Politicians shouldn’t be the ones deciding what people do with their bodies. And it’s not surprising that those harmed the most by these restrictive abortion laws are people who have low incomes, live in rural areas, and people of color. After decades of far-right extremists working relentlessly to overturn Roe v. Wade, marginalized folks are at the greatest risk if these conservatives succeed. At Barrier To Entry PAC, our working-class candidates know this and are committed to fighting for the fundamental right to reproductive justice. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ____= __= __= __= __= Thanks for taking a stand and using your voice on behalf of ALL people across the country. We won’t give up. We will win. name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Tony Evers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
As you know, Republicans in Texas passed one of the most extreme anti-choice bills in the country, banning abortion after only six weeks. I had no idea I was even pregnant at six weeks -- most people don’t!

But Texas was just the tip of the iceberg. Here in Wisconsin, we have a near-total abortion ban on the books that was written more than 150 years ago. If _Roe v. Wade_ falls, abortion could become illegal in our state.

Now, here’s where it gets even worse: **GOP candidate for governor, Rebecca Kleefisch, pledged to sign a radical anti-choice bill similar to Texas’ if she defeats Tony Evers.**

Reproductive freedom in Wisconsin hinges on the outcome of the 2022 election. Republicans are already planning on pouring millions of dollars into our state to take back power and shut the door on abortion access. We need to fight back immediately, which is why I’m asking:

**[Will you split a donation between Tony Evers' re-election campaign and our work to defend reproductive freedom in Wisconsin? Anything you can give will help us gather the necessary resources to defeat Republicans up and down the ballot next year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36378585/307959348/196933152?refcode=em21_210924_abrtn_fndt_gq_30daygmail___SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210924_abrtn_fndt_gq_30daygmail___SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWExM2QzMS03NjFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8ON3o4z5JqM1rKvrcgoarVqCfP0BxV6-YyAY61yxgfg=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36378590/307959358/196933152?refcode=em21_210924_abrtn_fndt_gq_30daygmail___SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210924_abrtn_fndt_gq_30daygmail___SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWExM2QzMS03NjFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8ON3o4z5JqM1rKvrcgoarVqCfP0BxV6-YyAY61yxgfg=)

clean_body: As you know, Republicans in Texas passed one of the most extreme anti-choice bills in the country, banning abortion after only six weeks. I had no idea I was even pregnant at six weeks -- most people don’t! But Texas was just the tip of the iceberg. Here in Wisconsin, we have a near-total abortion ban on the books that was written more than 150 years ago. If Roe v. Wade falls, abortion could become illegal in our state. Now, here’s where it gets even worse: GOP candidate for governor, Rebecca Kleefisch, pledged to sign a radical anti-choice bill similar to Texas’ if she defeats Tony Evers. Reproductive freedom in Wisconsin hinges on the outcome of the 2022 election. Republicans are already planning on pouring millions of dollars into our state to take back power and shut the door on abortion access. We need to fight back immediately, which is why I’m asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = I will always fight for access to safe, legal abortion -- and I'm proud to live in a state with a pro-choice governor like Tony Evers who will keep defending our health, our families, and our rights no matter what. We’re going to have to fight hard to keep it that way. Thank you, as always, for taking action. — Sarah Godlewski Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: The House just took action to protect Roe v. Wade. I need you to urge the Senate to do the same.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=TJZjKNg1R40tMsgaqzwohnitVoTN%2BXRN&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend: Aided by the conservative majority of justices on the U.S. Supreme Court, the most restrictive ban on abortions in the country was allowed to go into effect in Texas. Overnight, the 48-year legal precedent of Roe v. Wade was effectively overturned - and at least ten Republican-led states have pledged to follow Texas' lead. They know this is not legal, so they are attempting guerilla tactics to get around the law.
In fact, a lawsuit has already been filed by a disbarred, convicted attorney from Arkansas - who admits to the $10,000 bounty being his motivation - against a medical professional in Texas. Others have followed suit. Is vigilante justice going to be our new normal?
**Federal inaction is no longer an option. Congress must intervene urgently to protect the future of reproductive justice.**
Thankfully, the House has already taken a major step to enshrine women's healthcare into law: The House just passed the companion legislation to my bill, the Women's Health Protection Act, to protect safe, legal abortion care no matter what courts or right-wing state lawmakers try to do. **Today, I need you to join me in urging the Senate to do the same.**
Now, we know the realities of what we're working with: Democratic Senate control is maintained by the tie-casting vote of Vice President Harris, and Republicans are able to wield the filibuster to block meaningful legislation from moving forward. But there is simply too much on the line for Democrats to let an arcane Senate rule stand in the way of safe reproductive healthcare for millions of Americans. To protect the right to choose, the filibuster must be eliminated.
Friend, you may have spoken out once, twice, dozens of times before. Moments like this - where _Roe v. Wade_ 's precedent could evaporate before our eyes - demand that we keep speaking out. I simply cannot pass the Women's Health Protection Act without your grassroots activism. **So before 11:59 p.m. tonight, I 'm counting on you and 750 members of this team to make their voices heard. Please respond:**
**[Click here to add your name and support eliminating the filibuster to protect the right to choose](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-WHPA-Filibuster?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1074-su-nd)**
Thank you,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=vRMxdzzao%2BPjCE1sB0sHZ3itVoTN%2BXRN&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

body:
Do you support President Biden's international leadership to fight COVID-19?
| | | **BREAKING NEWS: President Biden unveils plan to help end global pandemic** | [POLL: Do You Support President Biden's Leadership to Defeat COVID-19? ](https://links.e.dccc.)

[RESPONSE:](https://links.e.dccc.)[ PENDING
ID: dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://links.e.dccc.)
[SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

**We 're so proud of President Biden's global leadership.**

**He just unveiled a new plan to help vaccinate millions of people across the globe and end this deadly pandemic once and for all!**

It's simple: President Biden knows we can't hope to defeat COVID-19 here at home until we defeat it in every corner of the world.

That's why he's working to strengthen our alliances and lead the way on international vaccination efforts.

**But Trump and his Republicans spurned our global allies when they were in power -- and have spread misinformation about vaccines at home and abroad.**

_Under no circumstances can we allow them to reclaim power just as the world begins to emerge from COVID-19 's shadow._

**That 's why we're collecting critical data on where our best supporters stand.**

[**So before midnight, let us know: Do you SUPPORT President Biden 's international leadership to defeat COVID-19?**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/AGmXQymw-)

[SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-)
Thank you,

DCCC

body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36379399/307961624/-2023814932?refcode=20210924.5_TM_9FA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTBkOWM0OS03ODFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uTTUTLNsDKEo9jugEmM7DndGfi3CvzcJia3uA9qXgTY=)

| | Derek,

I’m sorry to bother you, but it’s important. Early voting has already begun and _**a recent poll shows me behind Trump-endorsed Glenn Youngkin.**_

Our fundraising has completely stalled out over the last couple days and I need your help so we can kick it into high gear before the end of September.

_**[Please contribute anything you can afford right now. Your contribution goes directly toward our efforts to turn out voters, defend Virginia’s progress, and stop Donald Trump.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36379400/307961625/-2023814932?refcode=20210924.5_TM_9FA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTBkOWM0OS03ODFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uTTUTLNsDKEo9jugEmM7DndGfi3CvzcJia3uA9qXgTY=)**_

If you’re like me, you’re getting a lot of fundraising emails right now. I don’t doubt the urgency of those races, but let me tell you why no race is more important than Virginia in 2021.

For the last decade, Virginia Democrats have led the nation by delivering victory after victory for working families.

Right now all of that progress is under attack. If my opponent Glenn Youngkin becomes Virginia’s governor, he’ll roll back every inch we fought so hard for.

Let’s be clear, Glenn Youngkin is a right-wing Trump acolyte. He wants to ban abortion, he pushes Trump’s big lie, and if he becomes Governor, he’ll put more guns on our streets.

Moreover, Donald Trump has endorsed Youngkin three separate times. If Youngkin wins, Trump’s 2024 presidential run will get a huge momentum boost heading into 2022.

Our fundraising has completely stalled out over the last couple days and I need your help so we can kick it into high gear before the end of September. = If you’re like me, you’re getting a lot of fundraising emails right now. I don’t doubt the urgency of those races, but let me tell you why no race is more important than Virginia in 2021. For the last decade, Virginia Democrats have led the nation by delivering victory after victory for working families. Right now all of that progress is under attack. If my opponent Glenn Youngkin becomes Virginia’s governor, he’ll roll back every inch we fought so hard for. Let’s be clear, Glenn Youngkin is a right-wing Trump acolyte. He wants to ban abortion, he pushes Trump’s big lie, and if he becomes Governor, he’ll put more guns on our streets. Moreover, Donald Trump has endorsed Youngkin three separate times. name: Warner HQ
subject: Broadband is the 21st century
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Whether you live in a rural county or in a city or suburb, we all know Virginians just won’t be able to compete in the 21st century without broadband internet access

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36379672/307962380/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmIzOTIyMS03YTFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9Dt1lXOkCENRA_gZzL2g1BWLA1AxNP8tGMTP-8VeGE=&emci=7e859f1a-6a1d-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=16b39221-7a1d-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=4568237)

| | There’s no question that today’s economy is increasingly digital, Derek: Whether you live in a rural county or in a city or suburb, we all know Virginians just won’t be able to compete in the 21st century without broadband internet access. From his early days as a technology entrepreneur to his service as Virginia’s governor and now Senator, Mark Warner has spent his career working to get folks across the Commonwealth online. And the pandemic has shown that these efforts are more critical than ever. That’s why Senator Warner personally worked to secure a $10 billion investment -- including $220 million for Virginia -- to support broadband expansion through the American Rescue Plan. Senator Warner is always willing to work across the aisle, but here’s the simple truth: **not a single Senate Republican voted for the American Rescue Plan that expands broadband.** _That means the fight to make broadband internet accessible to every American depends on preserving our Democratic majorities. Not only do we need to keep the Senate blue, we need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot this November and keep the Virginia Assembly and the Virginia governor’s seat blue._ **_[Derek, can Mark count on you in these fights? Pitch in $5 or more right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36379673/307962381/-225353173?refcode=mw_em_210924_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmIzOTIyMS03YTFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9Dt1lXOkCENRA_gZzL2g1BWLA1AxNP8tGMTP-8VeGE=)_** Thanks, Team Warner **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36379674/307962382/-225353173?refcode=mw_em_210924_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmIzOTIyMS03YTFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9Dt1lXOkCENRA_gZzL2g1BWLA1AxNP8tGMTP-8VeGE=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Nearly 100%
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Soto is a clone of Ilhan |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b980eafb53&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

I've always said that you can tell who a person is by their actions.

Darren Soto, the Democrat Congressman from Florida's 9th District, showed us exactly who he is. He's no moderate, he votes like a Squad member!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am the Christian patriot and combat vet [running to take back a tossup district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1b974fb4d1&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in the Orlando area. It's currently held by Darren Soto, a Democrat who does the bidding of the Squad!**

Most people don't know Darren Soto. He's not what you would call, a "leader".

But When the chips are down, he votes nearly 100% of the time with Squad member Ilhan Omar.

That's right. The same crazy who says the reason conservative native born Americans are afraid of massive illegal immigration is because we “are afraid to be outshined“ by those immigrants sneaking across our border.

Hard to believe Ilhan Omar is sitting in Congress, isn't it?

So why is Darren Soto, a career politician who tells us election after election that he is "moderate", voting nearly 100% with Ilhan Omar?
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=16b4bd0c99&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Soto sponsored legislation to throw open our borders wide open earlier this year, to give 11 million illegal immigrants citizenship!

This from his own website:

_“After four years of President Trump’s unrelenting agenda of hatred and xenophobia against immigrants, we can now rest assured that we will have an immigration system centered on humanity, unity and opportunity. The priorities laid forth in the U.S. Citizenship Act of 2021 are a reflection of the critical role immigrant communities play in the prosperity and social fabric of our nation. We applaud President Biden’s legislation with Congresswoman Sanchez to provide a pathway to citizenship for 11 million undocumented immigrants, including DACA recipients, TPS holders and agricultural workers. Going forward, we will continue to work with President Biden to advance a bold vision for comprehensive immigration reform. This is only the beginning.”_

He thinks giving 11 million illegal immigrants citizenship is the beginning?!?

**I am the proud husband to a LEGAL immigrant, one who came here the right way. And this isn't it.**

Radicals like Soto and Omar are why the border is thrown totally open, why there is continuing humanitarian crisis and why President Trump's strong border policies have been discarded.

**When Soto votes 100% with Ilhan Omar, he's a radical. And he needs to be replaced in this dead-even Florida district!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=422842a515&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **Gov. DeSantis has Florida on the right path. But America as a whole is on the WAY wrong path, thanks to the Democrats in DC.**

Ilhan Omar is an enemy of our country. She is what we need to fight against. She and Pelosi and AOC will destroy this country if they can.

The proof? Look at what is happening now! Border crisis, inflation, Afghanistan.... need I go on?

And Darren Soto is right there, cheering them on, voting 100% with all of it.

**Throw them all out, I say.**

_Why aren't Republicans in Congress pushing back against Joe Biden? _We must use the power of Congress to challenge and restrain Biden.

_I will stand up for America against Biden. Darren Soto will not. _Elect me and let's impeach him!

We need stronger leaders in Congress, patriots, to help! [Help me get elected and impeach Biden!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=82b7e96ade&e=afa21b7626)

[I must raise $25k by the end of this month for my end-of-quarter deadline. I have just $5,900 more to go. Will you help me get there by contributing right now?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=9dec79dfa3&e=afa21b7626)

Time to stop the Squad and their enablers. Lets put a real check on Biden.

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=46604e7871&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2b79196e64&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=22f73f3574&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. [I have a big deadline coming up at the end of this month and need to raise $25k before then. Can you help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=0c647bff3f&e=afa21b7626)

name: Adnan Mohamed
subject: Virginia is officially a toss-up!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ONE COMMONWEALTH PAC
body:
We just heard that FiveThirtyEight is shifting their rating in Virginia to a toss-up! They said the national environment is souring for Democrats, which could affect us at the ballot box, and both public & private polling shows an “increasingly close race.” | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36379679/307962413/-1309710229?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzYzMjFmNC03OTFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NKXDJQPXyQieBOO4_M6RPs18Ka9EpcqzEaVvNgQiMWQ=&emci=074a9921-791d-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=e36321f4-791d-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=9499186) | Hey everyone, **We just heard that FiveThirtyEight is shifting their rating in Virginia to a toss-up!** They said the national environment is souring for Democrats, which could affect us at the ballot box, and both public & private polling shows an “increasingly close race.” Data analysts and polling experts keep telling us that the Attorney General’s race is expected to be even closer than the Governor’s race, so we’re in danger of losing this campaign unless we have the resources to get our message out over the final six weeks and get out the vote! body:
WebbforArkansas.com
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015N_edN7JE5a3fUjmYbrbD71OWZsTuSgS2YWQysz0CFjN4X3NtuSqXV27kUyGKUB-6BjHJh3lng9itrV7onfTnI8GVSW75PoAr3OmB14NXMh1HLqlz_IXKSzt5u7E4Y5isTvsdSpHQUDi57GUcxt4j9SuiBLYCg07&c=2pt4JNd3o4f-UZg34RwYQFz-5v7ed9f3MeeKwHTXVfhBNBibzU-7Wg==&ch=CLzzh8tM62ikv6Si_PZUVV7_zN6MmUw3l3Y_v6fmBG9d8C_UpAWYqw==)
---
|
---
| | Hello Peter,
It's been another busy week on the campaign trail!
My team and I continue to be crisscrossing our beautiful State of Arkansas and sharing my message to be the next Lieutenant Governor.
We need someone who is willing to put service above self, and the interest of our state above their own self-interest.
Your support still means the world to me. Take a look at some of our latest stops along the campaign trail:
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015N_edN7JE5a3fUjmYbrbD71OWZsTuSgS2YWQysz0CFjN4X3NtuSqXWdW-Aus4ovvrEdd_OQFsHBYG-WHzZ-ifaH6AtDauhM-UcWdMREaYplvnls7C40HEYBwzfF15tdlsMsuhBNlpfhBGaijaxAmzsdh2fC2C2M9&c=2pt4JNd3o4f-UZg34RwYQFz-5v7ed9f3MeeKwHTXVfhBNBibzU-7Wg==&ch=CLzzh8tM62ikv6Si_PZUVV7_zN6MmUw3l3Y_v6fmBG9d8C_UpAWYqw==)
---
| | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015N_edN7JE5a3fUjmYbrbD71OWZsTuSgS2YWQysz0CFjN4X3NtuSqXWdW-Aus4ovvrEdd_OQFsHBYG-WHzZ-ifaH6AtDauhM-UcWdMREaYplvnls7C40HEYBwzfF15tdlsMsuhBNlpfhBGaijaxAmzsdh2fC2C2M9&c=2pt4JNd3o4f-UZg34RwYQFz-5v7ed9f3MeeKwHTXVfhBNBibzU-7Wg==&ch=CLzzh8tM62ikv6Si_PZUVV7_zN6MmUw3l3Y_v6fmBG9d8C_UpAWYqw==)
---
| White County Lincoln/Reagan Dinner | Searcy, AR
---
It's always a pleasure to see many friends and supporters, like with the White County Republican Committee. There is no doubt that our party is fired up for next November!
---
| | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015N_edN7JE5a3fUjmYbrbD71OWZsTuSgS2YWQysz0CFjN4X3NtuSqXWdW-Aus4ovvrEdd_OQFsHBYG-WHzZ-ifaH6AtDauhM-UcWdMREaYplvnls7C40HEYBwzfF15tdlsMsuhBNlpfhBGaijaxAmzsdh2fC2C2M9&c=2pt4JNd3o4f-UZg34RwYQFz-5v7ed9f3MeeKwHTXVfhBNBibzU-7Wg==&ch=CLzzh8tM62ikv6Si_PZUVV7_zN6MmUw3l3Y_v6fmBG9d8C_UpAWYqw==)
---
| Honoring A Republican Stalwart | Arkadelphia, AR
---
Anyone worth their salt knows Anita Cabe and the dedication to the Republican Party she and her late husband Charles shared. Recently Henderson University honored their commitment with the new Charles & Anita Cabe Student-Athlete Success Center pictured here.
---
| | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015N_edN7JE5a3fUjmYbrbD71OWZsTuSgS2YWQysz0CFjN4X3NtuSqXWdW-Aus4ovvrEdd_OQFsHBYG-WHzZ-ifaH6AtDauhM-UcWdMREaYplvnls7C40HEYBwzfF15tdlsMsuhBNlpfhBGaijaxAmzsdh2fC2C2M9&c=2pt4JNd3o4f-UZg34RwYQFz-5v7ed9f3MeeKwHTXVfhBNBibzU-7Wg==&ch=CLzzh8tM62ikv6Si_PZUVV7_zN6MmUw3l3Y_v6fmBG9d8C_UpAWYqw==)
---
| Cleburne County Republican Women Remember 9/11 | Quitman, AR
---
I remember where I was on 9/11 as acting Governor Win Rockefeller called to let me know our nation was under attack and to ask my advice. That day serves as a reminder that experience in the worst of times matters.
---

| Izard County Republican Committee | Melbourne, AR
---
As Chairman of the Republican Party for 12 years I know more than anyone the importance of county committees. They serve as the backbone of community engagement, and I was glad to see a full room in Izard County!
---
| | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015N_edN7JE5a3fUjmYbrbD71OWZsTuSgS2YWQysz0CFjN4X3NtuSqXWdW-Aus4ovvrEdd_OQFsHBYG-WHzZ-ifaH6AtDauhM-UcWdMREaYplvnls7C40HEYBwzfF15tdlsMsuhBNlpfhBGaijaxAmzsdh2fC2C2M9&c=2pt4JNd3o4f-UZg34RwYQFz-5v7ed9f3MeeKwHTXVfhBNBibzU-7Wg==&ch=CLzzh8tM62ikv6Si_PZUVV7_zN6MmUw3l3Y_v6fmBG9d8C_UpAWYqw==)
---
| 1st District Republican Meeting | Batesville, AR
---

Peter, Republicans have worked for decades to suppress the vote.

They know it's the only way they can win — _they’re cheating because they can’t win when they play fair!_

But thankfully, good Democrats like Mark Takano are doing something about it.

The Freedom to Vote Act is the solution to protecting our democracy and ensuring every American has true access to the ballot box.

**But now, Senate Republicans are holding up the process.** [**We need 5,000 Democrats to sign our petition DEMANDING the Senate abolish the filibuster and pass The Freedom to Vote Act, the essential voter reform legislation, NOW! »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36380021/307963715/1584821830?refcode=MTFC_20210924_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjQwNzg2MC03YTFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MIYdWqhl0zLv_WOpnWk2QouK9ERsShCMHwYo8AHFD54=&emci=29c8dc46-6e1d-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=e2407860-7a1d-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=18839602) | [SIGN IMMEDIATELY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36380022/307963716/1584821830?refcode=MTFC_20210924_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjQwNzg2MC03YTFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MIYdWqhl0zLv_WOpnWk2QouK9ERsShCMHwYo8AHFD54=&emci=29c8dc46-6e1d-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=e2407860-7a1d-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=18839602)

name: Susie Lee
subject: As a former athlete, I’ve never been afraid of competition. That’s why I’m ready to fight for NV-03 and that’s why I’m counting on this team to help us reach our end-of-quarter fundraising goal.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36380405/307964780/-1528880522?refcode=SL_headerlogoAB&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmI2M2UwZi03YjFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J68ihFEa-CPAhrfKL2pAZdTEIbKEjaKyk-6WjyqML8k=)

| | Folks, In less than a week, my campaign is facing our end-of-quarter public fundraising deadline, and [**I’m about to ask you to chip in to help us keep Nevada blue in 2022**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36380407/307964782/202043539?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210924_FR_EOQ1_B1_SUBJ_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmI2M2UwZi03YjFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J68ihFEa-CPAhrfKL2pAZdTEIbKEjaKyk-6WjyqML8k=) \-- but first, I want to talk to you about what's motivating me in this race. When I was young I started swimming and would go to practice every day after school because it was the one sport where my mom could drop off all 8 of her children at once. I later became a distance swimmer, and my dedication to the sport taught me real-world lessons about **grit, determination, and perseverance.** Those lessons still stick with me today. It took **grit** when I ran for Congress in the most competitive district in Nevada to fight for hardworking families -- and with the help of this team, we won. It takes **determination** to wake up every day and go to Washington to fight for the things that matter to my constituents, and fulfill my promise to bring a bipartisan, productive approach to Congress. And now, it’s going to take **perseverance** to defend NV-03 in 2022. In order to win this fight and keep Nevada blue, I need the support of this team to help me build a solid foundation for this critically important race. **National Republicans have already spent over a million dollars to unseat me** \-- and if any of my five Republican opponents win NV-03, **they will do everything they can to stop legislation that will improve the lives of all Nevadans.** Maybe it’s the former athlete in me, but I’m not afraid of a little competition. I’m going to keep fighting each and every day to improve the quality of our public education, protect our environment against climate change, and make health care affordable and accessible to every American. **[My Republican opponents would love nothing more than for us to miss our goal for this public FEC fundraising deadline, which is why I want to make this our strongest quarter to date. clean_body: | = | | Folks, In less than a week, my campaign is facing our end-of-quarter public fundraising deadline, and = \-- but first, I want to talk to you about what's motivating me in this race. When I was young I started swimming and would go to practice every day after school because it was the one sport where my mom could drop off all 8 of her children at once. I later became a distance swimmer, and my dedication to the sport taught me real-world lessons about grit, determination, and perseverance. Those lessons still stick with me today. It took grit when I ran for Congress in the most competitive district in Nevada to fight for hardworking families -- and with the help of this team, we won. It takes determination to wake up every day and go to Washington to fight for the things that matter to my constituents, and fulfill my promise to bring a bipartisan, productive approach to Congress. And now, it’s going to take perseverance to defend NV-03 in 2022. In order to win this fight and keep Nevada blue, I need the support of this team to help me build a solid foundation for this critically important race. National Republicans have already spent over a million dollars to unseat me \-- and if any of my five Republican opponents win NV-03, they will do everything they can to stop legislation that will improve the lives of all Nevadans. Maybe it’s the former athlete in me, but I’m not afraid of a little competition. I’m going to keep fighting each and every day to improve the quality of our public education, protect our environment against climate change, and make health care affordable and accessible to every American. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = There’s so much at stake in this race and I’m not backing down -- and I hope you won’t either. Hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants have overwhelmed our Border Patrol agents, and they have already apprehended people from 60 different countries trying to illegally enter the United States.

The worst part is that _**there have been illegal aliens apprehended from NINE different countries on America’s Terrorist Watch List**_. These countries include Afghanistan, China, Iran, Syria, and Yemen. [**REGAIN CONTROL OF OUR BORDER**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/5076752850f4d12d/8dd2570f4cae6ba6c3d6b838967d376c/35903) This failing Administration has dismantled all of President Trump’s hard work on securing our borders.

**President Biden is speaking out against our Border Patrol Agents at a time when they’re the only thing standing in the way of terrorists getting a free pass!** And when asked why immigrants aren’t being screened, Jen Psaki claims they don’t need to prove their vaccination status since “they’re not intending to stay here.”

_Are they clueless or do they really think Americans are buying their excuses?_ [**STOP BIDEN’S FAILING PRESIDENCY – DONATE NOW**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/5076752850f4d12d/6f024c292ec5df27c3d6b838967d376c/35903) **Peter, President Biden is more focused on appeasing the radical left’s pet projects with his $3T spending bill than keeping Americans safe.** [**We need to send a clear message NOW that this won’t be tolerated. Instead of securing our border and addressing skyrocketing inflation, he’s putting Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and Kamala Harris behind the wheel.

The gross incompetence of those in power needs to come to an end. **[Can I count on you to help me take back the Senate and stop the left from destroying our country even more?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/5076752850f4d12d/3c23a9107066479dc3d6b838967d376c/35903)** Thanks for your support,

Dear Peter,
Last week, we asked for your support as we near our BIG End-of-Quarter deadline.
I didn't see your name on the list of supporters who stepped up to fight back against Washington D.C.'s far-left agenda.
Congress and the White House are under the control of one-party rule.
Only the Attorneys General have the ability to block their radical and unconstitutional policies. **That's why we need to get strong NOW.**
Mike Bloomberg, Tom Steyer, and George Soros will be looking at our fundraising report to gauge our strength and determine how to push back against our efforts.
_**I am hopeful that you'll step up today, George, and prevent them from trying to attack us.**_

clean_body: | | | | We're raising the stakes. You in? Dear Peter, Last week, we asked for your support as we near our BIG End-of-Quarter deadline. I didn't see your name on the list of supporters who stepped up to fight back against Washington D.C.'s far-left agenda. Congress and the White House are under the control of one-party rule. Only the Attorneys General have the ability to block their radical and unconstitutional policies. That's why we need to get strong NOW. Mike Bloomberg, Tom Steyer, and George Soros will be looking at our fundraising report to gauge our strength and determine how to push back against our efforts. I am hopeful that you'll step up today, George, and prevent them from trying to attack us. A few of our supporters know how important this quarterly deadline is, which is why they are offering a 500% BONUS MATCH TODAY ONLY. We're close to crushing our fundraising numbers and raising the dough. Your help would make a HUGE DIFFERENCE! | | | | | Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General | Follow us on Social Media ****|****|****|****|** Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. name: Lauren Micek Vargas
subject: Let me tell you about Tony
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
|
---

| | [**_I know it’s almost the weekend. But I promised my husband, Tony, that I’d lend him a hand today. I’m about to explain why flipping this seat is so important and why I’m confident Tony can pull this off. But if you’re short on time, will you chip in $10 now to support him? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36380826/307966242/1129282168?refcode=20210924_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGY3OTY3YS03YzFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rj4tZHEySxIiIc1a_AJDUDgCJpyYrXMJzS1_5WbYzHE=)

Since he launched his campaign for Congress, Tony has been working day and night.

— Knocking on doors to meet voters
— Connecting with local businesses and community organizations
— Raising money to keep his campaign running
— _On top of helping me raise our two young kids!_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36380827/307966243/1129282168?refcode=20210924_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGY3OTY3YS03YzFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rj4tZHEySxIiIc1a_AJDUDgCJpyYrXMJzS1_5WbYzHE=) That's just how Tony is.

[**_When Tony believes in something, he doesn’t stop until he gets the job done. And right now, I know in my heart that our neighbors need a fighter like Tony in Congress. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36380828/307966244/1129282168?refcode=20210924_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGY3OTY3YS03YzFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rj4tZHEySxIiIc1a_AJDUDgCJpyYrXMJzS1_5WbYzHE=)

Like Tony, I’ve dedicated my life to public service.

I started out as a Special Education teacher and decided to go to law school so I could do more to help my students and their families.

Now I run a local non-profit dedicated to helping families with children with disabilities get the support they need to be successful at school.

Tony and I are both driven by a mission to help others, in whatever way we can.

That’s the kind of representation that our neighbors deserve from their Congressman.

Don Bacon has acted against the best interests of our community so many times, with his votes to repeal access to affordable healthcare and cut taxes for billionaires and wealthy corporations.

clean_body: | | Derek- This is your morning wake up call that VIRGINIA IS NOT A SOLID BLUE STATE. Cook Political Report just moved Virginia from a Tilt D state to a "Toss Up." So Democrats everywhere are sounding the alarm. It is all hands on deck from now until November 2: | 2017 and 2019 were not the luck of the draw. It was hard work and dedication from everyday Virginians and Democrats that made it possible. Everyone is waiting for the cavalry to arrive but the thing is: we are the cavalry we are waiting for. We must protect Virginia and our Democratic Trifecta, while electing our progressive candidates up and down the ballot. Only the people on the ground can help make that happen. That is why we need you (yes YOU) to help us here in Virginia. So we need you to help out, anyway you can. I’m writing to you today to thank you for everything you’ve done to support our America First Movement. In recoginition of your hard work and devotion to our cause, I want to extend to you an exclusive offer to join the Chairman’s Club : a select group of Republicans, hand-picked by me. This is a rare honor, Peter, and I am not offering to every Republican. But your efforts stood out above the rest, and so I’d like you to join this exclusive grouop. | CHAIRMAN’S CLUB MEMBERSHIP OFFER EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #05966106 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $10 or more | | | | | | | I’m going to be reviewing the list of members this evening, Peter. body:
Joe Biden has done nothing but embarrass and weaken our nation in the past 9 months. |
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b019760a4c474a7ab806d2e9ee844564&_e=VUyRZ7o8kXZ0QsyCFe6HcLmsaY01TG_feR_U7VuwAw-jM92XcVtu9CMQH5pS_TIlXNh3EPQHHOpQ0l0TZB3D8wsbqA0ZSlw-Dohpp0Ko3cjV3rSNpzHJoNQs4XCuth1Ovv1mvqJzR_j8TBfQ7HMcruN-Fd48AquYpFtI8l7F__1cjk3shuTl8BsrntBNLhLQH2kdYvbY6nr6kzGt5GQojPVaepgV1Yx4fvjJoug2tiYsHcQ9Z_K2XAungtFX8CSTwhrCyWR76TDjKEgPIF6O-Y1mo2I8i3dxW5IDIXWscWyaaJ_lkOaynZnvW_ua41KZyLYT6B0zB_P7NTnZknpEQykdBk-FB5_cgmM12yR4UHAmU0UQuDYaAM5heuQ8iP00qHfjiUYPoKny586MErkbxq_OtyJPirMlJaBqf0BFKlrh7tfOsIhJZ6E4gIABM4Mw)

---
Peter,

**Joe Biden has gotten too many passes, too many second chances, and his only accomplishment is failing our nation.** He’s failed as a leader and done nothing but throw our country into disarray while embarrassing us on a national scale.

Right now, myself and so many of my fellow service members keep asking questions like: Why has Joe Biden allowed this chaos and death to happen in Afghanistan? Why did he put troops back on the ground in a vulnerable location, and then tell the entire world where to find them? Why did he allow billions of dollars worth of military equipment and technology to fall into the hands of our enemies? How long until Iran or China gets ahold of that technology to exploit and use against us?

**None of us will ever get a straight answer from a lifelong politician like Joe Biden. Unlike this President and so many of his liberal lackeys in the Senate, I served my country in uniform instead of a suit. I served in Iraq, in Afghanistan, and** __**this President has done nothing but fail our nation, turn his back on our troops, and lie to us all with false promises.**__

Joe Biden’s fellow Democrats in Congress, like Senator Bennet, have let him slide on every mistake he’s made. Yet every single news organization from CNN to Fox News is unanimous in describing Joe Biden's actions as failures, the reason Afghanistan has fallen, and why people have died.

My fellow soldiers and I didn’t fight for our country just to have a feckless and weak government making our nation more dangerous both outside and inside our borders. That needs to end, and [**I aim to do that in the United States Senate.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b019760a4c474a7ab806d2e9ee844564&_e=VUyRZ7o8kXZ0QsyCFe6HcLmsaY01TG_feR_U7VuwAw-jM92XcVtu9CMQH5pS_TIlXNh3EPQHHOpQ0l0TZB3D8wsbqA0ZSlw-Dohpp0Ko3cjV3rSNpzHJoNQs4XCuth1Ovv1mvqJzR_j8TBfQ7HMcruN-Fd48AquYpFtI8l7F__1cjk3shuTl8BsrntBNLhLQH2kdYvbY6nr6kzGt5GQojMmPzyhQfb0JqOBqDznuFNUCEFmiTBwa11TYc3z9eZaNI8rQoLXzCbtFOFzNfBFo078h0zmrdtIXINo4EHHIWx7SlZKXmS9CPxyAzth94Ft5a29-wNcN_u7Id44tZlj0t3poJoE5QEhGp50HHulIInXPwSE_1HVtmsHJm03fTegagz8_rMhuEYYqivFjrk8ae0bSEErNRVz90zbyDEzb3W1skABgo7Zg3nJkqjZI1Xzx)

Our nation deserves better than the failures of Joe Biden and his fellow Democrats. They’ve barely been in charge for 8 months and they keep failing our nation. Enough is enough.

Right now, I need your help to win back the Majority in the United States Senate. We don’t need any more elitist politicians who embarrass our nation on the world stage, we need conservatives who want to help our nation get back on its feet.

**If you agree, then** [**join me**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b019760a4c474a7ab806d2e9ee844564&_e=VUyRZ7o8kXZ0QsyCFe6HcLmsaY01TG_feR_U7VuwAw-jM92XcVtu9CMQH5pS_TIlXNh3EPQHHOpQ0l0TZB3D8wsbqA0ZSlw-Dohpp0Ko3cjV3rSNpzHJoNQs4XCuth1Ovv1mvqJzR_j8TBfQ7HMcruN-Fd48AquYpFtI8l7F__1cjk3shuTl8BsrntBNLhLQH2kdYvbY6nr6kzGt5GQojNUK65BVU3D0ixXCg8ja09vUzNTLsUbqPyTDIr1doIGRsiqBsMyrNgqB4u39_gx4_voqMtYbOkvUxsSvmOBomNphrZQ86IUWb_2i6pQ7LcI_AIDIMpn3x2Sw48xv7XsJUp6_B8DH0d7ul-euquG67cVsjfrJ1RxTcOca8kdfiah9Jr6H_eVjAVZmYRC2yrlI37i_HGhYsTfp9SGeaNQZtB9005xJfexfD6QIJUEtMvcj) **in the fight to take back the U.S. Senate so we can start holding Joe Biden responsible for his failures**.

Friend,

Texas has been in the news a lot lately, and none of it has been good. This time, it's just beyond ridiculous.

In 2020, the indicted attorney general spent 22,000 hours, funded by taxpayers, auditing the 2020 election without finding a single case that resulted in jail time. **Now, the secretary of state's office is auditing four counties' election results -- just because Trump asked for it _(Trump won Texas!)._**

The GOP is relentless in their pursuit of control. First they passed voter suppression law SB1, then they went after reproductive healthcare with SB8 and now, they want to audit an election that the Texas secretary of state, who oversaw the 2020 election and was appointed by the GOP governor declared "smooth and secure."

clean_body: Here's what the secretary of state's office is doing -- just because Trump asked for it! | = Texas secretary of state's office is now auditing 2020 elections after Trump request \- Texas Tribune = | = Friend, Texas has been in the news a lot lately, and none of it has been good. This time, it's just beyond ridiculous. In 2020, the indicted attorney general spent 22,000 hours, funded by taxpayers, auditing the 2020 election without finding a single case that resulted in jail time. Now, the secretary of state's office is auditing four counties' election results -- just because Trump asked for it (Trump won Texas!). The GOP is relentless in their pursuit of control. First they passed voter suppression law SB1, then they went after reproductive healthcare with SB8 and now, they want to audit an election that the Texas secretary of state, who oversaw the 2020 election and was appointed by the GOP governor declared "smooth and secure." We must fight back by making sure Texans are aware of what is happening and taking our economic message for working families to voters' doors. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Let's break the GOP's ironclad grip on Texas once and for all.
