body:
President Trump is headed to Georgia this Saturday! Our team is looking forward to welcoming the president to the Peach State for the first time since President Trump is headed to Georgia this Saturday! Our team is looking forward to welcoming the president to the Peach State for the first time since I received his endorsement for the United States Senate. |
---
Peter,

**PRESIDENT TRUMP IS HOLDING A RALLY ON SATURDAY, SEPTEMBER 25TH, AND I'M PERSONALLY INVITING YOU TO BE A PART OF THE WELCOME COMMITTEE. WHETHER YOU LIVE IN GEORGIA OR NOT, IT'S IMPORTANT PRESIDENT TRUMP KNOWS YOU SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS TO FLIP GEORGIA'S SENATE SEAT RED AND STOP THE RADICAL DEMOCRAT AGENDA. WE DON'T HAVE MUCH TIME BEFORE HE LANDS HERE IN THE PEACH STATE, SO MAKE SURE TO ACCEPT YOUR INVITATION RIGHT NOW.**
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=def64d4ba10549c29fd52a58b031850b&_e=L6o3zNH7pS37J_QLkXNGLbPBtIblKM5QX2ZKK3Hmsbn6_8dSy1B67RTqEjPadHODQTYv9Sd24Lri0LmvqoXsqyCqNOVt3RdEFQCh39XA26TiWKjDi-ERF_xoFXr6ctq2H334Kti90FT0G9iP6Q6vxd2FKsI7IYfb-Ads5vVXVsikzUO7_hBXQQkHbsSDElG_B5aR2XRHlIULEphmct2f9154GiaoXJeYW2bzbbMgxkTGyQD1Xvz4dVH--YUVtpnQ9SHfSOFxv3RnrzmhK3FV6xk0xZxJvHhSGaiRSbAGJhrg7oElesf8bSZvLS0tZWO7Dp3K931OpSkwxtMtVXcC-XiLevEWKYTHi7COXSLLDQQ4lM_ifvZ4egTPEL__kis8MxxOO86SKBDq2rnLXje9yvVwfui-3mOwO_XXOJ7qnjtU3_a-7r8Nu7I0VYgEuAGh2ThHVQjuNUHOUzNezPS3dhyGaExjXHEM4XGD_6-37nzddU8TG02DiQe09veyS0zSLOFlXJ4tuCmCBgnbhhu4O6iB-Kvx_gzezx7pYcc3bY-YLfygIVd0vIFUed4vh6Xn)
President Trump hasn't held a rally in Georgia since January, and the feeling here on the ground is one of excitement. I'm going to be in the crowd cheering the president as he takes the podium. I hope that if you're in Georgia **you will make an effort to be there as well!**

Democrats, Republicans and Independents know control of the Senate runs through Georgia, which is why President Trump is making appearances in our state a priority. Last year, Democrat special interest groups spent more than $100 million dollars to squeak out the narrowest of wins for their candidates; **it's imperative we deny them another victory next year.**

Flipping the Senate seat temporarily occupied by Raphael Warnock is critical if we're going to restore a Republican majority in Washington. Democrats are running amuck and leading our nation into bankruptcy. **[We need to know if you agree and if you're going to stand with President Trump and me as we work to ensure a Republican victory in Georgia next fall.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=def64d4ba10549c29fd52a58b031850b&_e=L6o3zNH7pS37J_QLkXNGLbPBtIblKM5QX2ZKK3Hmsbn6_8dSy1B67RTqEjPadHODQTYv9Sd24Lri0LmvqoXsqyCqNOVt3RdEFQCh39XA26TiWKjDi-ERF_xoFXr6ctq2H334Kti90FT0G9iP6Q6vxd2FKsI7IYfb-Ads5vVXVsikzUO7_hBXQQkHbsSDElG_B5aR2XRHlIULEphmct2f9154GiaoXJeYW2bzbbMgxkTGyQD1Xvz4dVH--YUVtpnQ9SHfSOFxv3RnrzmhK3FV6xk0xZxJvHhSGaiRSbAGJhrg7oElesf8bSZvLS0tZWO7Dp3K931OpSkwxtMtVXcC-XiLevEWKYTHi7COXSLLDQRQvQABhY9lfLFECWv5gRd5QNu0inVUr2gchTIppMRYEc42g3RN4MU-gETASXEgICbB_reeumHHKXNazjD1HLQIcExXLutsD5Qqqqni4bGdkEJZ6KHq1rGHdgat1pyjCkekVm27VU0b9icyDRUv_Xnxeil_BH4Z7JVW-bklLFVZFpoG_mv8WAGxFA20ngP7sY1501hLqrYJ5BskONN9KDwB)**

clean_body: President Trump is headed to Georgia this Saturday! Our team is looking forward to welcoming the president to the Peach State for the first time since President Trump is headed to Georgia this Saturday! Our team is looking forward to welcoming the president to the Peach State for the first time since I received his endorsement for the United States Senate. | Peter, PRESIDENT TRUMP IS HOLDING A RALLY ON SATURDAY, SEPTEMBER 25TH, AND I'M PERSONALLY INVITING YOU TO BE A PART OF THE WELCOME COMMITTEE. WHETHER YOU LIVE IN GEORGIA OR NOT, IT'S IMPORTANT PRESIDENT TRUMP KNOWS YOU SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS TO FLIP GEORGIA'S SENATE SEAT RED AND STOP THE RADICAL DEMOCRAT AGENDA. WE DON'T HAVE MUCH TIME BEFORE HE LANDS HERE IN THE PEACH STATE, SO MAKE SURE TO ACCEPT YOUR INVITATION RIGHT NOW. President Trump hasn't held a rally in Georgia since January, and the feeling here on the ground is one of excitement. I'm going to be in the crowd cheering the president as he takes the podium. I hope that if you're in Georgia you will make an effort to be there as well! Democrats, Republicans and Independents know control of the Senate runs through Georgia, which is why President Trump is making appearances in our state a priority. Last year, Democrat special interest groups spent more than $100 million dollars to squeak out the narrowest of wins for their candidates; it's imperative we deny them another victory next year. Flipping the Senate seat temporarily occupied by Raphael Warnock is critical if we're going to restore a Republican majority in Washington. Democrats are running amuck and leading our nation into bankruptcy. When I speak to President Trump this Saturday during his rally, I want to be able to report to him just how many folks across Georgia and the country we've been able to sign up in support of making Georgia Republican once again. Can I let him know you're on board? Thank you for taking the time to let us know we have your support. Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Gisele Barreto Fetterman
subject: PHOTOS: A month on the trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
It’s been a big month for our campaign, but the end of September is even bigger. Here’s what it looks like:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210924-2757-header&t=1&akid=2757%2E434096%2EmxIERR)
Hi, Peter — Gisele here!
September has been about rescued cheese cake, peaches, soccer games, and hours and hours on the road (with my lumbar pillow) visiting counties across Pennsylvania.
But let’s start with the best part! We drove past this incredible homemade sign in Venango County. 😭 I knocked on your door to say hello, cuddle your chickens, and say thank you! You weren’t home — but this sign made me so emotional! ❤️
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30257?refcode=em20210924-2757&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2757%2E434096%2EmxIERR)
They used stencils. I want to be friends and have craft nights together. (Call me!)
That was a big day. Venango County may be "red" historically, but Venango County Dems have my whole heart. We won’t be able to stay away for long — a big thanks for having us!
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30257?refcode=em20210924-2757&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2757%2E434096%2EmxIERR)
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30257?refcode=em20210924-2757&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2757%2E434096%2EmxIERR)
Things are moving swiftly here on the campaign, but back in Braddock, I’m busy at free store 15104 and at For Good Pgh. This month, we rescued all of the cheese cake, tres leches cake, and peaches to go back out into the community. We’re out here rescuing _allllll_ the food.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30257?refcode=em20210924-2757&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=2757%2E434096%2EmxIERR)
**One of the most magical nights of this month was our recent visit to Philadelphia.** The meet-and-greet on Monday night completed our statewide swing through eight Pennsylvania counties, and drew an enormous crowd of people young and old who showed up to support our campaign and say hello to me! (and maybe Joao)
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30257?refcode=em20210924-2757&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=2757%2E434096%2EmxIERR)
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30257?refcode=em20210924-2757&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=2757%2E434096%2EmxIERR)
**Peter, it’s been a big month for our campaign, but the *end of September* is even bigger.** We only have five end-of-quarter deadlines (including this one) between now and Election Day, and our fundraising strength at the end of each one will be how our supporters, reporters, and even our opponents judge the validity and momentum of our campaign.
What I know for sure, though, is the support from people like you who read our emails (like this one!) will help us get there. [** _Will you please make a $5 donation to John Fetterman for U.S. Senate today? Together we’re building something really special, but we simply can’t do it without your help. John and I are so, so grateful for any support you can send our way._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30257?refcode=em20210924-2757&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=2757%2E434096%2EmxIERR)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30257?refcode=em20210924-2757&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=27&akid=2757%2E434096%2EmxIERR)**
I’ll be back with more updates from the road soon. But in the meantime — your support means the world!
With love,
Gisele ❤️
Gisele Barreto Fetterman
Second Lady of Pennsylvania (SLOP)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210924-2757-footer&t=28&refcode2=2757_434096_mxIERR&akid=2757%2E434096%2EmxIERR)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=29&akid=2757%2E434096%2EmxIERR)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=2757%2E434096%2EmxIERR)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

clean_body: This is serious. | | | 🚨🚨🚨 BREAKING: News outlets agree — CO-08 is a “true toss-up” district. = The latest Colorado Congressional maps were just released, Peter, and all top news outlets agree: Denver 7 The third congressional staff plan makes the proposed 8th Congressional District even more competitive than the last map....the district would be a toss-up with a very slight Democratic edge. Colorado Sun “I believe the 8th Congressional District will be the battleground for the Latino population...to elect a member of their choice,” said Scott Martinez, a Democratic attorney who has worked on past redistricting processes. ... Meanwhile, the 8th District would be more competitive than the last map, with a scant 1.3 percentage point advantage for Democrats.“But [the 8th District] as currently drawn could be a barn burner of a race,” Sandberg added. Denver Post The 8th District would essentiallybe a tossup.... Denver CBS The state would also get a new 8th district that would run from Denver’s northern suburbs into Greeley andwould be a true tossup swing district... Dr. Caraveo can’t afford to leave anything on the table right now, Peter, the stakes are too high. To get her message out across the district, Dr. Caraveo is going to need a groundswell of grassroots support. clean_body: OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER Katie Britt Launches New Digital Ad We need someone with fresh blood and high energy to take the fight to Joe Biden and his band of ineffective career politicians in Washington, D.C. I’m ready to stand tall for our Christian conservative values and preserve the country we know and love for our children and our children’s children. WATCH our campaign's first digital ad here: KATIE PARTICIPATED IN THE 8TH ANNUAL SPORTING CLAY TOURNAMENT Fun time today participating in the 8th Annual Sporting Clay Tournament in Limestone County! I was proud to earn the Top Shooter award. KATIE ATTENDED THE REPUBLICAN WOMEN OF COFFEE COUNTY'S U.S. SENATE FORUM I’d like to thank everyone who attended the Republican Women of Coffee County’s U.S. Senate forum last week! I appreciated the opportunity to discuss important issues facing Alabama and our entire nation. It was great to see the warm response to our message and vision for the future. Already looking forward to the next forum! KATIE ON THE BORDER Special Message From Tuscaloosa County’s Brittany Floyd Thank you to Tuscaloosa County’s Brittany Floyd for sharing her support of our campaign! Brittany knows that I will tirelessly advocate for the interests of hardworking Alabama families in the U.S. Senate. Hear from her here: Follow Katie On Social Media: | | | | ---|---|--- SIGN UP FOR SMS ALERTS: TEXT "KATIE" TO 484848 Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

Republicans only need to flip five seats in the midterms to take back control of the House, so we can’t afford to lose a single seat. If Democrats lose the House majority next year, we’ll lose all the progress we’ve made on the issues that matter most to American families and workers, like universal childcare and healthcare, combating the climate crisis, and protecting reproductive rights.

Vaccine Exemptions - Learn what works - Oxford, OH (Miami University) on Wednesday, September 29

Want to learn about college and employment vaccine exemptions? This upcoming Wednesday, at Skipper's Pub Top Deck in Oxford, OH, from 6-8 PM, Mark will be hosting a talk with attorney Matt Miller-Novak to discuss vaccine exemptions.

Matt, a Cincinnati-based attorney, has considerable experience in the field of vaccine laws and can explain what exemptions typically are successful vs. not. Vaccine mandates are not new. It is actually a well-developed body of law. Some new statutes impact the current climate. Matt will address this from a college and employment perspective. Senate candidate Mark Pukita is sponsoring and will speak at the event. Mark wants to be sure you have real, fact-based, and actionable information in the area of mandates and exemptions.

Skippers Pub is at 121 E High St, Oxford, OH 45056. Top Deck is upstairs of Skipper's and is entered from outside. The event is from 6-8 PM on Wednesday, September 29.

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
President Trump is headed to Georgia this Saturday! Our team is looking forward to welcoming the president to the Peach State for the first time since President Trump is headed to Georgia this Saturday! Our team is looking forward to welcoming the president to the Peach State for the first time since I received his endorsement for the United States Senate. |
---
Fellow Conservative,

**PRESIDENT TRUMP IS HOLDING A RALLY ON SATURDAY, SEPTEMBER 25TH, AND I'M PERSONALLY INVITING YOU TO BE A PART OF THE WELCOME COMMITTEE. WHETHER YOU LIVE IN GEORGIA OR NOT, IT'S IMPORTANT PRESIDENT TRUMP KNOWS YOU SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS TO FLIP GEORGIA'S SENATE SEAT RED AND STOP THE RADICAL DEMOCRAT AGENDA. WE DON'T HAVE MUCH TIME BEFORE HE LANDS HERE IN THE PEACH STATE, SO MAKE SURE TO ACCEPT YOUR INVITATION RIGHT NOW.**
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=053da456dd5e4a319844291a23efa91f&_e=D9XRxTsnyuaxHFjOJG10NY3pNe_2hBN76iF6U200CLpQPpI8mp6OcIJZxwhDBcPnn8QjVCkhO3a0gmn98WQt7ix2y3FHO1j-rnuJYr5PnQ4G3goQlsNg-qNtnsExzGMXOQpBC_t-nuvI11EdXlqJLMv6fE8ncRl3K3VW0F4B4MB09zledwklarKAhd5Uur4rgqylvE5cuomSkJY-PYHQfUBC_lDHu7wA9tcki5ep9JZuhEWxQwFzPYpgDZf3mX9rVThV2oAgK5Xjt8-0T52WEA6PnwAGr0cSp6C6r0IVjWG8Ywly0GNKhUn7cqzicCKs5GM7d0gu_PjqmFS9-Tf2ZKLO3Thbb-FYApc6hAmb4ALho__CYA8fATwB4HXbiexTfbfYczCRh7aoAfS53pfuhX26FPO6Kdcoy-Itwo84XBibzjdlmJ7YOVQcLHsYSBhYRRAafQqUvnXRlq9tl8250abMop-QXeCt2QaF3WyQA9zifGh7EIQ-x8n3KtDfYCh1ruB2vEDJofTabmnhKUiqUE3dk5fFItUOpIKHAgg8DzvB4F9q_rqK29hlMxXp94CM)
President Trump hasn't held a rally in Georgia since January, and the feeling here on the ground is one of excitement. I'm going to be in the crowd cheering the president as he takes the podium. I hope that if you're in Georgia **you will make an effort to be there as well!**

Democrats, Republicans and Independents know control of the Senate runs through Georgia, which is why President Trump is making appearances in our state a priority. Last year, Democrat special interest groups spent more than $100 million dollars to squeak out the narrowest of wins for their candidates; **it's imperative we deny them another victory next year.**

Flipping the Senate seat temporarily occupied by Raphael Warnock is critical if we're going to restore a Republican majority in Washington. Democrats are running amuck and leading our nation into bankruptcy. **[We need to know if you agree and if you're going to stand with President Trump and me as we work to ensure a Republican victory in Georgia next fall.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=053da456dd5e4a319844291a23efa91f&_e=D9XRxTsnyuaxHFjOJG10NY3pNe_2hBN76iF6U200CLpQPpI8mp6OcIJZxwhDBcPnn8QjVCkhO3a0gmn98WQt7ix2y3FHO1j-rnuJYr5PnQ4G3goQlsNg-qNtnsExzGMXOQpBC_t-nuvI11EdXlqJLMv6fE8ncRl3K3VW0F4B4MB09zledwklarKAhd5Uur4rgqylvE5cuomSkJY-PYHQfUBC_lDHu7wA9tcki5ep9JZuhEWxQwFzPYpgDZf3mX9rVThV2oAgK5Xjt8-0T52WEA6PnwAGr0cSp6C6r0IVjWG8Ywly0GNKhUn7cqzicCKs5GM7d0gu_PjqmFS9-Tf2ZKLO3Thbb-FYApc6hAmb4AIZt5ox66ommLkHDVBnJIO1ol2wQapetJikS31rEzJ3VYXS3k7oUQlyMkeQOQbe4HHvUN7r_9FcBWwUYYkFJq4zSaXY3VWs1po379Vxlvpc50FYdSf5NFIX9XkCLXy7OaYclwAEW8fDxNeXKKjvUOSgkJG_TPKExBFt2e-9fIBYvA1pYjL6zuhipkb9HtTLWqwzd-ApRofGBPTQHoqxbgJB)**

When I speak to President Trump this Saturday during his rally, I want to be able to report to him just how many folks across Georgia and the country we've been able to sign up in support of making Georgia Republican once again. Can I let him know you're on board?

**[Please take a moment right now to let me and President Trump know that you're supportive of our efforts to defeat Raphael Warnock in next year's election and elect Republicans up and down the board.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=053da456dd5e4a319844291a23efa91f&_e=D9XRxTsnyuaxHFjOJG10NY3pNe_2hBN76iF6U200CLpQPpI8mp6OcIJZxwhDBcPnn8QjVCkhO3a0gmn98WQt7ix2y3FHO1j-rnuJYr5PnQ4G3goQlsNg-qNtnsExzGMXOQpBC_t-nuvI11EdXlqJLMv6fE8ncRl3K3VW0F4B4MB09zledwklarKAhd5Uur4rgqylvE5cuomSkJY-PYHQfUBC_lDHu7wA9tcki5ep9JZuhEWxQwFzPYpgDZf3mX9rVThV2oAgK5Xjt8-0T52WEA6PnwAGr0cSp6C6r0IVjWG8Ywly0GNKhUn7cqzicCKs5GM7d0gu_PjqmFS9-Tf2ZKLO3Thbb-FYApc6hAmb4AJd_iquIWPYMQLJionXA8hwWlAfzcQeAQAIgSUCmh0Tl_nmcLzeAEk-R7KJus7ZGRTBrVjCk9P9AjcnjzjTZUvQ9bgxYOdw9Wsp-oE6T_6yiil6ywxFhsUxKJ78gJM0weAAbX_o_O99TL5VAmPYTMMpy9iCJBjfsAB3yKnIksAfPkQe_7lohJJpYSv_XYU9mSU6bRLrgdCw9zXuH-gAcztH)**

Flipping the Senate seat temporarily occupied by Raphael Warnock is critical if we're going to restore a Republican majority in Washington. Democrats are running amuck and leading our nation into bankruptcy. When I speak to President Trump this Saturday during his rally, I want to be able to report to him just how many folks across Georgia and the country we've been able to sign up in support of making Georgia Republican once again. Can I let him know you're on board? Thank you for taking the time to let us know we have your support. Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate - | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

**Putting My Foot Down On The Debt Limit 🦶
**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=5f97bae615f347a797612104fdffb536&_e=PdRAH--W8UUMnICQMIaBeTlsvci-8cPUyLtXMCgo3cDJXgwFWdudEemu_dxHNRfDyNdtRKxdLvJOLnq5ECxnYbRDoEJaxzSZoRlz7t3o8elSuAdFAr-Il7YEOpSquFJiEtRTGhZ3aQOuxB9JzKNTKcFi6D56iofIxuMEo8OlAN6G4hUBEBQI5OFLwXdjMIZ2N_e9YaPveX7c56jaEDc_d5RQb9yu82mZJqQz4-mQi4Q62NNDtl8Tu_O9MUDIO7kiqnNDtFkQmuQHi_PwTmdVJQvBB9v9ZEU9C0E0SOhVpP8%3D)
The best thing to do when you’re in a hole is to stop digging.

That’s not rocket science. It’s just plain ol’ common sense. But common sense is in short supply in Washington these days. This week, my Democrat colleagues in the House [voted](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=5f97bae615f347a797612104fdffb536&_e=PdRAH--W8UUMnICQMIaBeeQIlzLX4RoLQmUGeMVKBzxEqOf1D11P8NtN3uhHm82ATKp72Htj60TBrNxbaqtTNMbhduMOgGHeWbSiSkEeCKbFfzFYqKauhH2Xho143NskfOijWzHxA0K73mDGQjV01Jz0ghWFOF64rIFUxO2ptIdU2wFRagchVEhYyoR4g1ZJ9tUdIWuWvZha1ltAGeO_GakBbfGlXGQ1e2C9v-rJd83a58Ev4v0Drs670j2vmmih93MxwBnawW1NaIWl35aML9VCLvYLR4sGElCckQxG0dAwkRHGgKVTkceJPw60aiGBYt9HK0UbryOt0Zi-syxv-ooUVjCALkzaO-pPaLU7NhM%3D) to raise the country’s debt limit so they can keep on spending.

I, along with all my Republican colleagues, voted “No.”

Raising the debt limit allows the Treasury to keep borrowing money so that the government can pay for all the spending it’s already committed to. This is classic Washington. Spend, spend, and kick the can down the road until there’s a crisis. Politicians are pressured to make the crisis go away, so they cave and slap a band-aid on the gushing wound. A year or two later, we replay the exact same scenario.

The problem? We’re already experiencing the pricey consequences of Congress’ runaway spending. Every time you go to the grocery store and see the [rising prices](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=5f97bae615f347a797612104fdffb536&_e=PdRAH--W8UUMnICQMIaBeYnBmscdrws0iSXgPZbeeoqPanoZuAexr_CtYbbjnFvS9QkDjqd2EZ3miowIEhZL_3ot69L7G0nvEuwhy1tjjzMxH8vsv17kMXt4vD1XbE4vnixh6zh4KTD89eNhpXMORJcWYC6sIZixZcxpHw3fTdN-IOoAEpq9fjEo1ocslqksRpYEUoxjdC2wx_kl15jEk5BdsDthmLINKQvAGdWpEQSI9LW0MIykuRHUtpA8uyEM1UDafVW12xHxhwFnGymka8mfsDlXFwEaFev3AB8-tYeTcaJycddCFOaEkT3j8nlbioEFSbkUngGheciQzaMWWwPs5AcVm8MPxJlnTvCTbno%3D), you get a taste of what could happen if the spending _never_ stops. Even the Fed [admitted](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=5f97bae615f347a797612104fdffb536&_e=PdRAH--W8UUMnICQMIaBeal_WqCMg6PSOt72ZkZ58yDHpmobaxlb2Inw9lKIf9MOdBWDsoP7FkUuAF8As-HckZd2uNhYeNi84QVb0LQqd5iXqhJPZKnq3s0yMt40Nmvzdk1lI1hxmJKNHlH9SGhFPqinleXUfCoPT3Ueo2d3lexDWYeB0ZG6k2wl4S-GCY83nsHZxjbPSzb3qcgwhKGZx50HzK5f1Mvrr9p0JtwH6eQPaWKFSXYCgfL4_pxItbBrmRzY6ihMYvG4bC7Vcf47sk9-iPu52bDFzyBbRBgR6Y58u6s0VyvTdEDR5-Vz-9WW1-7zaGuCwT95E17OeRxpPLRCuwC7bGpjmpZ-b_JbdGM%3D) this week that “transitory” inflation isn’t so transitory after all.

I’m proud to vote “No” on the debt limit, just like I vote no on so many other budget-busting bills. The media likes to paint the “No” votes as troublemakers. If trying to save our country from a debt catastrophe and protecting the American people from inflation is making trouble, well, I’m just fine with that.

If fall foliage isn’t your thing (what’s the matter with you?), there’s plenty of other fall activities for the whole family. name: Great America Update
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c459%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=jHGb%2bWzsI1BRXdFu08q%2fxw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66628%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1NYQrs9hRxNUsOhUGnJDMw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66628%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1NYQrs9hRxNUsOhUGnJDMw&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66629%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sZxsfoCuvQYxPwGdd97cSw&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c459%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=jHGb%2bWzsI1BRXdFu08q%2fxw&sysid=1)_

|

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c459%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=jHGb%2bWzsI1BRXdFu08q%2fxw&sysid=1)

| | |

| | Derek,

Before our September deadline, I wanted to tell you directly why I’m running to be Virginia’s next Governor.

We are running an historic campaign here in Virginia. Not only are we building the largest grassroots movement in Virginia history, but we’re running a campaign that speaks to the issues that matter most to Virginians.

And that’s exactly why I’m running.

I’m running because every single Virginia child deserves a **quality education** — which is why I will make the largest-ever investment in education in the Commonwealth’s history.

I’m running because every Virginian has a right to **affordable, quality health care** and prescription medications.

I’m running because we need a leader who will champion initiatives to **curb gun violence** in Virginia.

I’m running because it's long past time for innovative strategies to secure our **clean energy future.**

And Derek, I’m running because every single person in our Commonwealth deserves to live in a state where they have opportunities for success.

clean_body: | | | = | | Derek, Before our September deadline, I wanted to tell you directly why I’m running to be Virginia’s next Governor. We are running an historic campaign here in Virginia. Not only are we building the largest grassroots movement in Virginia history, but we’re running a campaign that speaks to the issues that matter most to Virginians. And that’s exactly why I’m running. I’m running because every single Virginia child deserves a quality education — which is why I will make the largest-ever investment in education in the Commonwealth’s history. I’m running because every Virginian has a right to affordable, quality health care and prescription medications. I’m running because we need a leader who will champion initiatives to curb gun violence in Virginia. I’m running because it's long past time for innovative strategies to secure our clean energy future. And Derek, I’m running because every single person in our Commonwealth deserves to live in a state where they have opportunities for success. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for being on this team, Terry McAuliffe =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Derek --

This is important. My Republican opponent, JD Vance, just got his first major endorsement from Republican Senator Josh Hawley.

Who can forget Josh Hawley’s role in attempting to overturn the 2020 election and fist pumping the insurrectionists on January 6th? JD Vance even said Josh Hawley “did the right thing.”

We can’t say we’re surprised. Josh Hawley’s far-right, dangerous policies are right in line with JD Vance’s vision for Ohio.

**But this race is too close for comfort -- the most recent poll has JD and me within 1 point of each other!**

[**Can you split $25 or more right now between my campaign and Common Good VA to help us stay ahead of JD Vance and flip Ohio blue? We need to reach our $100,000 FEC goal by the end of the month.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7Xj-wvJaz0YnLRn-uL2Him1r82XV9putcCL4YcUOAVHbqp0kOEXhj79CAqpNX8LHJKKsmh9G4ym62Bn6E9qoZif27H1PxuFuBSFqk0YsCYCsCK0V4aWIDniaGpi8BXUJGAzogo8xtjJuTU6UcNpo9n0K0dqoPK5ml6sXALR4guzB9tk5SVGcKjTSiO9g9_cujW9ZTY_P5GUwxYQiZ__fOo45TocrhSN1jl8p-gZr6WShfzE-SrUg3Pa-CIkugr9IVMjwqUYySXlJQSvKee6BsoZWW3zKSZEWvKbD3WzxHSM3M/3fl/HtvMefTEQhOk999S1XFHyQ/h1/v7CaMjogS4tBP7eiEz3r4bitKVlQwbtvG1zPQMrVrso) | [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7Xj-wvJaz0YnLRn-uL2Him1r2nN1xXLccgKu4AH3fMwvpG37MUcJt7ygkiFNj1qrBRQwW4DwDaYGuxFdbf2IqXq9Nbx4PdC8X4NSXMYFYH3Mi059sOPZBpY32jtg_0q-AtkHaAaaJvBRLEwokbvCAdKMsKqRIoH9GlnIs0YvyvHy5ho1OBiiEoWo2pY_Af-RmFyThf--2cR55P7OmsQkiZJSf_7nUB2wRfYSFGjnDA9VXgu5jFLKaRM0dpJ6cN6k9TTzj4gGdD4gwpez6gHnVOzXzTfO4SyRXgNT1jfTMddTK/3fl/HtvMefTEQhOk999S1XFHyQ/h2/YM0q8Ps2hv1mOCu7vFQFZTmbhLinWiAL9y-pWKpCP6A)

This race was already a major target for national Republicans. With this new poll AND Josh Hawley’s recent endorsement even more money will come flooding.

**There’s a reason Josh Hawley hasn’t endorsed in an open Senate primary anywhere else — the Senate majority hinges on Ohio.**

Republicans can see the writing on the wall: our campaign has what it takes to flip this open Senate seat blue so they’re throwing everything they’ve got at this battleground race.

**Ohio deserves a Senator who will fight to cut workers in on the deal, not an extremist millionaire who is out of touch with everyday people. That’s why I’m personally asking:**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Trump welcome committee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
President Trump is headed to Georgia this Saturday! Our team is looking forward to welcoming the president to the Peach State for the first time since I received his endorsement for the United States Senate. |
---
Peter,

**PRESIDENT TRUMP IS HOLDING A RALLY ON SATURDAY, SEPTEMBER 25TH, AND I'M PERSONALLY INVITING YOU TO BE A PART OF THE WELCOME COMMITTEE. WHETHER YOU LIVE IN GEORGIA OR NOT, IT'S IMPORTANT PRESIDENT TRUMP KNOWS YOU SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS TO FLIP GEORGIA'S SENATE SEAT RED AND STOP THE RADICAL DEMOCRAT AGENDA. WE DON'T HAVE MUCH TIME BEFORE HE LANDS HERE IN THE PEACH STATE, SO MAKE SURE TO ACCEPT YOUR INVITATION RIGHT NOW.**
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58855474:WQ7mcjHNE:m:1:2247059263:34C3617BEFF9935EA5A5718244368896:r)
President Trump hasn't held a rally in Georgia since January, and the feeling here on the ground is one of excitement. I'm going to be in the crowd cheering the president as he takes the podium. I hope that if you're in Georgia **you will make an effort to be there as well!**

Democrats, Republicans and Independents know control of the Senate runs through Georgia, which is why President Trump is making appearances in our state a priority. Last year, Democrat special interest groups spent more than $100 million dollars to squeak out the narrowest of wins for their candidates; **it's imperative we deny them another victory next year.**

Flipping the Senate seat temporarily occupied by Raphael Warnock is critical if we're going to restore a Republican majority in Washington. Democrats are running amuck and leading our nation into bankruptcy. **[We need to know if you agree and if you're going to stand with President Trump and me as we work to ensure a Republican victory in Georgia next fall.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58855474:WQ7mcjHNE:m:1:2247059263:34C3617BEFF9935EA5A5718244368896:r)**

When I speak to President Trump this Saturday during his rally, I want to be able to report to him just how many folks across Georgia and the country we've been able to sign up in support of making Georgia Republican once again. Can I let him know you're on board?

**[Please take a moment right now to let me and President Trump know that you're supportive of our efforts to defeat Raphael Warnock in next year's election and elect Republicans up and down the board.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58855474:WQ7mcjHNE:m:1:2247059263:34C3617BEFF9935EA5A5718244368896:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58855474:WQ7mcjHNE:m:1:2247059263:34C3617BEFF9935EA5A5718244368896:r)
Thank you for taking the time to let us know we have your support.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58855474:WQ7mcjHNE:m:1:2247059263:34C3617BEFF9935EA5A5718244368896:r)
Herschel Walker
Republican Candidate for Senate

[**Welcome President Trump!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58855474:WQ7mcjHNE:m:1:2247059263:34C3617BEFF9935EA5A5718244368896:r)

[
](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58855475:WQ7mcjHNE:m:1:2247059263:34C3617BEFF9935EA5A5718244368896:r)

WHETHER YOU LIVE IN GEORGIA OR NOT, IT'S IMPORTANT PRESIDENT TRUMP KNOWS YOU SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS TO FLIP GEORGIA'S SENATE SEAT RED AND STOP THE RADICAL DEMOCRAT AGENDA. WE DON'T HAVE MUCH TIME BEFORE HE LANDS HERE IN THE PEACH STATE, SO MAKE SURE TO ACCEPT YOUR INVITATION RIGHT NOW. President Trump hasn't held a rally in Georgia since January, and the feeling here on the ground is one of excitement. I'm going to be in the crowd cheering the president as he takes the podium. I hope that if you're in Georgia you will make an effort to be there as well! Democrats, Republicans and Independents know control of the Senate runs through Georgia, which is why President Trump is making appearances in our state a priority. Last year, Democrat special interest groups spent more than $100 million dollars to squeak out the narrowest of wins for their candidates; it's imperative we deny them another victory next year. Flipping the Senate seat temporarily occupied by Raphael Warnock is critical if we're going to restore a Republican majority in Washington. Democrats are running amuck and leading our nation into bankruptcy. When I speak to President Trump this Saturday during his rally, I want to be able to report to him just how many folks across Georgia and the country we've been able to sign up in support of making Georgia Republican once again. Can I let him know you're on board? Thank you for taking the time to let us know we have your support. Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. We'd hate to see you go but if you'd like to unsubscribe,** This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 25, 2020. For more information . | mailto:unsub-66591502853-echo3-FA5FBC4652685102EE249BB18E3EB99A@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tracey=20Mann?=
subject: Enough is Enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
The President is destroying the fabric of our country by... | | |
---
| |
---
| Friends,

**_Enough is enough._** Americans are sick of what they are seeing in Washington, D.C. as our country is being ripped apart by the far left.

Democrats in the House and Senate are doing everything they can to pass as much radical legislation as possible before the next election. The President is destroying the fabric of our country by driving us further into debt than ever before, arming terrorists with our own weapons, leaving Americans behind enemy lines with no hope of rescue, and unconstitutionally mandating a vaccine.

_I did not run for office so I could be the caretaker in the slow demise of our great nation. I ran so I could work every day to make it better._

In order to make our country better we must take control of the direction we are heading. Power-hungry politicians like Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and Joe Biden must be stopped. Their agenda is destroying the American dream at a record pace.

_I need your help._ I am working to make sure Republicans regain control of the House and Senate as soon as possible. That will allow us to fire Pelosi and Schumer and bring common sense back to our Country. Please help me fight by supporting my political efforts. Your **_donation_** today will provide the fuel I need to keep fighting for a better tomorrow.

**Your contribution _before the end of the month_ is very much appreciated. **Whether $11,600 (the maximum for a married couple) or $25, please know that your contribution will be greatly appreciated and wisely used as we work to take the country back. Please [(click here)](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=11bcd5cf46&e=a9d1410029) to donate.

The challenges facing our nation are great. But our opportunities and potential are even greater – with hard work our brightest days are yet to come.

Yours in the fight,

Tracey Mann

P.S. I will continue to stand for Kansas as we move forward and do everything in my power to ensure our kids have a bright future. _Please[(click here)](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=0362ef6d73&e=a9d1410029) to donate today and help take our country back. _

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Newsom Reelection Poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Stay and Fight](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioquKBLNzvwW5fWuGLqQtNA_PjLYgeXUNY8SlDu98or6WQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_sept_24&n=1) I don’t believe in moral victories. I believe in preparing for the next battle. One battle is a lawsuit to end the school mask mandate. An emergency hearing is set for September 30 in San Diego. No word on whether Emmy footage will be shown. In the larger battle, a 2022 poll shows Newsom with only 50 percent support despite having just spent record amounts of Special Interest money. In the ultimate battle, California now has the nation’s highest poverty and second highest unemployment along with an $828,000 median home price. At the same time, we’re being told to take a shorter shower as water flows abundantly into the ocean. Our government is broken. What’s broken it is the corruption Gavin Newsom personifies. It doesn’t have to be this way. The story of our state is one of new beginnings, and the fight for California's future has just begun. clean_body: | Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: I don’t believe in moral victories. I believe in preparing for the next battle. One battle is a lawsuit to end the school mask mandate. An emergency hearing is set for September 30 in San Diego. No word on whether Emmy footage will be shown. In the larger battle, a 2022 poll shows Newsom with only 50 percent support despite having just spent record amounts of Special Interest money. In the ultimate battle, California now has the nation’s highest poverty and second highest unemployment along with an $828,000 median home price. At the same time, we’re being told to take a shorter shower as water flows abundantly into the ocean. Our government is broken. What’s broken it is the corruption Gavin Newsom personifies. It doesn’t have to be this way. The story of our state is one of new beginnings, and the fight for California's future has just begun. Kevin Kiley Legislator Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States

It was an honor to greet the employees of the Newport News Shipyard as they started and finished their shifts on Tuesday morning. Running for governor is no easy task but it's moments like these that remind me of why we need to get Virginia back on track. As vital workers at the largest industrial employer in Virginia, these hardworking men and women play a critical role in our economy and prove that nothing compares to the dedication and resolve of the Virginian worker. That is why making Virginia the most business friendly state in America is one of my top priorities as governor. On day one, I promise to keep Virginia open for business by cutting job killing regulations and protecting hard-working employees like the ones I met on Tuesday. To read more about my plan to make Virginia the best place to do business, please follow the link below.
---
| [ **Day One Game Plan** ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VVMnmK3wkpqcW73ZBcB6YYqdxW1HN78y4xTGPrN880g3G3lSbNV1-WJV7CgQ2GW5WYs717fj3M9W2W2hD-4XqWK2W7zDfGg5g-9MQN466YF535Ff0W6QHLxj2z-SmVW2-hmWb4X0YTtW5mlqPD284hywW7Hkl--7l1cjzW8BJkZ52B-7H_W43JzFw6Y--CgW57YftH6JMbb_W6k1DM82xH3cbW79_fRZ6vFJm2W8G97ch7Y9s1wW6xhdT57j_T_WW1KhGn68p21KFW8-4TSk8YtlcfN91vsFZxvqdKVGXDdS1D7gp-W4T-dYj1rhq-cW4B13yd507LfCVh6Xgy2rjKKn3ppd1)
---

| | |
---|---|---
A big thank you to everyone who has voted early! Voter turnout has been higher than expected in Republican Congressional districts, and this has my opponent flailing. Show Terry that you're ready to take back our Commonwealth by hitting the polls and voting early. There _are_ _less than 40 days left_ of this campaign and I cannot wait to go to work for you as your next governor.
---
Bring friends and vote early!
---
---
Glenn Youngkin

name: Team Keller
subject: Will this affect your business?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fred Keller for Congress
body:
Did Biden make the wrong move?
---
| | | | | | |
---
| |
---

Dear Friend,

After Joe Biden announced he is forcing all businesses of over 100 employees to get the vaccine, I was troubled by how this will affect thousands of small businesses.

name: Nikki Fried
subject: Checking in with our team before the weekend
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

I know it’s getting late, but I wanted to touch base before the weekend.

I’ll be honest with you, friends: things in Florida are tough right now. Republican legislators just released Texas-style legislation banning abortion.

Meanwhile, Ron DeSantis has continued his authoritarian tear. He just appointed a surgeon general who peddles conspiracy theories, puts our children at risk, and casts doubt on vaccine.

I’m running for Governor to break the system that for two decades has allowed politicians like Ron DeSantis to attack our rights and put our safety at risk. But to win this race, I need your help.

Team, your donation before the weekend will make a world of difference in powering our campaign. If you can, please click here to chip in $5 or more before midnight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-personal-0924]

I know we send a lot of emails, and I’m sorry to bother you again. But DeSantis is the most dangerous governor in the country—and his allies in the legislature are proposing some of the most dangerous anti-choice legislation in the country.

We can’t wait until next year to fight back.

Team, if you can step up before the weekend, it would mean the world to me and make a real difference. Please click here to chip in now to stop DeSantis and help us win.

With Gratitude,
Nikki

6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143

name: Shawn Collins
subject: Well, are you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAWN COLLINS FOR CALIFORNIA**
body:
This is one of our best chances to win back a formerly Republican seat AND rid Congress of one if its most leftist members. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=67051436dae84f4183afe0763f26daf0&_e=uECD2O_ekYePKCEDmf3youWsaMKX11WDE9wfH_vUcrCLTha_M-NeQr0KpxS4aUa_30P8yU31urO7XOFF_KJUide5_LE4zS9XXtJkT1vQGW0tKcSd4hrtmnYfkSgLtvlVUvArNRoQze2RIcVBo2mTfA9o0rlvkmDh8Ik6qhdpy86T8oXc1g9jT9SS1Ayvj-tFRXRrU_UCkWwhmysssn-Fbd4oSgmQqTfSLgk2OTbnxXsX2iouzxwYfJZgHdQofXxowU3l4aOjvnk9bBBhiDHNSV9zTFAZ2tKH4V31YWQz5a_g9ljp7koulrDfQ6aNHtELVAJ6Z2IEESdc5broKGI3PSQPJkbBDCMZOHIhCT6M4-68wPgVPS7loEBCi82RJBKrrvXE-tLF3-j3k779bUZ-m3TXGNt7mghOK5yPQ5vj0X5XHQX0IdQ4Gjtt78ZkyDkRJQKLP6E11nYaQk9nhzaTfdR-PmDsxsXvOu_1LElPsaQ%3D)

---
Peter,

body:
Spoiler Alert: It doesn’t go well...

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36387554/307991377/1639334829?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDNjNmM0Yy05NjFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fewnheFtUplR4x699vBvNOSdhqG4vgxGKQlTqMfXHy4=)
---
As Democrats takes critical steps to protect the health of our country’s workers, **my MAGA opponent Madison Cawthorn couldn’t help himself:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36387555/307991378/1612211699?amount=3&refcode=EGFC_20210924_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDNjNmM0Yy05NjFkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fewnheFtUplR4x699vBvNOSdhqG4vgxGKQlTqMfXHy4=) If Madison Cawthorn wants to discuss the horrors of segregation, I’d be happy to teach him the reality of this dark part of our country’s history.

subject: Upcoming Events: Weekend of 9/25
body:
Block parties, breakfasts, and big door knocks coming up... | | | |
---
| | |
## Invitation for : Meet Rep. Allison Russo
---
| [RSVP TO JOIN ALLISON THIS WEEKEND](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=fd4e4c9842&e=400a181d5a "RSVP TO JOIN ALLISON THIS WEEKEND")
---
| Allison will be traveling across the district this weekend talking with voters about the issues directly impacting local communities, and she would love to see you there, . **Can you bring a friend to meet Allison this week or help us knock on some doors?**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=54eba137b3&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Talk to voters in your neighborhood](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=301031ce8c&e=400a181d5a)
Join Allison Russo and local Democratic candidates across the 15th Distrist this (and every) weekend to talk to voters about the special election. We have just over 5 weeks to go until Election Day, so there is no "later!"
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=64d04bc19a&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Pickerington Block Party, ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=29c7f28b26&e=400a181d5a)[Saturday at 11:30am](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=6833627d6b&e=400a181d5a)
Join Allison Russo and local Pickerington candidates for City Council and School Board at our fall block party! We'll be registering our new neighbors to vote and hanging out with free food, music, and fun for the whole family! RSVP and bring some friends!
|
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=cd31ccb80c&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [SEO Labor Breakfast with Allison](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=c12577148d&e=400a181d5a)
Calling all union members! The SEO Central Labor Council is hosting a breakfast with Allison this Sunday at 10:30am. Talk with Allison about building an economy that works for all of us over coffee and breakfast!
|
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=a778bc5536&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Bobcats Meet & Greet on Campus, Sunday at 1pm](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=a7256ef26e&e=400a181d5a)
Join OU Dems and Allison for lunch and conversation with OU students on campus. There will be pizza on the college green at 1PM!
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=cc2e132cee&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Veterans Roundtable in Grove City](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=99a4131135&e=400a181d5a)[, Monday at 6pm](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=95904d4f37&e=400a181d5a)
Join State Rep. Allison Russo, the ODP Veterans Caucus, and fellow veterans for a conversation on issues impacting veterans and military families in central Ohio. Panel discussion with Q&A to follow.
| [SEE ALL UPCOMING EVENTS](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=7dbcf64402&e=400a181d5a "SEE ALL UPCOMING EVENTS")
---
| |
### _**We need you to help spread the word, .**_
_**Can you forward this email to ten neighbors, get a group of friends together to come to a meet and greet, or help us talk to voters soon?**_
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=3a313e34c1&e=400a181d5a)
---
| | [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=cfb93cd92d&e=400a181d5a)
---
| | [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=5391c3c894&e=400a181d5a)
---
| | [](AllisonRusso.com)
---
|

RUSSO FOR CONGRESS545 E Town StColumbus, OH 43215-4801

clean_body: | | | | I will stand up for us Friend, Joe Biden’s vaccine mandates are bad for Alaska and bad for America. He consistently has demonstrated his disdain for us, and now he is attacking our employment rights, our ability to continue making a living, and our medical care. We cannot afford to hurt our small businesses** because we have a President, who thinks he is above the law, run by Far-Left Liberals with Radical ideas. When I’m Alaska’s Senator, I will stand up for us with courage , conviction , and common sense._But I seriously need YOUR help to get there!** Thank you, Kelly | | | | =

Peter,

Roughly 12,000 illegal immigrants are camping along the shores of the Rio Grande River in Texas right now for one reason:

**They know that Democrats couldn’t care any less about enforcing America’s immigration laws. **

This invasion is getting worse by the hour with no end in sight.

Responsibility lies surely on the shoulders of President Biden, and this proves once AGAIN that Democrats are unfit and too incompetent to lead America.

[](http://links.berniemorenoforohio.com/u/click?_t=e4b84e1dbdd94cb490475227943c7e8a&_m=edb76303c52640ff9506c6055970b0f2&_e=q4L7Bc1q7SiG2golcEAjZXZGUSEV-jgsXfQWxkJLfi5viMWuhe1iQqpDIld3ceR3-ZQ_E2gXmudhzYs6H1w5J9IxNrhMzZ0QGn7Ze0dC_rA-CHZfim8G1edll3F5FGh0I9KRSG8F2j02bJxbkbs0VKNDl9WFRJcYYlsFamkDUKUFqDMJcBg7LODFoGfVQUbrJXgscMcSzTDnno-5lCK410p2xlDBx4ynjvIJmtJHQgtHvFd9Oa5BP_jfwHOY9nV_LODS5f27nm2HAwJg1fhz0JQRJjyn53Gt9IDdKYMiyCO-KF7CO-i0PHHdySTg4g7_cLvUXXtlIaRix7bF_JvCPW75WpkIJR8-_I-Q3QIn7vSmSF1aI2QNb6ceALq3eGKGhOuS5gbdopjx9LBOF4lBQ8qsPEAwm-bC9eRrNCeOOAHKAO7sYwR0GQe-vPRFY2TmlTJ-LHMRZ_mWb2OkpGvUYE0q5ve7lb8mYRK1z3LnBmJTz-kkb3CcZWJzXdhzSwD6-PgZ2O951P2MTsFefvZpEQ%3D%3D)

Cleaning up this disaster isn’t going to be easy, but I KNOW that we can get the job done by:
* TAKING BACK THE SENATE

* ENFORCING OUR IMMIGRATION LAWS

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, It was another busy week on the campaign trail as Jane continues to travel the state and speak directly with voters about how she will fight for them in the U.S. Senate. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Join Us as We Cross Half a Million!** Tomorrow, Team Timken will be coming to a door near you as we launch our second Super Saturday of the cycle and cross 500,000 voter contacts! Jane knows how to win Ohio - and it's about showing up and asking Ohioans for their vote. Our team continues to be the only U.S. Senate campaign doing substantial, statewide voter contact efforts, highlighting Jane's unmatched work ethic. Jane will be joining our volunteer teams in Columbus, Athens, and Cincinnati and we hope to see you out. subject: Biden Admin snub, Radical Nation events and more
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us18.campaign-archive.com/?e=f6564bbe3b&u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=4a3939fd09)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
## Biden Admin snubs repatriation ceremony...
This week was the first ever joint repatriation ceremony in Pearl Harbor. There were 68 fallen service members from Korea and six from the US that were returned to their home countries.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c2e8c14454&e=f6564bbe3b)
There was NO ONE from the Biden Administration at the ceremony. Not only is this insulting to the families of these fallen heroes, but also a diplomatic slight to South Korea who sent several of their top leaders, including President Moon Jae-in.
| [WATCH HERE](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e6c0538474&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
Thank you to my family, friends and amazing co-workers for all the birthday greetings and decorations.
| | | |
---
## _Radical Nation_ events...
**** We’re starting to add events to the _Radical Nation_ book tour this fall, check out the events below to join us and if there’s somewhere I should add, send an email to Contact@SeanSpicer.com. **Tuesday, September 28th** \- TalkShop LiveVirtual event, reserve your spot [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=84cb5e56c1&e=f6564bbe3b).
|
---
**Friday, October 15th** — Franklin County GOP Eisenhower DinnerGreencastle, PA — Tickets [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=df7a61a71b&e=f6564bbe3b).
|
---
**Wednesday, October 27th** — New York Metropolitan Republican ClubNew York City, NY — Tickets [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9e37599e8e&e=f6564bbe3b).
| | | |
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[Independent Source Confirms Authenticity of Damning Hunter Biden Emails](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=66663323bb&e=f6564bbe3b) — via National Review Remember that time the left wing media and social media leftists blocked this info as disinformation... well at least until the election was over.
|
---
[New emails reveal Hunter Biden asked for $2 million plus 'success fees' to help unfreeze Libyan assets](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=17a581f440&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Business Insider Hey AOC, what about a dress that’s says “Tax the Grifters” ?
|
---
[Youngkin leads McAuliffe among likely voters: poll ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f120fb1366&e=f6564bbe3b)— via The Hill
|
---
[Biden's Approval Rating Hits New Low of 43%; Harris' Is 49%](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=793f6d5d24&e=f6564bbe3b) \- Gallup
|
---
| | | |
---
Last week I asked if you thought that the rich paid their fair share of taxes, most people said [yes they do](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c5c27e93d4&e=f6564bbe3b). Too bad AOC disagrees...
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=a99000d2a4&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
| | | | | |
---
|

“This is a must read for every parent, student, business owner and concerned citizen. No matter where you are politically, if you want to know where we are headed as a country, please read _**RADICAL NATION**_.” **— MERCEDES SCHLAPP** Thank you to everyone who has already pre-ordered. |

name: Mark Meuser
subject: I've hit a nerve on Facebook
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Meuser for U
body:
I must have struck a nerve with the tolerant Left! |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3bafc46ad9b4419a83b289ef1f788d26&_e=DvBeZXyaXICIB3iMJ_7HwRoyADUTmw-5Miu9LR9aRYrwadeFw4aQEXU9isbCEK3zAlVwDPa9LY-fV6ICB25Oqtmh1wOryzNCjh2hCRycSR-vwqupqtFVM4D38CsnXwBMZO9JNwLmuYgRRpoVoJOEWNAOpzy6TqXeJxYKgQo9dFLudeh9-lV13doEC2k5DoAecdJUh_qhN9MG9Wb1gd-jGXIIshG_bty-Ix7KPO3fUWRSP1ZJ1wKaO3tvJ2tY7WnQOieAcR0GaAF3hx7uybJwEMO1UtZ79Yq1X8ZJRRZvG-Hiyl6PHETUQYVPVyIGYAHYhF369bHx8dwbDRyju-2YRQ%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

Last week I posted a meme on my Facebook page. I thought it demonstrated the Left's hypocrisy regarding covid protocols and _"my body, my choice."_

Little did I know this silly meme would unleash a torrent of hate from the tolerant Left. **When you dare to challenge their hypocritical ideology, they will attack you and silence you by any means possible.**

But their threats and their words won't stop my fight against unconstitutional mandates and vaccine segregation. **You shouldn't have to prove you're vaccinated to get on a plane, go to a restaurant, go to school, or even get medical care.**

It's remarkable that the crowd that coined _"my body, my choice"_ has become _"your body, our choice"_ when it comes to vaccines. Freedom of choice only applies to causes they believe in.

In America, if you don't want to get a vaccine, you should have the ability to make that decision for yourself. You should have the freedom to make health decisions for yourself and your family.

**As a constitutional lawyer, I've spent the last year and a half fighting against these tyrannical mandates and regulations.** It's gross the power the Left thinks they have over us. They completely disregard the Constitution and won't stop until they have complete control over your lives.

We must stop the Left before they issue mandates for every aspect of your lives. Their Facebook trolls and keyboard warriors only make me want to fight harder to protect the Constitution and your freedoms. Haters don't intimidate me; they energize me to fight harder for your rights.

[**This is why I was so anxious to jump in this race for U.S. Senate. We need leaders who will step up and say enough is enough. Will you join my team and help me take my fight for your Constitutional freedoms to the United States Senate?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3bafc46ad9b4419a83b289ef1f788d26&_e=DvBeZXyaXICIB3iMJ_7HwRoyADUTmw-5Miu9LR9aRYrwadeFw4aQEXU9isbCEK3zqHD-Rxgs96_cPrP3XnjzYaH87RcUsYHKm-7-xEjLtsl6gLTRp0On3UATubYi7IAUkTeKzzBkpRRYKYweXjaOh3SeBujE9AFIgLlaXLyEx1sZi-JT_y-gacM31bZTaMgW1bwJF44d8Xxe1UjWFz6hJrU8hMjmjsz2Hq4Z3RdQVfAfPiFuzE0RGu4oh4YXS_iKXlWoPcnWHPQLIanzSV0m7XBvqQnibo-lZbeNUIly_xzQQ0SviYfKc-kQ8AXGWufjwqPVkG-Uq1qWkwJyeNqMGg%3D%3D)

clean_body: I must have struck a nerve with the tolerant Left! | Fellow American, Last week I posted a meme on my Facebook page. I thought it demonstrated the Left's hypocrisy regarding covid protocols and "my body, my choice." Little did I know this silly meme would unleash a torrent of hate from the tolerant Left. When you dare to challenge their hypocritical ideology, they will attack you and silence you by any means possible. But their threats and their words won't stop my fight against unconstitutional mandates and vaccine segregation. You shouldn't have to prove you're vaccinated to get on a plane, go to a restaurant, go to school, or even get medical care. It's remarkable that the crowd that coined "my body, my choice" has become "your body, our choice" when it comes to vaccines. Freedom of choice only applies to causes they believe in. In America, if you don't want to get a vaccine, you should have the ability to make that decision for yourself. You should have the freedom to make health decisions for yourself and your family. As a constitutional lawyer, I've spent the last year and a half fighting against these tyrannical mandates and regulations. It's gross the power the Left thinks they have over us. They completely disregard the Constitution and won't stop until they have complete control over your lives. We must stop the Left before they issue mandates for every aspect of your lives. Their Facebook trolls and keyboard warriors only make me want to fight harder to protect the Constitution and your freedoms. Haters don't intimidate me; they energize me to fight harder for your rights. Thank you for your continued support, Mark Meuser Candidate for U.S. Senate, California | | Paid for by Mark Meuser for U.S. Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but.

body:
Do you CONDEMN Republicans for their schemes to BLOCK President Biden's bold agenda? | | | **_BREAKING: House Republicans conspiring to derail President Biden 's bipartisan agenda_ **

---
| **25,000 URGENT RESPONSES REQUESTED:**

We're OUTRAGED.

House Republicans are scheming to DERAIL President Biden's bold, bipartisan agenda.

And we need to make sure these obstructionist Republicans are held accountable at the polls.

That's why we're calling on 25,000 grassroots Democrats to take our survey and let us know where they stand: **

Do you CONDEMN Republican schemes to derail President Biden's bold agenda?**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---

We're beside ourselves.

House Republicans are scheming to DERAIL President Biden's bold agenda.

Republicans shouldn't hold a single one of these pressing, bipartisan priorities hostage with their reckless political games.

But that's exactly what's happening. And we can't let them get away with it by defeating our House Democrats.

**Here at Democratic HQ, we 're committed to defeating these obstructionist Republicans -- _but we can 't do that without your support._**

That's why we're collecting data from our best 25,000 grassroots supporters to inform our strategy to protect our House Majority.
_**So let us know before midnight: Do you CONDEMN Republicans for their schemes to BLOCK President Biden 's bold agenda?**_
| [YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---

Thanks,

DCCC

name: Erica Smith
subject: HUGE NEWS: The House just voted to protect abortion rights!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Send me to the U.S. Senate, and I'd be the deciding YES vote.
#
This is huge!
The House just passed the Women's Health Protection Act to guarantee every person's right to safe, legal abortion.
But here's the situation: From GOP-led state legislatures to the Republican-stacked Supreme Court, we’re witnessing attacks on our reproductive freedom _right now_. And because of the filibuster, the Women’s Health Protection Act faces a major challenge in the U.S. Senate.
**Nothing should stand in the way of a person's right to choose. Period.**
That’s why it’s never been more important to elect Democratic senators who will proudly vote to end the filibuster, expand the Supreme Court, and protect abortion rights nationwide.
Send me to the U.S. Senate, and I'd be the deciding YES vote on all of those things. But I simply can't get there without you.
[**Will you chip in $10 or more right now so I can get to work to abolish the filibuster, expand the Supreme Court, and protect reproductive rights in the U.S. Senate?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/17173?refcode=em20210924-483&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=483%2E3698%2EWMa9LD)
**[Donate](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/17173?refcode=em20210924-483&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=483%2E3698%2EWMa9LD)**
With the rise of back-door attempts to overturn abortion rights across several states, including Texas and here in North Carolina, it’s imperative for Congress to codify Roe v. Wade.
**But to have a fighting chance at protecting abortion access nationwide, we must expand our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority in 2022.**
[**Please consider making a donation to our campaign today. As a U.S. Senator for North Carolina, I will fight relentlessly for bold, urgent policies — like abolishing the filibuster, expanding the Supreme Court, and guaranteeing reproductive rights for all people.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/17173?refcode=em20210924-483&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=483%2E3698%2EWMa9LD)
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
Erica for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210924-483-footer&t=22&refcode2=483_3698_WMa9LD&akid=483%2E3698%2EWMa9LD)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=23&akid=483%2E3698%2EWMa9LD)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=483%2E3698%2EWMa9LD)

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: This is how we flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miOOfsTLxZjnA5dg34irriapWM6YL_BKrr2WwCOeykDRZ-Tu1umJmEkwP0yL1RW2uTM0tvd76aINlDx5TMbVVik5wqPrqXOQIKDr0g0DUgrq3ovcByQS4Edn7DFw8GbU_MEZhSDVHAvIBqQW62J_xh1hKcq9pMV1eRy_Lcw6gJKXt3eKgHWb4P8DADCr_kYuKd48EQxyYMB7-0-uKf1rfJuMqGQIOnQWrK2k-GXzR2b5x2Iaf2YAlH0k5tPqxnsa0rarf4scg0ghwcvrd0AV-wEIlQoa9VvrPFmY2aNG_x0gCZZl4FitY8HtzQECgj6F9wAvgxQFFFi8rs_RuV-99K7Z2h9IK1UifwSXsDUfpeSXDfH6S4yRHSgo-GVNSPSeC9/3fl/Zdj086bLSTamdUtI8xdmRA/h0/XYfo8m5D6Tq4kyB4IeBu6zp5ZC3gSrQwRiiiqZWIDAo)
Derek,

Six months ago, I launched my campaign for Missouri’s open U.S. Senate seat. I got in this race because it’s time to restore power to working people instead of sending another corrupt politician to Washington.

As a 13-year Marine veteran and economic justice advocate who’s watched my own community in Missouri be stripped for parts by massive corporations, I know what needs to change — and I’m not afraid to fight for it.

Since launching, we’ve built one of the most powerful grassroots movements in the United States — outraising our GOP opponents last quarter with the highest percentage of small-dollar donations of any U.S. Senate candidate.

Now, it’s time to keep this momentum going. With our next end-of-quarter deadline around the corner, I’m setting a goal to raise $10,000 in online donations by midnight tomorrow — and **[I’m asking you to split a donation of $10 between my campaign and Common Good right now to make it happen.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miOOfsTLxZjnA5dg34irriapWM6YL_BKrr2WwCOeykDRYuWCVhSpa3kJZpoW1COEJKBLXIdtjrpYKj9GrUyf90qa9AY8u-C4FLP21ytAPX8aHmNAttNucDoviLP2ToGraqrJofhcLlhPUErlKzY-Bo8GvTVeElkAs_Fati3WVu599WwAhLbC46gNFECwC84ds-HcChBYrqtbO-LWOk3ppLjXf07GN6VgKKUHhjE9r1M0qjpcqQCqh2Q9TiSydFrLYS1bG3AeTA__5Llxj15Cm2fuSU24qpmZYYAPmr43yTJhGvkCBpOGXSCpP07f3vNea6JqL531Ef6Ws6q23l4CxBGTNR1r8lmf-XbBtQ_pgQvwrmNBBAr4U1T9g1cvFuyrU3/3fl/Zdj086bLSTamdUtI8xdmRA/h1/gJ9ZoIFv--UnxGhzfZJ5sUnz_Z-6xu9nGfOvxqnzm78)**

clean_body: | | | Derek, Six months ago, I launched my campaign for Missouri’s open U.S. Senate seat. I got in this race because it’s time to restore power to working people instead of sending another corrupt politician to Washington. As a 13-year Marine veteran and economic justice advocate who’s watched my own community in Missouri be stripped for parts by massive corporations, I know what needs to change — and I’m not afraid to fight for it. Since launching, we’ve built one of the most powerful grassroots movements in the United States — outraising our GOP opponents last quarter with the highest percentage of small-dollar donations of any U.S. Senate candidate. Now, it’s time to keep this momentum going. With our next end-of-quarter deadline around the corner, I’m setting a goal to raise $10,000 in online donations by midnight tomorrow — and Derek, can you please split $10 (or any amount you think is best) right now to help our campaign stay on track for our next critical end-of-quarter deadline? Together, we can flip this U.S. Senate seat. It won’t be easy, but this is a fight we can win. Last time this seat was up, it was decided by less than 80,000 votes — and CNN named Missouri as one of our only opportunities to flip a U.S. Senate seat in 2022. If we keep working together, we WILL fundamentally change who has power in this country. —Lucas Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . _Are you sick and tired of Biden and the Democrats doing whatever they want unchecked?_

_Are you ready to win back Republican majorities in Congress so we can put a stop to it?_

**_Me too!_ I’m Shawn Collins – a conservative Afghanistan combat veteran and active Navy reservist –** [**and I’m running for Congress.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=963deb4e72cb4c5da73cc7dd87b38c69&_e=rVT1Uw7XdCw8kqo5OqPVeDfYdt-RLqBo0W1oenlx1cr8MVqmeU2ITvowQci0lwnZ4rJG6egvcc9Cpu0KEp1A704EWN9W_yVTxj3z7bnqQ2OM_T_yEncG9hKonbhRXxHTxKbQx6yhes8px9chG9CQ-h_edifrZxIg7cixWQLrzNr2Ei5ccVRyYZ3ckpuqrOrQTIcZRE0ZFEXyL3pqXxcKQJ85QjyG1H-R_PKN0hX0nBB5iTQGaBEAD78a1CGem4xG2TgIIDk-AF5W7y0mI_ojkTuElBJX4Vwp4UQr-3YQY3a6IWgurCIA0CKJBsh7nX9Ji5TyS46OGEPDYkBTkBag0sh2HMcxaAcOChv4hOOl3J-CqpGjlK98H_vJhVd2dbAQQP8XrjzO5jm7sZAj_SeMWvDWd9t8CgrFYJMw2shH1b6tS9kJFeC5sPn3c-JUtSrmqcG8HhIGJFIhxvE8ysWhkQ%3D%3D)

Your support before the **Sept 30th FEC quarterly deadline** is critical to keeping us competitive in this target race.

[**We MUST raise another $25,000 online to hit our target by the deadline, and unless I hear back from you we will likely fall short.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=963deb4e72cb4c5da73cc7dd87b38c69&_e=rVT1Uw7XdCw8kqo5OqPVeDfYdt-RLqBo0W1oenlx1cr8MVqmeU2ITvowQci0lwnZ4rJG6egvcc9Cpu0KEp1A704EWN9W_yVTxj3z7bnqQ2OM_T_yEncG9hKonbhRXxHTxKbQx6yhes8px9chG9CQ-h_edifrZxIg7cixWQLrzNr2Ei5ccVRyYZ3ckpuqrOrQTIcZRE0ZFEXyL3pqXxcKQJ85QjyG1H-R_PKN0hX0nBB5iTQGaBEAD78a1CGem4xGW1PgjJqneD17ZlOxBChsyy9CjpdadAduQtenDBXRVuxFtgqv8NUg0r6ueFMQ0VKOh7otXHX33OBpqK9LyuxjpmN7dQgaHg4grq0pFLYLEzGxgUKC4qQYECFUTpQXWiJPGqkn63MRjp5VrEHKHilOTdkLNOmfTI7oSrAONK75wlVhIrls2euCJmruARy5_lv2N_V92smMFyLXW5Zi2nrrug%3D%3D)

If you want to stop Biden, **we must win back the House.** And to win back the House, **we must flip this seat.**

[**Please rush $25 or more to help me hit my quarterly fundraising deadline target and give America the conservative leadership we obviously and desperately need.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=963deb4e72cb4c5da73cc7dd87b38c69&_e=rVT1Uw7XdCw8kqo5OqPVeDfYdt-RLqBo0W1oenlx1cr8MVqmeU2ITvowQci0lwnZ4rJG6egvcc9Cpu0KEp1A704EWN9W_yVTxj3z7bnqQ2OM_T_yEncG9hKonbhRXxHTxKbQx6yhes8px9chG9CQ-h_edifrZxIg7cixWQLrzNr2Ei5ccVRyYZ3ckpuqrOrQTIcZRE0ZFEXyL3pqXxcKQJ85QjyG1H-R_PKN0hX0nBB5iTQGaBEAD78a1CGem4xGHM461249XkUoABaa6_7pSkLUXjpESaB8fVWwJBvYrNExmw9XJe5SFrwom-yKr4szyeO1A0xcwVfd5UzX_7o0XQ9IGxw-_mHOuOZILnlE5jdn9dcZ6RTDI0MMU7WDld8TMowBi9bYNFsgTi83BGhZzINmSX90bmx9hjf_8u1VjdCSxUbkeCMZcM5LW-o-2JCE7haMpiC9GfUbp5rigsn9Ug%3D%3D)

And to win back the House, we must flip this seat. | Fellow patriot, Are you sick and tired of Biden and the Democrats doing whatever they want unchecked? Are you ready to win back Republican majorities in Congress so we can put a stop to it? Me too! I’m Shawn Collins – a conservative Afghanistan combat veteran and active Navy reservist – Republicans must flip 5 seats in the midterms to win back a majority in the House, and my race against socialist Katie Porter in California’s 45th District is right up at the top of GOP target seat list. But I need your help before Sept. 30th to hit the first quarterly fundraising deadline since launching my campaign so I can take on Porter and flip this seat. | | | | | | This is one of our best chances to win back a formerly Republican seat AND rid Congress of one if its most leftist members. Your support before the Sept 30th FEC quarterly deadline is critical to keeping us competitive in this target race. Falling short on the first deadline is only going to make it harder to flip this target seat – and we can’t win back the House if we can’t flip our best-chance seats. If you want to stop Biden, we must win back the House. And to win back the House, we must flip this seat. President Trump hasn't held a rally in Georgia since January, and the feeling here on the ground is one of excitement. I'm going to be in the crowd cheering the president as he takes the podium. I hope that if you're in Georgia **you will make an effort to be there as well!**

Democrats, Republicans and Independents know control of the Senate runs through Georgia, which is why President Trump is making appearances in our state a priority. Last year, Democrat special interest groups spent more than $100 million dollars to squeak out the narrowest of wins for their candidates; **it's imperative we deny them another victory next year.**

Flipping the Senate seat temporarily occupied by Raphael Warnock is critical if we're going to restore a Republican majority in Washington. I would first like to congratulate [**Victoria Sullivan**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.victoriasullivanformayor.com/1/0100017c19e9885b-88f38465-7764-477e-9109-1073f68f7568-000000/vJvZeFqkax563u-SGYI7-BRch9I=237) on her successful election in this week’s mayoral primary. We applaud your driven efforts to relieve Manchester’s citizens of the disastrous repercussions of Mayor Joyce Craig’s leadership and we look forward to working with you to retire her once and for all.

Many have also seen the recent social events held by our own NH Young Republicans, and for those who haven’t, check out their [**Facebook**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FNHYRs%2F/1/0100017c19e9885b-88f38465-7764-477e-9109-1073f68f7568-000000/omG5jPHrXRp2QjGvVXzKEBj0VKo=237)**** page! After a successful “Republican Round-Up” in Manchester, they went on to host “Pints and Politics” in Concord and will be having their [**"Grand Ol' Beach Party"**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.nhyr.gop%2Fgrand_ol_beach_party/1/0100017c19e9885b-88f38465-7764-477e-9109-1073f68f7568-000000/tfnJQgplyKf_mgP5R8ckqnZRHy8=237) this coming Wednesday at Bernies Beach Bar. These outings are incredibly important and will help our state engage future voters! If you’ve never been involved before, check out their [**WEBSITE**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.nhyr.gop/1/0100017c19e9885b-88f38465-7764-477e-9109-1073f68f7568-000000/iPV6ys0Fyg-yguOpckAZjYlQr38=237) and their upcoming [**EVENTS**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.nhyr.gop%2Fcalendar/1/0100017c19e9885b-88f38465-7764-477e-9109-1073f68f7568-000000/dbzvK9SL7Pxbth8ybyHZVPEjelo=237) \- and don’t forget you can help by spreading the word to your family, friends, and even grandchildren about these casual meet-ups!

---

| **Stephan Stepanek

| **Thanks to the state budget we recently passed, Laconia taxpayers will save more than $1.25 million under the Statewide Property Tax. That’s direct relief for taxpayers, but the budget also helps property taxpayers in other ways by sharing funds with cities and towns.

For instance, we’ve increased revenue sharing under the Meals and Rooms Tax to 30 percent. That will mean more than $1.1 million going directly to Laconia in each of the next two years, helping to lower taxes. In addition, the two-year budget includes more than $23 million in Adequate Education Grants for Laconia schools.

I’m happy that our state budget is great news for hard working Laconia families.**
**Sen. Harold French****Canterbury**

****In his recent op-ed, Representative Green expressed the importance of Granite State Republicans involving themselves beyond simply getting out to cast their ballot. With Democrats’ using large dark money groups, and out-of-touch celebrity endorsements, we need activists on the ground more than ever. Communicating with your friends, families, and neighbors about local elections is only skimming the surface of having influence towards a campaign. | **The New Hampshire Federation of College Republicans is the officially chartered state organization for College Republicans all over the state of New Hampshire. With chapters at Saint Anselm College, Plymouth State, UNH, SNHU, Dartmouth, Franklin Pierce, and Keene State, the NHFCR has representation for a wide swath of the state. Executive board members include Chairman Ben Mickens, Executive Director Joseph LaCreta, Vice-Chair for CD1 Nate Twarog, Vice-Chair for CD2 John Michitson, Treasurer Kevin Chrisom, and Secretary Jessica Long. Our chapters are driven to keep college students engaged with conservative politics by bringing speakers to campus, presenting students with conservative internship opportunities in the state, and doing grassroots campaigning. The Federation board looks forward to helping get our chapters to a post-COVID reality while we work to keep Republican leadership in Concord as we push for Republican leadership in DC. **

Our chapters are driven to keep college students engaged with conservative politics by bringing speakers to campus, presenting students with conservative internship opportunities in the state, and doing grassroots campaigning. The Federation board looks forward to helping get our chapters to a post-COVID reality while we work to keep Republican leadership in Concord as we push for Republican leadership in DC. | | | | "Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee. Not Authorized by Any Candidate or Candidate's Committee." You received this email because you subscribed to our list. You can at any time. 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301 United States of America
