clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | Our Democratic House Majority is hanging on by a thread. Political experts predict Republicans will flip the house next year. Listen, without our House Majority -- President Biden’s agenda will be crushed and far-right Kevin McCarthy will take over the House. Thank you so much! \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. **Constitution Day!**

Last week, we celebrated the anniversary of the signing of our U.S. Constitution in Philadelphia in 1787. Our nation's founders understood the issues surrounding government overreach that impacts a person's freedoms. As a result, our Constitution established a system of governance, putting the people over the government by providing citizens their liberties and unalienable rights of Life, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness!

|

**Susan Wild Watch!**

House Progressive Caucus Chair says that Susan Wild has been instrumental in working to pass the Democrat's massive spending bill. In case you forgot, here is what is included in this bill!
* $68 trillion dollars in spending over the next ten years which will be the largest sustained spending level in US History
* Amnesty for illegal immigrants, tax breaks and subsidies for wealthy environmentalists, eliminating right to work protections, expanding government-controlled health care, Imposing new taxes and mandates on American energy development that pick winners and losers, raising electricity costs for households, increasing reliance on China and Russia for energy, and new funding to double the size of the IRS.
* 16.3 trillion of total deficit spending over ten years, which is a debt increase greater than the GDP of every country on earth, except the U.S., and increases the national debt to $45 Trillion dollars by 2031.
* Raising the corporate tax rate to a level higher than communist China and includes a multi-trillion tax increase on working families, small businesses, and family farms.

The Food and Drug Administration (FDA) overwhelmingly voted down a key provision of Biden's Covid-19 booster shot plan, after he already secured the doses. Our southern border is being overwhelmed with illegal immigrants, mainly from Haiti and instead of taking any action to secure our Southern Border, the Biden Administration banned Border Patrol agents from using horses. We need to secure our Southern Border and failure to do so shows the And we got more bad news about the disastrous withdrawal in Afghanistan. The Biden administration revealed that a drone strike conducted by our military in Afghanistan last month tragically killed multiple civilians, including several children. At the time, the Biden administration called this a "righteous strike" on ISIS-K operatives who presented an imminent threat on Americans. Just this week, Susan Wild was in lockstep with the radical members of her own party | Constitution Day! Last week, we celebrated the anniversary of the signing of our U.S. Constitution in Philadelphia in 1787. Our nation's founders understood the issues surrounding government overreach that impacts a person's freedoms. As a result, our Constitution established a system of governance, putting the people over the government by providing citizens their liberties and unalienable rights of Life, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness! | Susan Wild Watch! House Progressive Caucus Chair says that Susan Wild has been instrumental in working to pass the Democrat's massive spending bill. In case you forgot, here is what is included in this bill! $68 trillion dollars in spending over the next ten years which will be the largest sustained spending level in US History Amnesty for illegal immigrants, tax breaks and subsidies for wealthy environmentalists, eliminating right to work protections, expanding government-controlled health care, Imposing new taxes and mandates on American energy development that pick winners and losers, raising electricity costs for households, increasing reliance on China and Russia for energy, and new funding to double the size of the IRS. 16.3 trillion of total deficit spending over ten years, which is a debt increase greater than the GDP of every country on earth, except the U.S., and increases the national debt to $45 Trillion dollars by 2031. I'm writing today to follow-up on my email from 2 weeks ago regarding President Biden's forced vaccination efforts.

I'm not seeing your name on the list of conservatives who have taken our four question vaccine mandate survey, so I'm reaching back out to you with another opportunity to respond today.

Thank you,
Jim Jordan

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Jim Jordan
Date: Fri, Sep 10, 2021 at 5:30 PM
Subject: NO. VACCINE. MANDATE.
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Peter,

Last month the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 18 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=452e3d499f884f2ca51be848c39eb5b9&_e=Q3bbUfSJIovftpmjaj6mUFU2H1Guk3xWLgdRFVlozeJJq9qw3mIsp2nJQGhrshbO9Iy3zOAHK7XhSSEl1NAt150cHIoO0YugVQh7yAPxKyj3JxVozmiFc9PlZuEGYQl9FM2uH9EHrwHQvcWPZOhTJ5q0mTfLNA_yHNbgGmJDJjGrWyRG2jR_btmV-VxwkmyUX5ySHC9yOxx6e13i2cI6_YRi-CWpQ4ofZq-h7OtHL30Er0vYjoX3weNLD7_JTDRR9oWdvQaGbTwUcp_IYeZ51OMayBSTM-YuG4QQEt1WibHynKkBAken-BV5Jjyd1-8P9xQ44HZLo_iCZ52QGjkFzXEV-6WBlqJIb4YVplIA9fhTNABjr8VskHkl1ckqbGukjtA-FZTQ0fZ7dyML1AFHtWNdyKwgUUKbuD7lA1GiVbOfPSo-CarCLeF9y_4kV4Yf-hRJgWGo4htG8BEUV1cPwGTaZtVdgOOH5H10PzrMwcSrTaWpweSDas3jc8eKNSARW_q4AFUdgmvBfVlXTAE3sA%3D%3D)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=452e3d499f884f2ca51be848c39eb5b9&_e=Q3bbUfSJIovftpmjaj6mUFU2H1Guk3xWLgdRFVlozeJJq9qw3mIsp2nJQGhrshbO9Iy3zOAHK7XhSSEl1NAt150cHIoO0YugVQh7yAPxKyj3JxVozmiFc9PlZuEGYQl9FM2uH9EHrwHQvcWPZOhTJ5q0mTfLNA_yHNbgGmJDJjGrWyRG2jR_btmV-VxwkmyUX5ySHC9yOxx6e13i2cI6_YRi-CWpQ4ofZq-h7OtHL30Er0vYjoX3weNLD7_JTDRR9oWdvQaGbTwUcp_IYeZ51OMayBSTM-YuG4QQEt1WibHynKkBAken-BV5Jjyd1-8P9U2v_6-W4vp8Vz8hiCD4g1Q5xWeRvOvE89-lLf3KIU6fdLAT5K_x_bLcJLIoz0soTICieqb5P3NkAbA7fe5TKadLI_Ew2IPXSR3_GdzeMvn9A2U-8mKFjpLTbrHM07YW-tFZrWz2rgsjNUksAu8Y7cCMeiwGLvqBuN4-CY4nDZmuzioiwtbQOkcMEV_g-NL5fr1tG-G3_ByzSQHCFR3TCA%3D%3D)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, September 25th

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=452e3d499f884f2ca51be848c39eb5b9&_e=Q3bbUfSJIovftpmjaj6mUFU2H1Guk3xWLgdRFVlozeJJq9qw3mIsp2nJQGhrshbO9Iy3zOAHK7XhSSEl1NAt150cHIoO0YugVQh7yAPxKyj3JxVozmiFc9PlZuEGYQl9FM2uH9EHrwHQvcWPZOhTJ5q0mTfLNA_yHNbgGmJDJjGrWyRG2jR_btmV-VxwkmyUX5ySHC9yOxx6e13i2cI6_YRi-CWpQ4ofZq-h7OtHL30Er0vYjoX3weNLD7_JTDRR9oWdvQaGbTwUcp_IYeZ51OMayBSTM-YuG4QQEt1WibHynKkBAken-BV5Jjyd1-8PespptOp4zJxU8CC3w2ARNnwGzLWOFioZF_xOAvIzcc6uKFTRnkHwT0kX36MOYdYG5xcQntLtKKynMU5YUA41aq69ik6Z9xJzvBzOahpjGVAw9JpiiXkPhv3QogIq1a-dkyRFmTqBL5RetT4ZjGWuTPIv_hRUCki49gVSrHBqnQcqQJxQC_lVjMV9fnKOEk4OL0LX5xjt_4CQwupGw14krQ%3D%3D)

---

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**
**Now, if you work for a company with more than 100 employees, the government is going to try to force you to get vaccinated!**

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=452e3d499f884f2ca51be848c39eb5b9&_e=Q3bbUfSJIovftpmjaj6mUFU2H1Guk3xWLgdRFVlozeJJq9qw3mIsp2nJQGhrshbO9Iy3zOAHK7XhSSEl1NAt150cHIoO0YugVQh7yAPxKyj3JxVozmiFc9PlZuEGYQl9FM2uH9EHrwHQvcWPZOhTJ5q0mTfLNA_yHNbgGmJDJjGrWyRG2jR_btmV-VxwkmyUX5ySHC9yOxx6e13i2cI6_YRi-CWpQ4ofZq-h7OtHL30Er0vYjoX3weNLD7_JTDRR9oWdvQaGbTwUcp_IYeZ51OMayBSTM-YuG4QQEt1WibHynKkBAken-BV5Jjyd1-8PoQbQ6TJagSccREnmg71eHDnh82kY9G0gmHjAuyOg4Ur7oTHRCE7EfoWOUNT_3CyBr9zUH4BPQTxjF6QgUcJ7LXJLUjn4gGg1loqu1HuP5N7fUsEfrZOlu1bOrOI1qJwKgUMsfYm9eQxpixOiaOPfjYAEp76YzZEdyptIwiWhihK3XdVUmVALzSA0BMGO8sAsOBYIkDQQMeqUr496eYetvA%3D%3D)**

Thanks for letting us know –

Thank you,

Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations. | SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, September 25th Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us. How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status! Now, if you work for a company with more than 100 employees, the government is going to try to force you to get vaccinated! The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word. Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them. Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked. Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border. Will the hypocrisy ever end? Thanks for letting us know – Thank you, Jim Jordan | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

| Greetings
It's that time again. We are approaching the end of the next quarterly reporting period and I'm asking for your support to help me reach our goal.
Friend YOU are my person.
You've helped me before, and because of you, I'm still here fighting. Stronger and closer to the finish line than ever. So I'm asking, will you dive in and help me again?
[Click HERE to Donate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xqfAi-bvbvPDVnCUb2oGxbKyf8l73TtY7ZaYUO2pEJo3cyjY2-6GiNaswp1BTft8tDoMn-92SRon0aU93BuU5jR-LC64JDTVkrw_ergyWN0ZnM_La6aGOcDTn3v50x9m_VcmNgA0TXswqXaFdd_BJyMdZRVxsykBZGIlLejgOo2VOfi08QlODw3rKvlxzMT4&c=tBBdiKCo5hEa833-2TkwF_sFJ5Af15EqaSa-ZvzHroo4G9sOOh3_CA==&ch=Xixs1Gm8aN8F4H7VYNOJ5-DhXVBqaGXyGA7yGl1k9bVxUUaqSV2S3g==)
The last quarter has been an unmitigated success as our America First message and strong stand against political bullying have resonated with our voters in the district and supporters across the nation. But I need your support again to keep fighting against the big money from Super Pacs that support the Trump-impeaching RINO whose name I won't even bother to say.
America needs to have principled conservatives who will not be bullied into siding with Leftists. As a veteran, an outspoken activist for election integrity, and a champion for Americans detained without due process, I know I am the right person for the job. And I know, you know it too.
[Click HERE to Donate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xqfAi-bvbvPDVnCUb2oGxbKyf8l73TtY7ZaYUO2pEJo3cyjY2-6GiNaswp1BTft8tDoMn-92SRon0aU93BuU5jR-LC64JDTVkrw_ergyWN0ZnM_La6aGOcDTn3v50x9m_VcmNgA0TXswqXaFdd_BJyMdZRVxsykBZGIlLejgOo2VOfi08QlODw3rKvlxzMT4&c=tBBdiKCo5hEa833-2TkwF_sFJ5Af15EqaSa-ZvzHroo4G9sOOh3_CA==&ch=Xixs1Gm8aN8F4H7VYNOJ5-DhXVBqaGXyGA7yGl1k9bVxUUaqSV2S3g==)
Recently, I have been strongly endorsed by Arizona state Senator Wendy Rogers and Virginia state senator Amanda Chase, proving that true conservatives agree with you, Friend that I will fight for American values.
Please watch this video I made for friends like you, whom I can trust to stand in the fight with me.
[Click HERE to watch the video](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xqfAi-bvbvPDVnCUb2oGxbKyf8l73TtY7ZaYUO2pEJo3cyjY2-6GiIPI6htV31CXoKb82GpnM31RiKBUPGMQI9AaeS1D9W4Z4MX17KQ8Nqha4_K_piry3s94TfSTCew4gEC_REQ_GNlBeN3hdz0j3NljVBkSDUyq9AQ5m30hcyVBZsHonbY3n8nzyL7Oadz57APN1lLhfVk=&c=tBBdiKCo5hEa833-2TkwF_sFJ5Af15EqaSa-ZvzHroo4G9sOOh3_CA==&ch=Xixs1Gm8aN8F4H7VYNOJ5-DhXVBqaGXyGA7yGl1k9bVxUUaqSV2S3g==)
I am ready, willing, and able to fight but I need your continued support to do it. Please donate as generously as you can to my campaign. You have my heartfelt gratitude and America will be better for it.
Born to Serve, Jerrod Sessler Candidate For U.S. House of Representatives WA-04
